papers.title: Low Light Image Enhancement Challenge at NTIRE 2026
papers.abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of the NTIRE 2026 Low Light Image Enhancement Challenge, highlighting the proposed solutions and final results. The objective of this challenge is to identify effective networks capable of producing clearer and visually compelling images in diverse and challenging conditions by learning representative visual cues with the purpose of restoring information loss due to low-contrast and noisy images. A total of 195 participants registered for the first track and 153 for the second track of the competition, and 22 teams ultimately submitted valid entries. This paper thoroughly evaluates the state-of-the-art advances in (joint denoising and) low-light image enhancement, showcasing the significant progress in the field, while leveraging samples of our novel dataset.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026低光图像增强挑战赛综述，评估了22个团队的解决方案并展示了新数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光图像增强在安防、夜间摄影等领域至关重要，但现有方法在复杂光照和噪声条件下表现有限，亟需系统性评测和基准。
analysis.problem: 解决低光环境下图像对比度低、噪声大导致信息丢失的问题，通过挑战赛推动有效网络设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 组织挑战赛，分为两个赛道，收集195/153名参与者，最终22个团队提交有效方案，并引入新数据集进行评测。
contributions: 系统评估了低光图像增强（含联合去噪）的最新进展
发布了新数据集以推动领域发展
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 挑战赛结果可能受限于特定数据集和评价指标
未详细分析各方法的泛化能力
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026低光图像增强挑战赛综述，评估了22个团队的解决方案并展示了新数据集。

papers.title: ATLAS: Constitution-Conditioned Latent Geometry and Redistribution Across Language Models and Neural Perturbation Data
papers.abstract: Constitution-conditioned post-training can be analysed as a structured perturbation of a model's learned representational geometry. We introduce ATLAS, a geometry-first program that traces constitution-induced hidden-state structure across charts, models, and substrates. Instead of treating the relevant unit as a single behaviour, neuron, vector, or patch, ATLAS tests a local chart whose tangent structure, occupancy distribution, and behavioural coupling can be measured under system change. On Gemma, the anchored source-local chart captures 310 / 320 reviewed source rows and all 84 / 84 reviewed score-flip rows, but compact exact-patch sufficiency does not close, so the exportable unit is the broader source-defined family. Freezing that family, we re-identify a target-local realisation in an unadapted Phi model, where the fully adjudicated confirmatory contrast separates with AUC 0.984 and mean gap 5.50. In held-out ALM8 mouse frontal-cortex perturbation data, the same source-defined family receives support across 5/5 folds, with mean held-out AUC 0.72 and mean fold gap 4.50. A multiple-choice analysis provides the main boundary: nearby target-local signals can appear without source-faithful closure. The resulting correspondence is not coordinate identity, site identity, or a target-side mediation theorem. It is geometric recurrence under redistribution: written constitutions can induce recoverable latent geometry whose organisation remains detectable across model and substrate changes while its local coordinates, occupancy, and behavioural expression shift.

analysis.tldr: ATLAS 通过几何优先方法，证明宪法条件化后训练在模型间和神经扰动数据中诱导可恢复的潜在几何结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法将后训练视为行为、神经元或向量的扰动，缺乏对潜在几何结构跨模型和跨基质可迁移性的理解。
analysis.problem: 如何表征和追踪宪法条件化后训练在语言模型和神经扰动数据中诱导的隐藏状态几何结构，并验证其跨系统可恢复性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ATLAS 是一种几何优先方法，通过局部图表（local chart）的切结构、占用分布和行为耦合来追踪宪法诱导的隐藏状态结构，并在源模型和目标模型间进行重识别。
contributions: 提出 ATLAS 框架，将宪法条件化后训练分析为结构化几何扰动。
在 Gemma 和 Phi 模型以及 ALM8 小鼠前额叶皮层扰动数据上验证了潜在几何结构的跨模型和跨基质可恢复性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Gemma 模型上，源局部图表捕获 310/320 源行和 84/84 分数翻转行；在未适应的 Phi 模型中，确认性对比 AUC 0.984，平均差距 5.50；在 ALM8 数据上，5 折交叉验证平均 AUC 0.72，平均差距 4.50。
limitations: 紧凑精确补丁充分性未闭合，导出单元是更广泛的源定义族。
附近目标局部信号可能在没有源忠实闭合的情况下出现。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ATLAS 通过几何优先方法，证明宪法条件化后训练在模型间和神经扰动数据中诱导可恢复的潜在几何结构。

papers.title: Semantic Density Effect (SDE): Maximizing Information Per Token Improves LLM Accuracy
papers.abstract: We introduce the Semantic Density Effect (SDE): the empirical finding that prompts carrying higher semantic information per token consistently produce more accurate, focused, and less hallucinated outputs across all major LLM families. SDE is defined as the ratio of semantically loaded tokens to total prompt tokens, adjusted for redundancy and concreteness. Unlike prior prompt optimization techniques that add tokens (Chain of Thought), duplicate the prompt (Prompt Repetition), or reorder components (Instruction Placement Effect), SDE improves performance by removing or replacing low-information tokens while preserving or sharpening the semantic signal. Evaluated across five frontier models and seven benchmarks, ultra-dense prompts (SDE > 0.80) outperform diluted counterparts by an average of +8.4 percentage points with 0 additional tokens and 0 latency overhead. Combined with Instruction Placement Effect (IPE), the gain reaches +11.7 percentage points

analysis.tldr: 提出语义密度效应（SDE），通过最大化每token信息量提升LLM准确率，无需额外token或延迟。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有提示优化技术（如思维链、提示重复）往往增加token数量或复杂度，导致效率下降，亟需一种不增加开销的方法提升LLM输出质量。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加token数和延迟的前提下，通过优化提示的语义密度来提高LLM的准确性和减少幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现提示中语义信息密度越高，LLM输出越准确、聚焦且幻觉更少；低信息token会稀释语义信号，降低性能。
analysis.method: 定义语义密度效应（SDE）为语义负载token与总token之比，通过移除或替换低信息token、保留或增强语义信号来构建超密集提示。
contributions: 提出语义密度效应（SDE）概念，并验证其跨模型和基准的普适性。
展示SDE与指令放置效应（IPE）可叠加，进一步提升性能。
analysis.experiments: 在五个前沿模型和七个基准上评估，超密集提示（SDE>0.80）相比稀释提示平均提升+8.4个百分点，结合IPE提升+11.7个百分点。
limitations: SDE定义依赖语义负载token的识别，可能需人工或额外工具标注。
实验仅覆盖文本提示，未验证在多模态或长上下文场景下的效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义密度效应（SDE），通过最大化每token信息量提升LLM准确率，无需额外token或延迟。

papers.title: Video-Robin: Autoregressive Diffusion Planning for Intent-Grounded Video-to-Music Generation
papers.abstract: Video-to-music (V2M) is the fundamental task of creating background music for an input video. Recent V2M models achieve audiovisual alignment by typically relying on visual conditioning alone and provide limited semantic and stylistic controllability to the end user. In this paper, we present Video-Robin, a novel text-conditioned video-to-music generation model that enables fast, high-quality, semantically aligned music generation for video content. To balance musical fidelity and semantic understanding, Video-Robin integrates autoregressive planning with diffusion-based synthesis. Specifically, an autoregressive module models global structure by semantically aligning visual and textual inputs to produce high-level music latents. These latents are subsequently refined into coherent, high-fidelity music using local Diffusion Transformers. By factoring semantically driven planning into diffusion-based synthesis, Video-Robin enables fine-grained creator control without sacrificing audio realism. Our proposed model outperforms baselines that solely accept video input and additional feature conditioned baselines on both in-distribution and out-of-distribution benchmarks with a 2.21x speed in inference compared to SOTA. We will open-source everything upon paper acceptance.

analysis.tldr: Video-Robin 通过自回归规划与扩散合成结合，实现文本可控的高质量视频配乐生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频配乐模型仅依赖视觉条件，缺乏语义和风格可控性，难以满足创作者对音乐与视频内容精细对齐的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现既保持音乐真实感又支持文本语义控制的视频配乐生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 自回归模块建模全局结构并语义对齐视觉与文本输入生成高层音乐隐变量，再由局部扩散Transformer精化为连贯高保真音乐。
contributions: 提出自回归规划与扩散合成结合的框架，实现文本条件视频配乐生成。
在分布内和分布外基准上超越基线，推理速度比SOTA快2.21倍。
analysis.experiments: 在分布内和分布外基准上评估，对比仅视频输入和额外特征条件基线，推理速度比SOTA快2.21倍。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本标注数据。
长视频的全局结构建模能力未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Video-Robin 通过自回归规划与扩散合成结合，实现文本可控的高质量视频配乐生成。

papers.title: Poly-EPO: Training Exploratory Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Exploration is a cornerstone of learning from experience: it enables agents to find solutions to complex problems, generalize to novel ones, and scale performance with test-time compute. In this paper, we present a framework for post-training language models (LMs) that explicitly encourages optimistic exploration and promotes a synergy between exploration and exploitation. The central idea is to train the LM to generate sets of responses that are collectively accurate under the reward function and exploratory in their reasoning strategies. We first develop a general recipe for optimizing LMs with set reinforcement learning (set RL) under arbitrary objective functions, showing how standard RL algorithms can be adapted to this setting through a modification to the advantage computation. We then propose Polychromic Exploratory Policy Optimization (Poly-EPO), which instantiates this framework with an objective that explicitly synergizes exploration and exploitation. Across a range of reasoning benchmarks, we show that Poly-EPO improves generalization, as evidenced by higher pass@$k$ coverage, preserves greater diversity in model generations, and effectively scales with test-time compute.

analysis.tldr: 提出Poly-EPO框架，通过集合强化学习训练语言模型在推理中兼顾探索与利用，提升泛化能力和测试时计算扩展性。
analysis.research_motivation: 探索是学习从经验中获取知识的核心，但现有语言模型后训练方法往往缺乏对乐观探索和探索-利用协同的明确鼓励，限制了模型在复杂推理任务中的泛化能力和测试时计算扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计后训练框架，使语言模型在生成推理响应时既能保持集体准确性，又能主动探索多样化的推理策略，实现探索与利用的有效协同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Polychromic Exploratory Policy Optimization (Poly-EPO)框架，基于集合强化学习（set RL），通过修改优势计算将标准RL算法适配到集合场景，并设计显式协同探索与利用的目标函数。
contributions: 提出集合强化学习（set RL）的通用优化配方，展示如何通过修改优势计算适配标准RL算法。
提出Poly-EPO方法，显式协同探索与利用，在推理基准上提升泛化能力（pass@k覆盖率）、保持生成多样性并有效扩展测试时计算。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上评估，显示Poly-EPO在pass@k覆盖率、生成多样性和测试时计算扩展性方面优于基线。
limitations: 可能对集合大小敏感，需要调参。
未讨论在非推理任务（如对话生成）上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Poly-EPO框架，通过集合强化学习训练语言模型在推理中兼顾探索与利用，提升泛化能力和测试时计算扩展性。

papers.title: PV-SQL: Synergizing Database Probing and Rule-based Verification for Text-to-SQL Agents
papers.abstract: Text-to-SQL systems often struggle with deep contextual understanding, particularly for complex queries with subtle requirements. We present PV-SQL, an agentic framework that addresses these failures through two complementary components: Probe and Verify. The Probe component iteratively generates probing queries to retrieve concrete records from the database, resolving ambiguities in value formats, column semantics, and inter-table relationships to build richer contextual understanding. The Verify component employs a rule-based method to extract verifiable conditions and construct an executable checklist, enabling iterative SQL refinement that effectively reduces missing constraints. Experiments on the BIRD benchmarks show that PV-SQL outperforms the best text-to-SQL baseline by 5% in execution accuracy and 20.8% in valid efficiency score while consuming fewer tokens.

analysis.tldr: PV-SQL通过数据库探测和规则验证提升Text-to-SQL在复杂查询上的准确率和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Text-to-SQL系统在处理复杂查询时缺乏深度上下文理解，导致对值格式、列语义和表间关系的歧义处理不足，且容易遗漏约束条件。
analysis.problem: 如何提升Text-to-SQL系统对复杂查询的上下文理解能力和约束完整性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Probe和Verify两个组件：Probe通过迭代生成探测查询从数据库检索具体记录以解决歧义；Verify使用规则方法提取可验证条件并构建可执行检查表，迭代优化SQL。
contributions: 提出Probe组件，通过数据库探测增强上下文理解。
提出Verify组件，通过规则验证减少缺失约束。
analysis.experiments: 在BIRD基准上，PV-SQL在执行准确率上比最佳基线提升5%，有效效率分数提升20.8%，且消耗更少token。
limitations: 可能依赖数据库的可探测性。
规则验证可能无法覆盖所有复杂约束。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PV-SQL通过数据库探测和规则验证提升Text-to-SQL在复杂查询上的准确率和效率。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Super-Resolution for Sentinel-5P Hyperspectral Images
papers.abstract: Sentinel-5P (S5P) plays a critical role in atmospheric monitoring; however, its spatial resolution limits fine-scale analysis. Existing super-resolution (SR) approaches rely on supervised learning with synthetic low-resolution (LR) data, since true high-resolution (HR) data do not exist, limiting their applicability to real observations. We propose a self-supervised hyperspectral SR framework for S5P that enables training without HR ground truth. The method combines Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimator (SURE) with an equivariant imaging constraint, incorporating the S5P degradation operator and noise statistics derived from signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) metadata. We also introduce depthwise separable convolution U-Net architectures designed for efficiency and spectral fidelity. The framework is evaluated in two settings: (i) LR-HR, where synthetic LR data are used for direct comparison with supervised learning, and (ii) GT-SHR, where super-resolved images surpass the native spatial resolution without HR reference. Results across multiple bands show that self-supervised models achieve performance comparable to supervised methods while maintaining strong consistency. Qualitative analysis shows improved spatial detail over bicubic interpolation, and validation with EMIT data confirms that reconstructed structures are physically meaningful. Code is available at https://github.com/hyamomar/Sentinel-5P-Super-Resolution/tree/main/self_supervised

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需高分辨率真值的自监督超分辨率框架，用于提升 Sentinel-5P 高光谱图像的空间分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: Sentinel-5P 卫星图像空间分辨率不足，限制了精细尺度的大气监测分析；现有超分辨率方法依赖合成低分辨率数据的有监督学习，无法直接应用于真实观测。
analysis.problem: 在缺乏真实高分辨率参考图像的情况下，实现 Sentinel-5P 高光谱图像的超分辨率重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合 Stein 无偏风险估计（SURE）与等变成像约束，利用 S5P 退化算子和信噪比元数据导出的噪声统计，并设计深度可分离卷积 U-Net 架构。
contributions: 提出首个针对 Sentinel-5P 的自监督高光谱超分辨率框架，无需高分辨率真值。
引入 SURE 与等变成像约束，有效利用退化算子和噪声统计。
设计高效且保持光谱保真度的深度可分离卷积 U-Net。
analysis.experiments: 在两种设置下评估：LR-HR（与有监督方法直接比较）和 GT-SHR（超越原生分辨率，无高分辨率参考）。结果表明自监督模型性能与有监督方法相当，且保持强一致性；定性分析显示空间细节优于双三次插值，EMIT 数据验证了重建结构的物理意义。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的退化算子和噪声统计，实际中估计误差可能影响性能。
自监督方法在极端放大倍数下可能不如有监督方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需高分辨率真值的自监督超分辨率框架，用于提升 Sentinel-5P 高光谱图像的空间分辨率。

papers.title: Infrastructure-Centric World Models: Bridging Temporal Depth and Spatial Breadth for Roadside Perception
papers.abstract: World models, generative AI systems that simulate how environments evolve, are transforming autonomous driving, yet all existing approaches adopt an ego-vehicle perspective, leaving the infrastructure viewpoint unexplored. We argue that infrastructure-centric world models offer a fundamentally complementary capability: the bird's-eye, multi-sensor, persistent viewpoint that roadside systems uniquely possess. Central to our thesis is a spatio-temporal complementarity: fixed roadside sensors excel at temporal depth, accumulating long-term behavioral distributions including rare safety-critical events, while vehicle-borne sensors excel at spatial breadth, sampling diverse scenes across large road networks. This paper presents a vision for Infrastructure-centric World Models (I-WM) in three phases: (I) generative scene understanding with quality-aware uncertainty propagation, (II) physics-informed predictive dynamics with multi-agent counterfactual reasoning, and (III) collaborative world models for V2X communication via latent space alignment. We propose a dual-layer architecture, annotation-free perception as a multi-modal data engine feeding end-to-end generative world models, with a phased sensor strategy from LiDAR through 4D radar and signal phase data to event cameras. We establish a taxonomy of driving world model paradigms, position I-WM relative to LeCun's JEPA, Li Fei-Fei's spatial intelligence, and VLA architectures, and introduce Infrastructure VLA (I-VLA) as a novel unification of roadside perception, language commands, and traffic control actions. Our vision builds upon existing multi-LiDAR pipelines and identifies open-source foundations for each phase, providing a path toward infrastructure that understands and anticipates traffic.

analysis.tldr: 提出以基础设施为中心的世界模型（I-WM），利用路侧传感器的时空深度优势，通过生成式场景理解、物理信息预测和V2X协作，为自动驾驶提供互补视角。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动驾驶世界模型均以自车为中心，忽略了路侧基础设施独特的鸟瞰、多传感器、持久视角，无法充分利用其时间深度优势来捕捉长尾安全关键事件。
analysis.problem: 如何构建以基础设施为中心的世界模型，以桥接路侧传感器的时空深度与车载传感器的空间广度，实现更全面的场景理解与预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式，但指出路侧传感器在时间深度上优于车载传感器，而车载传感器在空间广度上占优，形成互补。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段I-WM框架：阶段I为生成式场景理解与质量感知不确定性传播；阶段II为物理信息预测动力学与多智能体反事实推理；阶段III为通过潜在空间对齐实现V2X通信的协作世界模型。架构包括双层次设计、免标注感知作为多模态数据引擎、分阶段传感器策略（LiDAR→4D雷达→信号相位数据→事件相机），并引入基础设施VLA（I-VLA）统一路侧感知、语言指令和交通控制动作。
contributions: 首次提出以基础设施为中心的世界模型（I-WM）概念，建立自动驾驶世界模型范式的分类体系。
提出三阶段I-WM框架及双层次架构，涵盖生成式理解、物理信息预测和V2X协作。
引入基础设施VLA（I-VLA）作为路侧感知、语言和控制的统一框架。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 论文为愿景性工作，缺乏实验验证和定量结果。
各阶段的具体实现细节和可行性尚待进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出以基础设施为中心的世界模型（I-WM），利用路侧传感器的时空深度优势，通过生成式场景理解、物理信息预测和V2X协作，为自动驾驶提供互补视角。

papers.title: On The Mathematics of the Natural Physics of Optimization
papers.abstract: A number of optimization algorithms have been inspired by the physics of Newtonian motion. Here, we ask the question: do algorithms themselves obey some ``natural laws of motion,'' and can they be derived by an application of these laws? We explore this question by positing the theory that optimization algorithms may be considered as some manifestation of hidden algorithm primitives that obey certain universal non-Newtonian dynamics. This natural physics of optimization is developed by equating the terminal transversality conditions of an optimal control problem to the generalized Karush/John-Kuhn-Tucker conditions of an optimization problem. Through this equivalence formulation, the data functions of a given constrained optimization problem generate a natural vector field that permeates an entire hidden space with information on the optimality conditions. An ``action-at-a-distance'' operation via a Pontryagin-type minimum principle produces a local action to deliver a globalized result by way of a Hamilton-Jacobi inequality. An inverse-optimal algorithm is generated by performing control jumps that dissipate quantized ``energy'' defined by a search Lyapunov function. Illustrative applications of the proposed theory show that a large number of algorithms can be generated and explained in terms of the new mathematical physics of optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出优化算法可视为遵循非牛顿动力学的自然物理过程，并通过最优控制与优化条件的等价性推导出通用算法框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有优化算法多受牛顿力学启发，但缺乏统一的理论解释其内在动力学规律，本文旨在建立优化算法的数学物理基础。
analysis.problem: 如何从自然物理定律出发，统一推导和解释各类优化算法的动力学行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过将最优控制问题的终端横截条件与优化问题的广义KKT条件等价，构建隐藏空间中的自然向量场，利用Pontryagin最小原理和Hamilton-Jacobi不等式实现全局化结果，并通过控制跳变耗散量化能量生成逆最优算法。
contributions: 提出优化算法遵循非牛顿动力学的自然物理理论
建立最优控制与优化条件之间的等价框架，导出通用算法生成机制
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架的实用性和可计算性有待验证
可能仅适用于特定类型的优化问题
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出优化算法可视为遵循非牛顿动力学的自然物理过程，并通过最优控制与优化条件的等价性推导出通用算法框架。

papers.title: BioVLM: Routing Prompts, Not Parameters, for Cross-Modality Generalization in Biomedical VLMs
papers.abstract: Pretrained biomedical vision-language models (VLMs) such as BioMedCLIP perform well on average but often degrade on challenging modalities where inter-class margins are small and acquisition-specific variations are pronounced, especially under few-shot supervision and when modality priors differ from pretraining corpora substantially. We propose BioVLM, a prompt-learning framework that improves cross-domain generalization without extensive backbone fine-tuning. BioVLM learns a diverse prompt bank and introduces dynamic prompt selection: for each input, it selects the most discriminative prompts via a low-entropy criterion on the predictive distribution, effectively coupling sparse few-shot evidence with rich LLM semantic priors. To strengthen this coupling, we distill high-confidence LLM-derived attributes and enforce robust knowledge transfer through strong/weak augmentation consistency. At test time, BioVLM adapts by choosing modality-appropriate prompts, enabling transfer to unseen categories and domains, while keeping training lightweight and inference efficient. On 11 MedMNIST+ 2D datasets, BioVLM achieves new state of the art across three distinct generalization settings. Codes are available at https://github.com/mainaksingha01/BioVLM.

analysis.tldr: BioVLM通过动态提示选择实现生物医学VLM的跨模态泛化，无需微调骨干网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 预训练生物医学VLM在挑战性模态上性能下降，尤其是小样本和监督差异大时，现有方法需要大量微调。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调骨干网络的情况下，提升生物医学VLM在跨模态和小样本场景下的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练VLM在模态差异大、类间边界小的数据集上性能退化，小样本监督下更明显。
analysis.method: 学习一个多样化的提示库，通过低熵准则动态选择最具判别性的提示，结合LLM语义先验和强/弱增强一致性蒸馏。
contributions: 提出动态提示选择框架，无需微调骨干网络即可实现跨模态泛化。
在11个MedMNIST+2D数据集上达到SOTA，覆盖三种泛化设置。
analysis.experiments: 在11个MedMNIST+2D数据集上评估，涵盖三种不同的泛化设置，达到新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM先验质量，低质量先验可能影响性能。
动态选择机制在极端小样本下可能不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BioVLM通过动态提示选择实现生物医学VLM的跨模态泛化，无需微调骨干网络。

papers.title: On Solving the Multiple Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence Problem
papers.abstract: This paper addresses the Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence (VGLCS) problem, a generalization of the classical LCS problem involving flexible gap constraints between consecutive solutions' characters. The problem arises in molecular sequence comparison, where structural distance constraints between residues must be respected, and in time-series analysis where events are required to occur within specified temporal delays. We propose a search framework based on the root-based state graph representation, in which the state space comprises a generally large number of rooted state subgraphs. To cope with the resulting combinatorial explosion, an iterative beam search strategy is employed, dynamically maintaining a global pool of promising candidate root nodes, enabling effective control of diversification across iterations. To exploit the search for high-quality solutions, several known heuristics from the LCS literature are utilized into the standalone beam search procedure. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive computational study on the VGLCS problem comprising 320 synthetic instances with up to 10 input sequences and up to 500 characters. Experimental results show robustness of the designed approach over the baseline beam search in comparable runtimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于根状态图表示和迭代束搜索的框架，首次系统求解多序列变长间隙最长公共子序列问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 变长间隙最长公共子序列（VGLCS）问题在分子序列比对和时间序列分析中具有重要应用，但现有方法难以处理多序列和间隙约束带来的组合爆炸。
analysis.problem: 求解多序列（最多10条）且字符长度达500的VGLCS问题，在可接受时间内找到高质量解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 状态空间由大量根状态子图构成，导致组合爆炸；基线束搜索在复杂实例上效果有限。
analysis.method: 基于根状态图表示，采用迭代束搜索策略，动态维护全局候选根节点池以控制多样性，并融入LCS文献中的启发式方法。
contributions: 首次对VGLCS问题进行系统性计算研究，构建包含320个合成实例的基准测试集。
提出结合根状态图表示和迭代束搜索的框架，在可比运行时间内优于基线束搜索。
analysis.experiments: 在320个合成实例上测试，输入序列最多10条，字符长度最多500，结果显示所提方法在鲁棒性上优于基线束搜索。
limitations: 仅使用合成数据，未在真实分子序列或时间序列上验证。
方法依赖启发式，可能无法保证最优解。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于根状态图表示和迭代束搜索的框架，首次系统求解多序列变长间隙最长公共子序列问题。

papers.title: Toward Reusability of AI Models Using Dynamic Updates of AI Documentation
papers.abstract: This work addresses the challenge of disseminating reusable artificial intelligence (AI) models accompanied by AI documentation (a.k.a., AI model cards). The work is motivated by the large number of trained AI models that are not reusable due to the lack of (a) AI documentation and (b) the temporal lag between rapidly changing requirements on AI model reusability and those specified in various AI model cards. Our objectives are to shorten the lag time in updating AI model card templates and align AI documentation more closely with current AI best practices. Our approach introduces a methodology for delivering agile, data-driven, and community-based AI model cards. We use the Hugging Face (HF) repository of AI models, populated by a subset of the AI research and development community, and the AI consortium-based Zero Draft (ZD) templates for the AI documentation of AI datasets and AI models, as our test datasets. We also address questions about the value of AI documentation for AI reusability. Our work quantifies the correlations between AI model downloads/likes (i.e., AI model reuse metrics) from the HF repository and their documentation alignment with the ZD documentation templates using tables of contents and word statistics (i.e., AI documentation quality metrics). Furthermore, our work develops the infrastructure to regularly compare AI documentation templates against community-standard practices derived from millions of uploaded AI models in the Hugging Face repository. The impact of our work lies in introducing a methodology for delivering agile, data-driven, and community-based standards for documenting AI models and improving AI model reuse.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种动态更新AI文档模板的方法，以提升AI模型的可复用性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大量训练好的AI模型因缺乏文档或文档更新滞后而难以复用，亟需缩短文档模板与实际需求之间的时间差。
analysis.problem: 如何动态更新AI文档模板，使其与社区最佳实践对齐，从而提升AI模型的可复用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种敏捷、数据驱动、基于社区的AI模型卡方法论，利用Hugging Face仓库和Zero Draft模板，通过目录和词统计量化文档质量与复用指标的相关性，并构建基础设施定期比较文档模板与社区实践。
contributions: 引入一种动态更新AI文档模板的方法论，使其更贴近社区最佳实践。
量化了AI文档质量与模型复用指标（如下载量、点赞数）之间的相关性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖Hugging Face平台的数据分布，泛化性有限。
文档质量指标（目录、词统计）可能无法完全反映文档的实际有用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种动态更新AI文档模板的方法，以提升AI模型的可复用性。

papers.title: FlowC2S: Flowing from Current to Succeeding Frames for Fast and Memory-Efficient Video Continuation
papers.abstract: This paper introduces a novel methodology for generating fast and memory-efficient video continuations. Our method, dubbed FlowC2S, fine-tunes a pre-trained text-to-video flow model to learn a vector field between the current and succeeding video chunks. Two design choices are key. First, we introduce inherent optimal couplings, utilizing temporally adjacent video chunks during training as a practical proxy for true optimal couplings, resulting in straighter flows. Second, we incorporate target inversion, injecting the inverted latent of the target chunk into the input representation to strengthen correspondences and improve visual fidelity. By flowing directly from current to succeeding frames, instead of the common combination of current frames with noise to generate a video continuation, we reduce the dimensionality of the model input by a factor of two. The proposed method, fine-tuned from LTXV and Wan, surpasses the state-of-the-art scores across quantitative evaluations with FID and FVD, with as few as five neural function evaluations.

analysis.tldr: FlowC2S通过从当前帧直接流向后续帧，实现快速且内存高效的视频续写。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频续写方法通常将当前帧与噪声结合作为输入，导致输入维度高、计算开销大，难以实现快速和内存高效。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种视频续写方法，在减少输入维度的同时保持或提升生成质量，并实现快速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FlowC2S微调预训练文本到视频流模型，学习当前与后续视频块之间的向量场。关键设计包括：1）利用训练中时间相邻的视频块作为最优耦合的代理，使流更直；2）目标反转，将目标块的逆潜在注入输入表示以增强对应性和视觉保真度。
contributions: 提出FlowC2S，通过从当前帧直接流向后续帧，将输入维度减半，实现快速和内存高效的视频续写。
引入固有最优耦合和目标反转策略，提升生成质量和流效率。
analysis.experiments: 在LTXV和Wan上微调，定量评估中FID和FVD指标超越现有最先进方法，仅需5次神经函数评估。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型的质量和领域适配性。
目标反转可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FlowC2S通过从当前帧直接流向后续帧，实现快速且内存高效的视频续写。

papers.title: Predictive Multi-Tier Memory Management for KV Cache in Large-Scale GPU Inference
papers.abstract: Key-value (KV) cache memory management is the primary bottleneck limiting throughput and cost-efficiency in large-scale GPU inference serving. Current systems suffer from three compounding inefficiencies: (1) the absence of unified KV cache sizing across all attention architectures--particularly multi-head latent attention (MLA), which is unsupported in general-purpose frameworks, resulting in up to 57x memory over-provisioning; (2) confinement of KV cache to a single memory tier (GPU HBM) despite the availability of a rich hierarchy spanning CPU DRAM, CXL-attached memory, NVMe via GPUDirect Storage, RDMA fabric, and parallel filesystems; and (3) reactive eviction policies that discard reusable state, forcing redundant recomputation. We present a unified system that addresses all three problems. Our architecture-variant-aware sizing engine computes exact memory requirements per attention type, enabling up to 7.4x higher batch sizes. A six-tier memory hierarchy extends effective KV cache capacity from 40 GB to over 38 TB per node while maintaining sub-millisecond time-to-first-token (TTFT) for hot entries. A Bayesian reuse predictor with Beta conjugate priors over 16 (block-type, transition-type) pairs achieves 70-84% cache hit rates, combined with EMA-scored head-granular eviction and RoPE-aware prefetching. Component-level validation on trace replay using ShareGPT, LMSYS-Chat-1M, and agentic workloads demonstrates 70-84% cache hit rates. Analytical projections combining validated component behavior with published hardware specifications indicate 1.4-2.1x projected TTFT reduction, 1.7-2.9x throughput improvement, and 47% cost reduction compared to state-of-the-art baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种预测性多层级KV缓存管理系统，通过架构感知的容量计算、六层内存层次和贝叶斯复用预测器，显著提升GPU推理吞吐并降低成本。
analysis.research_motivation: KV缓存管理是GPU推理服务的核心瓶颈，现有系统缺乏统一容量计算、仅使用单层HBM内存、采用被动驱逐策略导致冗余重计算，严重限制吞吐和成本效率。
analysis.problem: 解决KV缓存管理中容量计算不统一、内存层次利用不足和驱逐策略被动三个问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：MLA架构在通用框架中不支持导致57倍内存过度配置；仅使用GPU HBM而忽略CPU DRAM、CXL、NVMe等多层内存；被动驱逐策略丢弃可复用状态导致冗余重计算。
analysis.method: 提出统一系统：架构变体感知的容量计算引擎精确计算每种注意力类型的内存需求；六层内存层次扩展有效缓存容量至每节点38TB以上；贝叶斯复用预测器（Beta共轭先验）在16个(块类型, 转移类型)对上实现70-84%缓存命中率，结合EMA评分头粒度驱逐和RoPE感知预取。
contributions: 提出架构变体感知的KV缓存容量计算引擎，支持MLA等注意力架构，消除内存过度配置。
设计六层内存层次，将有效缓存容量从40GB扩展到每节点38TB以上，同时保持热条目亚毫秒TTFT。
引入贝叶斯复用预测器与EMA评分驱逐和RoPE感知预取，实现70-84%缓存命中率。
analysis.experiments: 在ShareGPT、LMSYS-Chat-1M和agentic工作负载的trace回放上进行组件级验证，缓存命中率70-84%；结合已发布硬件规格的分析投影表明：与最先进基线相比，TTFT降低1.4-2.1倍，吞吐提升1.7-2.9倍，成本降低47%。
limitations: 分析投影基于组件行为与硬件规格，实际端到端性能可能受系统集成影响。
贝叶斯预测器依赖16个(块类型, 转移类型)对，可能无法覆盖所有工作负载模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种预测性多层级KV缓存管理系统，通过架构感知的容量计算、六层内存层次和贝叶斯复用预测器，显著提升GPU推理吞吐并降低成本。

papers.title: FASE : A Fairness-Aware Spatiotemporal Event Graph Framework for Predictive Policing
papers.abstract: Predictive policing systems that allocate patrol resources based solely on predicted crime risk can unintentionally amplify racial disparities through feedback driven data bias. We present FASE, a Fairness Aware Spatiotemporal Event Graph framework, which integrates spatiotemporal crime prediction with fairness constrained patrol allocation and a closed loop deployment feedback simulator. We model Baltimore as a graph of 25 ZIP Code Tabulation Areas and use 139,982 Part 1 crime incidents from 2017 to 2019 at hourly resolution, producing a sparse feature tensor. The prediction module combines a spatiotemporal graph neural network with a multivariate Hawkes process to capture spatial dependencies and self exciting temporal dynamics. Outputs are modeled using a Zero Inflated Negative Binomial distribution, suitable for overdispersed and zero heavy crime counts. The model achieves a validation loss of 0.4800 and a test loss of 0.4857. Patrol allocation is formulated as a fairness constrained linear optimization problem that maximizes risk weighted coverage while enforcing a Demographic Impact Ratio constraint with deviation bounded by 0.05. Across six simulated deployment cycles, fairness remains within 0.9928 to 1.0262, and coverage ranges from 0.876 to 0.936. However, a persistent detection rate gap of approximately 3.5 percentage points remains between minority and non minority areas. This result shows that allocation level fairness constraints alone do not eliminate feedback induced bias in retraining data, highlighting the need for fairness interventions across the full pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 提出FASE框架，结合时空犯罪预测与公平约束巡逻分配，发现仅分配层公平约束无法消除反馈偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测性警务系统仅基于预测风险分配资源，可能因数据偏差放大种族差异，现有方法缺乏对全流程公平性的考虑。
analysis.problem: 如何在预测性警务中同时实现犯罪预测准确性和巡逻分配的公平性，并分析反馈偏差的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 分配层公平约束下，少数族裔与非少数族裔区域间仍存在约3.5个百分点的检测率差距，表明反馈偏差在重训练数据中持续存在。
analysis.method: 构建时空图神经网络与多元霍克斯过程结合的预测模块，输出采用零膨胀负二项分布；巡逻分配建模为公平约束线性优化问题，加入人口影响比约束；并设计闭环部署反馈模拟器。
contributions: 提出FASE框架，整合公平感知的时空预测与巡逻分配。
通过模拟实验揭示仅分配层公平约束不足以消除反馈偏差。
analysis.experiments: 使用巴尔的摩25个邮政编码区2017-2019年139,982起犯罪事件，验证损失0.4800，测试损失0.4857；六次模拟部署中公平性指标在0.9928-1.0262，覆盖率0.876-0.936。
limitations: 仅基于单一城市数据，泛化性待验证。
未考虑其他公平性定义或干预措施。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FASE框架，结合时空犯罪预测与公平约束巡逻分配，发现仅分配层公平约束无法消除反馈偏差。

papers.title: ViPS: Video-informed Pose Spaces for Auto-Rigged Meshes
papers.abstract: Kinematic rigs provide a structured interface for articulating 3D meshes, but they lack an inherent representation of the plausible manifold of joint configurations for a given asset. Without such a pose space, stochastic sampling or manual manipulation of raw rig parameters often leads to semantic or geometric violations, such as anatomical hyperextension and non-physical self-intersections. We propose Video-informed Pose Spaces (ViPS), a feed-forward framework that discovers the latent distribution of valid articulations for auto-rigged meshes by distilling motion priors from a pretrained video diffusion model. Unlike existing methods that rely on scarce artist-authored 4D datasets, ViPS transfers generative video priors into a universal distribution over a given rig parameterization. Differentiable geometric validators applied to the skinned mesh enforce asset-specific validity without requiring manual regularizers. Our model learns a smooth, compact, and controllable pose space that supports diverse sampling, manifold projection for inverse kinematics, and temporally coherent trajectories for keyframing. Furthermore, the distilled 3D pose samples serve as precise semantic proxies for guiding video diffusion, effectively closing the loop between generative 2D priors and structured 3D kinematic control. Our evaluations show that ViPS, trained solely on video priors, matches the performance of state-of-the-art methods trained on synthetic artist-created 4D data in both plausibility and diversity. Most importantly, as a universal model, ViPS demonstrates robust zero-shot generalization to out-of-distribution species and unseen skeletal topologies.

analysis.tldr: ViPS利用视频扩散模型先验为自动绑定网格学习有效姿态空间，无需4D数据即可实现零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 运动学骨架缺乏对有效关节配置流形的内在表示，导致随机采样或手动调整易产生语义或几何违规（如超伸、自交），而现有方法依赖稀缺的艺术家创作4D数据集。
analysis.problem: 如何为自动绑定网格学习一个平滑、紧凑、可控且无需4D数据的有效姿态空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从预训练视频扩散模型中蒸馏运动先验，结合可微几何验证器，学习给定骨架参数化上的通用分布。
contributions: 提出ViPS，一种从视频扩散模型蒸馏运动先验的框架，无需4D数据即可学习有效姿态空间。
可微几何验证器确保资产特定有效性，无需手动正则化。
学到的姿态空间支持多样采样、逆运动学流形投影和时域连贯轨迹，并可作为语义代理引导视频扩散。
analysis.experiments: 在姿态合理性和多样性上，仅用视频先验训练的ViPS匹配了基于合成4D数据的最先进方法，并展示了鲁棒的零样本泛化能力。
limitations: 依赖预训练视频扩散模型的质量和多样性。
可能对极端非刚性变形或复杂拓扑的泛化有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViPS利用视频扩散模型先验为自动绑定网格学习有效姿态空间，无需4D数据即可实现零样本泛化。

papers.title: KnowledgeBerg: Evaluating Systematic Knowledge Coverage and Compositional Reasoning in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Many real-world questions appear deceptively simple yet implicitly demand two capabilities: (i) systematic coverage of a bounded knowledge universe and (ii) compositional set-based reasoning over that universe, a phenomenon we term "the tip of the iceberg." We formalize this challenge through two orthogonal dimensions: knowledge width, the cardinality of the required universe, and reasoning depth, the number of compositional set operations. We introduce KnowledgeBerg, a benchmark of 4,800 multiple-choice questions derived from 1,183 enumeration seeds spanning 10 domains and 17 languages, with universes grounded in authoritative sources to ensure reproducibility. Representative open-source LLMs demonstrate severe limitations, achieving only 5.26-36.88 F1 on universe enumeration and 16.00-44.19 accuracy on knowledge-grounded reasoning. Diagnostic analyses reveal three stages of failure: completeness, or missing knowledge; awareness, or failure to identify requirements; and application, or incorrect reasoning execution. This pattern persists across languages and model scales. Although test-time compute and retrieval augmentation yield measurable gains -- up to 4.35 and 3.78 points, respectively -- substantial gaps remain, exposing limitations in how current LLMs organize structured knowledge and execute compositional reasoning over bounded domains. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/2npc/KnowledgeBerg

analysis.tldr: 提出KnowledgeBerg基准，评估LLM在有限知识宇宙中的系统覆盖与组合推理能力，发现严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 许多现实问题看似简单，实则要求模型系统覆盖有限知识宇宙并进行组合集合推理，现有基准未能充分评估这一能力。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在有限知识宇宙中的系统知识覆盖和组合推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到LLM在枚举和推理任务上表现极差（F1仅5.26-36.88，准确率16.00-44.19），并识别出三种失败模式：完整性缺失、意识缺失和应用错误。
analysis.method: 构建包含4800道多选题的基准，基于1183个枚举种子，覆盖10个领域和17种语言，知识来源权威可复现。
contributions: 形式化定义了知识宽度和推理深度两个正交维度，揭示“冰山一角”现象。
构建了KnowledgeBerg基准，系统评估LLM的知识覆盖与组合推理能力。
通过诊断分析识别出三种失败模式，并验证了测试时计算和检索增强的有限提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个开源LLM上评估，报告了枚举F1和推理准确率，并进行了语言和模型规模的诊断分析。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖10个领域，可能不具完全代表性。
未测试闭源模型或更大规模模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出KnowledgeBerg基准，评估LLM在有限知识宇宙中的系统覆盖与组合推理能力，发现严重不足。

papers.title: Characterizing Model-Native Skills
papers.abstract: Skills are a natural unit for describing what a language model can do and how its behavior can be changed. However, existing characterizations rely on human-written taxonomies, textual descriptions, or manual profiling pipelines--all external hypotheses about what matters that need not align with the model's internal representations. We argue that when the goal is to intervene on model behavior, skill characterization should be *model-native*: grounded in the model's own representations rather than imposed through external ontologies. We instantiate this view by recovering a compact orthogonal basis from sequence-level activations. The resulting basis is semantically interpretable but need not correspond to any predefined human ontology; instead, it captures axes of behavioral variation that the model itself organizes around. We validate this characterization on reasoning post-training, using the recovered basis for both SFT data selection and inference-time steering. We develop lightweight proxy interventions to identify which directions are most useful for a given model. Across Llama3-8B and Qwen2.5-3B, selecting data along those directions improves Pass@1 by up to 20% on MATH and 41% on AMC, outperforming data selection based on human-characterized skills. Because the basis lives in activation space, the same directions also serve as steering vectors at inference time, improving Pass@8 by up to 4.8% on MATH--an intervention that human-characterized skills cannot support. We further validate the characterization on safety alignment, where selecting adversarial training data for model-native skill coverage rather than textual diversity yields more sample-efficient learning. These results suggest that recovering skills from the model's own representations, rather than imposing them externally, provides a more effective foundation for intervening on model behavior. Codes are open-sourced.

analysis.tldr: 从模型内部表征中恢复技能基，比人工定义技能更有效地指导数据选择和推理时干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有技能刻画依赖人工分类或文本描述，这些外部假设可能与模型内部表征不一致，导致干预效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何从模型自身表征中提取与行为变化对齐的、可解释的技能基，并用于数据选择和推理时干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从序列级激活中恢复紧凑正交基，作为模型原生技能表征；基于该基开发轻量代理干预，识别对特定模型最有用的方向，用于SFT数据选择和推理时引导。
contributions: 提出模型原生技能刻画方法，从激活空间恢复正交基，无需外部本体。
在推理后训练和安全对齐中验证该方法：数据选择提升Pass@1达20% (MATH)和41% (AMC)，推理时引导提升Pass@8达4.8% (MATH)。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama3-8B和Qwen2.5-3B上评估，MATH和AMC数据集，对比基于人工技能的数据选择。
limitations: 仅验证了推理和安全对齐场景，其他领域效果未知。
正交基的语义可解释性可能依赖模型规模或架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从模型内部表征中恢复技能基，比人工定义技能更有效地指导数据选择和推理时干预。

papers.title: Provable Coordination for LLM Agents via Message Sequence Charts
papers.abstract: Multi-agent systems built on large language models (LLMs) are difficult to reason about. Coordination errors such as deadlocks or type-mismatched messages are often hard to detect through testing. We introduce a domain-specific language for specifying agent coordination based on message sequence charts (MSCs). The language separates message-passing structure from LLM actions, whose outputs remain unpredictable. We define the syntax and semantics of the language and present a syntax-directed projection that generates deadlock-free local agent programs from global coordination specifications. We illustrate the approach with a diagnosis consensus protocol and show how coordination properties can be established independently of LLM nondeterminism. We also describe a runtime planning extension in which an LLM dynamically generates a coordination workflow for which the same structural guarantees apply. An open-source Python implementation of our framework is available as ZipperGen.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于消息序列图（MSC）的领域特定语言，实现LLM多智能体系统的可证明无死锁协调。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统难以推理，死锁或类型不匹配等协调错误难以通过测试检测，缺乏形式化保证。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM多智能体系统提供可证明的协调正确性（如无死锁），同时保留LLM动作的不可预测性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计基于消息序列图（MSC）的领域特定语言，分离消息传递结构与LLM动作；通过语法导向投影从全局规范生成无死锁的局部智能体程序；并扩展运行时规划，由LLM动态生成具有相同结构保证的协调工作流。
contributions: 提出一种基于MSC的领域特定语言，用于指定LLM多智能体协调，并定义其语法和语义。
给出语法导向投影方法，从全局协调规范生成无死锁的局部智能体程序。
展示协调属性可独立于LLM非确定性建立，并实现运行时规划扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅通过诊断共识协议示例说明，未在复杂任务上验证。
运行时规划扩展的LLM生成工作流质量未评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于消息序列图（MSC）的领域特定语言，实现LLM多智能体系统的可证明无死锁协调。

papers.title: STEP-PD: Stage-Aware and Explainable Parkinson's Disease Severity Classification Using Multimodal Clinical Assessments
papers.abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a progressive disorder in which symptom burden and functional impairment evolve over time, making severity staging essential for clinical monitoring and treatment planning. However, many computational studies emphasize binary PD detection and do not fully use repeated follow-up clinical assessments for stage-aware prediction. This study proposes STEP-PD, a severity-aware machine learning framework to classify PD severity using clinically interpretable boundaries. It leverages all available visits from the Parkinson's Progression Markers Initiative (PPMI) and integrates routinely collected subjective questionnaires and objective clinician-assessed measures. Disease severity is defined using Hoehn and Yahr staging and grouped into three clinically meaningful categories: Healthy, Mild PD (stages 1-2), and Moderate-to-Severe PD (stages 3-5). Three binary classification problems and a three-class severity task were evaluated using stratified cross-validation with imbalance-aware training. To enhance interpretability, SHAP was used to provide global explanations and local patient-level waterfall explanations. Across all tasks, XGBoost achieved the strongest and most stable performance, with accuracies of 95.48% (Healthy vs. Mild), 99.44% (Healthy vs. Moderate-to-Severe), and 96.78% (Mild vs. Moderate-to-Severe), and 94.14% accuracy with 0.8775 Macro-F1 for three-class severity classification. Explainability results highlight a shift from early motor features to progression-related axial and balance impairments. These findings show that multimodal clinical assessments within the PPMI cohort can support accurate and interpretable visit-level PD severity stratification.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于多模态临床评估的帕金森病严重程度分类框架，利用XGBoost和SHAP实现准确且可解释的分期预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 帕金森病是进行性疾病，严重程度分期对临床监测和治疗规划至关重要，但现有计算研究多聚焦于二元检测，未充分利用重复随访评估进行分期感知预测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态临床评估（主观问卷和客观临床评估）实现帕金森病严重程度的准确分类，并提供可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出STEP-PD框架，使用XGBoost分类器，结合SHAP进行全局和局部解释，采用分层交叉验证和类别不平衡训练。
contributions: 提出一个分期感知的机器学习框架，利用所有可用随访数据对帕金森病严重程度进行三分类（健康、轻度、中重度）。
通过SHAP提供可解释性，揭示从早期运动特征到进展期轴向和平衡障碍的转变。
analysis.experiments: 在PPMI数据集上评估，XGBoost在二元分类中准确率95.48%-99.44%，三分类准确率94.14%，Macro-F1为0.8775。
limitations: 依赖PPMI数据集，可能无法泛化到其他人群。
仅使用临床评估，未纳入影像或生物标志物。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于多模态临床评估的帕金森病严重程度分类框架，利用XGBoost和SHAP实现准确且可解释的分期预测。

papers.title: Polarization and Integration in Global AI Research
papers.abstract: The AI race amplifies security risks and international tensions. While the US restricts mobility and knowledge flows, challenges regulatory efforts to protect its advantage, China leads initiatives of global governance. Both strategies depend on cross-country relationships in AI innovation; yet, how this system evolves is unclear. Here, we measure the processes of polarization and integration in the global AI research over three decades by using large-scale data of scientific publications. Comparing cross-country collaboration and citation links to their random realizations, we find that the US and China have long diverged in both dimensions, forming two poles around which global AI research increasingly revolves. While the United Kingdom and Germany have integrated exclusively with the US, many European countries have converged with both poles. Developing and further developed countries, however, only integrate with China, signaling its expanding influence over the international AI research landscape. Our results inform national science policies and efforts toward global AI regulations.

analysis.tldr: 通过大规模科学出版物数据分析，发现全球AI研究呈现中美两极分化，且中国影响力持续扩大。
analysis.research_motivation: AI竞赛加剧了安全风险和国际紧张局势，但全球AI创新体系的演化方向尚不明确，需要量化分析以指导政策制定。
analysis.problem: 量化全球AI研究在合作与引用层面的极化与整合过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中美两国在合作与引用维度上长期分化，形成两极；英国和德国仅与美国整合，许多欧洲国家与两极均整合，而发展中国家仅与中国整合。
analysis.method: 利用大规模科学出版物数据，比较跨国合作与引用链接与其随机实现，测量极化与整合过程。
contributions: 首次量化了三十年来全球AI研究的极化与整合动态
揭示了中美两极格局及中国对发展中国家影响力的扩大
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于出版物数据，未涵盖产业或政策层面的互动
可能受数据源覆盖范围限制
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过大规模科学出版物数据分析，发现全球AI研究呈现中美两极分化，且中国影响力持续扩大。

papers.title: Evolutionary fine tuning of quantized convolution-based deep learning models
papers.abstract: Deep learning models are the most efficient models in many machine learning tasks. The main disadvantage when using them in IoT, mobile devices, independent autonomous or real-time systems is their complexity and memory size. Therefore, much research has concentrated on compression techniques of deep learning architectures. One of the most popular technique is quantization. In most of the works, the quantization is done based on the nearest neighbour quantization technique. This work focuses on improving the quantization efficiency in pretrained and quantized models. This approach has the potential to improve the final accuracy of quantized models. The main postulate of the work is that final quantization states of the network based on nearest neighbour rounding does not guarantee optimal accuracy. In the presented work, the evolution strategy is used as an optimization approach. The evolution in each iteration changes the values of the small percentage of weights. It shifts theirs values to different quantization states. The work shows that proposed evolution with an appropriate set of operators and parameters can fast improve the accuracy of the quantized models. The results are presented for popular architectures such as VGG and Resnet for image classification and detection. Additionally, simulations were carried out for the autoencoder architecture.

analysis.tldr: 提出用进化策略优化量化后深度学习模型的权重分配，提升精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在IoT、移动设备等场景中受限于复杂度和内存，量化是常用压缩技术，但基于最近邻的量化方法可能不是最优的，需要进一步提升量化模型的精度。
analysis.problem: 如何优化预训练量化模型中权重的量化状态分配，以提升模型精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基于最近邻舍入的最终量化状态不能保证最优精度，进化策略可以快速改善量化模型的精度。
analysis.method: 使用进化策略，每次迭代改变一小部分权重的值，将其转移到不同的量化状态，通过合适的算子与参数设置优化量化模型精度。
contributions: 提出一种基于进化策略的量化后微调方法，可提升量化模型精度。
在VGG、ResNet等图像分类检测架构以及自编码器上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在VGG、ResNet等图像分类检测架构以及自编码器上进行了仿真实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 进化策略的计算开销可能较大，未与现有量化微调方法进行详细比较。
实验仅在图像任务上验证，未涉及其他模态或更大规模模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出用进化策略优化量化后深度学习模型的权重分配，提升精度。

papers.title: Terminal Wrench: A Dataset of 331 Reward-Hackable Environments and 3,632 Exploit Trajectories
papers.abstract: We release Terminal Wrench, a subset of 331 terminal-agent benchmark environments, copied from the popular open benchmarks that are demonstrably reward-hackable. The data set includes 3,632 hack trajectories and 2,352 legitimate baseline trajectories across three frontier models (Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4). Each entry preserves the original task definition alongside full attack trajectories that show how the verifier was bypassed. It also includes cases where the task was not solved as intended. The tasks span system administration, machine learning, software engineering, and security challenges; the exploits range from simple output spoofing to stack-frame introspection, standard-library patching, and rootkit-style binary hijacking. Crucially, these exploits are specific to each task, rather than the evaluation harness, making them harder to patch. We also present a monitorability study in which hack trajectories are sanitized or stripped of reasoning traces and then scored by an LLM judge, showing that detection degrades meaningfully when chain-of-thought is removed (AUC drops from 0.97 to 0.92). The data set is publicly available at https://github.com/few-sh/terminal-wrench.

analysis.tldr: 发布一个包含331个可奖励破解环境的终端Agent基准数据集，包含3632条破解轨迹，并发现移除思维链会显著降低破解检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有终端Agent基准环境存在奖励破解漏洞，但缺乏系统性的数据集来研究这些漏洞及其检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个包含可奖励破解环境及其破解轨迹的数据集，并评估破解检测的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到破解轨迹中移除思维链会导致LLM裁判的检测性能下降（AUC从0.97降至0.92），表明推理痕迹对检测至关重要。
analysis.method: 从流行开源基准中复制并筛选出331个可奖励破解的终端环境，收集前沿模型的破解轨迹和合法轨迹，并进行监控性研究（LLM裁判评分）。
contributions: 发布了Terminal Wrench数据集，包含331个可奖励破解环境和3632条破解轨迹。
通过监控性研究揭示了移除思维链会显著降低破解检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及监控性研究中AUC从0.97降至0.92。
limitations: 数据集仅来自三个前沿模型，可能不覆盖所有模型类型。
监控性研究仅使用LLM裁判，未涉及其他检测方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发布一个包含331个可奖励破解环境的终端Agent基准数据集，包含3632条破解轨迹，并发现移除思维链会显著降低破解检测性能。

papers.title: AIRA: AI-Induced Risk Audit: A Structured Inspection Framework for AI-Generated Code
papers.abstract: Practitioners have reported a directional pattern in AI-assisted code generation: AI-generated code tends to fail quietly, preserving the appearance of functionality while degrading or concealing guarantees. This paper introduces the Reward-Shaped Failure Hypothesis - the proposal that this pattern may reflect an artifact of optimization through human feedback rather than a random distribution of bugs. We define failure truthfulness as the property that a system's observable outputs accurately represent its internal success or failure state. We then present AIRA (AI-Induced Risk Audit), a deterministic 15-check inspection framework designed to detect failure-untruthful patterns in code. We report results from three studies: (1) an anonymized enterprise environment audit, (2) a balanced 600-file public corpus pilot, and (3) a strict matched-control replication comparing 955 AI-attributed files against 955 human-control files. In the final replication, AI-attributed files show 0.435 high-severity findings per file versus 0.242 in human controls (1.80x). The effect is consistent across JavaScript, Python, and TypeScript, with strongest concentration in exception-handling-related patterns. These findings are consistent with a directional skew toward fail-soft behavior in AI-assisted code. AIRA is designed for governance, compliance, and safety-critical systems where fail-closed behavior is required.

analysis.tldr: 提出AIRA框架检测AI生成代码的“失败不诚实”模式，发现AI代码比人类代码有更多高严重性缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成代码在实践中表现出“安静失败”的倾向，即表面功能正常但实际隐藏或削弱了保证，这种模式可能源于人类反馈优化的副作用，对安全关键系统构成风险。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地检测AI生成代码中“失败不诚实”的模式，即代码输出未能准确反映其内部失败状态。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要提出“奖励塑造失败假设”，认为AI代码的安静失败模式可能是人类反馈优化的产物，而非随机分布的错误。
analysis.method: 提出AIRA（AI诱导风险审计），一个包含15项确定性检查的框架，用于检测代码中的失败不诚实模式。
contributions: 提出奖励塑造失败假设，解释AI生成代码的安静失败模式。
定义失败诚实性概念，并开发AIRA框架进行结构化审计。
通过三项研究（企业环境、公共语料、匹配对照复制）验证AI代码中高严重性缺陷比例更高。
analysis.experiments: 三项研究：企业环境审计、600文件公共语料试点、955对955匹配对照复制。在复制研究中，AI属性文件每文件0.435个高严重性发现，人类控制文件0.242个（1.80倍），效果在JavaScript、Python、TypeScript中一致，异常处理相关模式最集中。
limitations: 框架仅针对代码的失败诚实性，可能无法覆盖其他安全或质量维度。
研究基于特定AI辅助工具，结果可能不泛化到其他模型或设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AIRA框架检测AI生成代码的“失败不诚实”模式，发现AI代码比人类代码有更多高严重性缺陷。

papers.title: DGSSM: Diffusion guided state-space models for multimodal salient object detection
papers.abstract: Salient object detection (SOD) requires modeling both long-range contextual dependencies and fine-grained structural details, which remains challenging for convolutional, transformer-based, and Mamba-based state space models. While recent Mamba-based state space approaches enable efficient global reasoning, they often struggle to recover precise object boundaries. In contrast, diffusion models capture strong structural priors through iterative denoising, but their use in discriminative dense prediction is still limited due to computational cost and integration challenges. In this work, we propose DGSSM, a diffusion-guided state space (Mamba) framework that formulates multimodal salient object detection as a progressive denoising process. The framework integrates diffusion structural priors with multi-scale state space encoding, adaptive saliency prompting, and an iterative Mamba diffusion refinement mechanism to improve boundary accuracy. A boundary-aware refinement head and self-distillation strategy further enhance spatial coherence and feature consistency. Extensive experiments on 13 public benchmarks across RGB, RGB-D, and RGB-T settings demonstrate that DGSSM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across multiple evaluation metrics while maintaining a compact model size. These results suggest that diffusion-guided state space modeling is an effective and generalizable paradigm for multimodal dense prediction tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散引导的状态空间模型DGSSM，将多模态显著目标检测建模为渐进去噪过程，在13个基准上超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有SOD方法（CNN、Transformer、Mamba）难以同时建模长程依赖和精细边界，扩散模型虽有结构先验但计算成本高且难以集成到判别式任务中。
analysis.problem: 如何高效融合扩散模型的结构先验与状态空间模型的全局推理能力，提升多模态显著目标检测的边界精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Mamba类方法全局推理高效但边界恢复差，扩散模型结构先验强但计算成本高、集成困难。
analysis.method: 提出DGSSM框架，包含扩散结构先验、多尺度状态空间编码、自适应显著提示、迭代Mamba扩散精炼机制、边界感知精炼头和自蒸馏策略。
contributions: 提出扩散引导的状态空间框架，将SOD建模为渐进去噪过程。
设计迭代Mamba扩散精炼机制和边界感知精炼头，提升边界精度。
在13个RGB/RGB-D/RGB-T基准上超越SOTA，模型紧凑。
analysis.experiments: 在13个公开基准（RGB、RGB-D、RGB-T）上评估，多个指标超越SOTA，模型尺寸紧凑。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算效率的具体分析。
可能对极端遮挡或低对比度场景的泛化性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散引导的状态空间模型DGSSM，将多模态显著目标检测建模为渐进去噪过程，在13个基准上超越SOTA。

papers.title: DIRCR: Dual-Inference Rule-Contrastive Reasoning for Solving RAVENs
papers.abstract: Abstract visual reasoning remains challenging as existing methods often prioritize either global context or local row-wise relations, failing to integrate both, and lack intermediate feature constraints, leading to incomplete rule capture and entangled representations. To address these issues, we propose the Dual-Inference Rule-Contrastive Reasoning (DIRCR) model. Its core component, the Dual-Inference Reasoning Module, combines a local path for row-wise analogical reasoning and a global path for holistic inference, integrated via a gated attention mechanism. Additionally, a Rule-Contrastive Learning Module introduces pseudo-labels to construct positive and negative rule samples, applying contrastive learning to enhance feature separability and promote abstract, transferable rule learning. Experimental results on three RAVEN datasets demonstrate that DIRCR significantly enhances reasoning robustness and generalization. Codes are available at https://github.com/csZack-Zhang/DIRCR.

analysis.tldr: 提出双推理规则对比推理模型，结合局部与全局推理及对比学习，提升RAVEN抽象视觉推理的鲁棒性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有抽象视觉推理方法要么侧重全局上下文，要么侧重局部行间关系，未能有效整合两者，且缺乏中间特征约束，导致规则捕获不完整、表征纠缠。
analysis.problem: 如何同时利用局部类比推理和全局整体推理，并通过对比学习增强规则特征的可分离性，以提升RAVEN类任务的推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DIRCR模型，包含双推理模块（局部行类比路径+全局整体路径，通过门控注意力融合）和规则对比学习模块（利用伪标签构造正负规则样本进行对比学习）。
contributions: 提出双推理机制，融合局部行类比推理与全局整体推理。
引入规则对比学习，增强特征可分离性和抽象规则学习能力。
analysis.experiments: 在三个RAVEN数据集上实验，DIRCR显著提升了推理鲁棒性和泛化性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖伪标签质量，噪声标签影响对比学习效果。
门控注意力融合机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双推理规则对比推理模型，结合局部与全局推理及对比学习，提升RAVEN抽象视觉推理的鲁棒性和泛化性。

papers.title: Intervention-Aware Multiscale Representation Learning from Imaging Phenomics and Perturbation Transcriptomics
papers.abstract: Microscopy-based phenotypic profiling is scalable for drug discovery but lacks the mechanistic depth of transcriptomics, which remains costly and scarce. Existing multimodal approaches either use images to support other modalities or naively align representations by sample identity, ignoring cell-type and dose variations in weakly paired data-limiting generalization to unseen interventions. In this paper, we introduce an intervention-aware distillation framework that leverages perturbational transcriptomics to guide image representation learning. A transcriptome-conditioned teacher integrates gene expression and intervention metadata to produce soft distributions over a chemistry-aware codebook organized by drug similarity. The teacher employs a fine-tuned single-cell foundation model to encode cell-type context and disentangle dose effects. An image-only student learns to predict these distributions from microscopy alone, distilling mechanistic knowledge while operating independently at test time. This design emphasizes intervention semantics rather than identity alignment and explicitly handles dose and cell-type mismatches. We provide theoretical guarantees showing that transcriptomic guidance tightens the risk bound for image-based prediction. On Cell Painting and RxRx datasets paired with L1000, our method significantly improves one-shot transfer to unseen interventions and drug-target gene discovery compared to self-supervised and alignment baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出干预感知多尺度表征学习框架，利用扰动转录组学指导显微镜图像表征，提升对未见干预的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于显微镜的表型分析可扩展性强但缺乏转录组学的机制深度，而转录组学成本高且数据稀缺；现有多模态方法忽略细胞类型和剂量变化，泛化能力有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限的扰动转录组学数据指导显微镜图像表征学习，使其能够泛化到未见过的干预措施，并处理细胞类型和剂量不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出干预感知蒸馏框架：转录组条件教师模型整合基因表达和干预元数据，利用化学感知码本生成软分布；学生模型仅从显微镜图像学习预测这些分布，蒸馏机制知识。
contributions: 提出干预感知蒸馏框架，利用转录组学指导图像表征学习，处理弱配对数据中的细胞类型和剂量变化。
提供理论保证，证明转录组学指导可收紧图像预测的风险界。
在Cell Painting和RxRx数据集上，相比自监督和对齐基线，显著提升对未见干预的一次性迁移和药物靶点基因发现。
analysis.experiments: 在Cell Painting和RxRx数据集上，与L1000配对，评估一次性迁移到未见干预和药物靶点基因发现任务。
limitations: 依赖预训练的转录组基础模型，可能引入领域偏差。
仅适用于具有配对转录组数据的场景，数据获取仍有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出干预感知多尺度表征学习框架，利用扰动转录组学指导显微镜图像表征，提升对未见干预的泛化能力。

papers.title: How Much Data is Enough? The Zeta Law of Discoverability in Biomedical Data, featuring the enigmatic Riemann zeta function
papers.abstract: How much data is enough to make a scientific discovery? As biomedical datasets scale to millions of samples and AI models grow in capacity, progress increasingly depends on predicting when additional data will substantially improve performance. In practice, model development often relies on empirical scaling curves measured across architectures, modalities, and dataset sizes, with limited theoretical guidance on when performance should improve, saturate, or exhibit cross-over behavior. We propose a scaling-law framework for cross-modal discoverability based on spectral structure of data covariance operators, task-aligned signal projections, and learned representations. Many performance metrics, including AUC, can be expressed in terms of cumulative signal-to-noise energy accumulated across identifiable spectral modes of an encoder and cross-modal operator. Under mild assumptions, this accumulation follows a zeta-like scaling law governed by power-law decay of covariance spectra and aligned signal energy, leading naturally to the appearance of the Riemann zeta function. Representation learning methods such as sparse models, low-rank embeddings, and multimodal contrastive objectives improve sample efficiency by concentrating useful signal into earlier stable modes, effectively steepening spectral decay and shifting scaling curves. The framework predicts cross-over regimes in which simpler models perform best at small sample sizes, while higher-capacity or multimodal encoders outperform them once sufficient data stabilizes additional degrees of freedom. Applications include multimodal disease classification, imaging genetics, functional MRI, and topological data analysis. The resulting zeta law provides a principled way to anticipate when scaling data, improving representations, or adding modalities is most likely to accelerate discovery.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于协方差谱和黎曼ζ函数的生物医学数据可发现性缩放定律，预测数据量、表征与模态对性能的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物医学数据集规模激增，但缺乏理论指导来预测何时增加数据能显著提升性能，现有方法依赖经验缩放曲线。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上预测跨模态可发现性随数据量、表征方法和模态变化的缩放行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论框架预测了交叉区域：小样本下简单模型最优，大样本下高容量或多模态模型更优。
analysis.method: 基于数据协方差算子的谱结构、任务对齐信号投影和学习表征，将AUC等性能指标表示为跨模态编码器可识别谱模式上的累积信噪比能量，推导出ζ函数形式的缩放定律。
contributions: 提出基于谱理论的跨模态可发现性缩放定律框架，自然引入黎曼ζ函数。
理论预测表征学习方法（稀疏模型、低秩嵌入、多模态对比学习）通过集中信号到早期稳定模式来提升样本效率。
预测交叉区域行为：小样本下简单模型最优，大样本下高容量模型更优。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架依赖协方差谱的幂律衰减假设，实际数据可能偏离。
未给出具体实验验证或数值模拟结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于协方差谱和黎曼ζ函数的生物医学数据可发现性缩放定律，预测数据量、表征与模态对性能的影响。

papers.title: Beyond Static Snapshots: A Grounded Evaluation Framework for Language Models at the Agentic Frontier
papers.abstract: We argue that current evaluation frameworks for large language models (LLMs) suffer from four systematic failures that make them structurally inadequate for deployed, agentic systems: distributional, temporal, scope, and process invalidity. These failures compound in RLHF, making reward hacking a predictable consequence of evaluation design rather than an unpredictable training pathology, and RLHF's dual-model architecture imposes a hardware barrier limiting evaluation reproducibility. We propose the Grounded Continuous Evaluation (GCE) framework and present ISOPro as a reference implementation. ISOPro replaces the learned reward model with a deterministic verifier, eliminating reward hacking by construction in verifiable-reward domains, and updates LoRA adapters on CPU, reducing the hardware barrier by an order of magnitude. We validate ISOPro across three architectures (Qwen 2.5 3B, Llama 3.2 3B, Gemma 2 2B) and two domains (scheduling, MBPP), with a head-to-head matched-compute comparison against GRPO-LoRA. Across twelve cells, ISOPro produces the largest absolute capability gains (+25.6, +22.2, +16.0pp) at mean delta +9.0pp and worst-case regression -5.6pp; GRPO-LoRA at consumer-budget hyperparameters reaches a smaller peak gain (+8.5pp), deeper worst-case regression (-10pp), and mean delta -1.5pp. Held-out compositional generalization on MBPP reaches 40% for ISOPro on two of three architectures (including a 0% to 40% bootstrap on Qwen 2.5 3B), against 20% for GRPO-LoRA on one of three. We characterize a buffer-skew failure mode in which the implicit curriculum can erode pre-existing tier capability under three preconditions, with three corresponding mitigations. The work is situated alongside DeepSeek-R1's GRPO, which arrived at the same architectural conclusion at scale: for verifiable-reward domains, the verifier is the reward signal.

analysis.tldr: 提出GCE评估框架和ISOPro实现，通过确定性验证器替代学习奖励模型消除奖励黑客，在调度和MBPP任务上显著优于GRPO-LoRA。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM评估框架存在分布、时间、范围和过程四类系统性失效，导致RLHF中奖励黑客成为可预测结果，且双模型架构带来硬件壁垒，阻碍评估可复现性。
analysis.problem: 现有评估框架无法有效评估部署中的智能体系统，RLHF的奖励黑客问题源于评估设计缺陷，且硬件成本高。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: RLHF的奖励黑客是评估设计的可预测结果而非不可预测的训练病理；GRPO-LoRA在消费级超参数下出现更深的性能回退；ISOPro在可验证奖励域中通过确定性验证器消除奖励黑客。
analysis.method: 提出Grounded Continuous Evaluation (GCE)框架，并实现ISOPro：用确定性验证器替代学习奖励模型，在CPU上更新LoRA适配器，大幅降低硬件门槛。
contributions: 系统诊断当前LLM评估框架的四类失效（分布、时间、范围、过程），指出奖励黑客是评估设计的可预测结果。
提出GCE框架和ISOPro实现，通过确定性验证器消除奖励黑客，并在CPU上更新LoRA降低硬件成本。
在三个架构和两个域上验证ISOPro，相比GRPO-LoRA取得平均+9.0pp增益，且最差回退更小。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen 2.5 3B、Llama 3.2 3B、Gemma 2 2B三个架构和调度、MBPP两个域上，与GRPO-LoRA进行匹配计算对比，ISOPro在12个实验单元中最大增益+25.6pp，平均+9.0pp，最差回退-5.6pp；GRPO-LoRA峰值+8.5pp，平均-1.5pp，最差回退-10pp。
limitations: ISOPro仅适用于可验证奖励域，对开放域任务可能不适用。
实验规模较小（3B参数模型），在更大模型上的效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GCE评估框架和ISOPro实现，通过确定性验证器替代学习奖励模型消除奖励黑客，在调度和MBPP任务上显著优于GRPO-LoRA。

papers.title: PBSBench: A Multi-Level Vision-Language Framework and Benchmark for Hematopathology Whole Slide Image Interpretation
papers.abstract: Peripheral Blood Smear (PBS) is a critical microscopic examination in hematopathology that yields whole-slide imaging (WSI). Unlike solid tissue pathology, PBS interpretation focuses on individual cell morphologies rather than tissue architecture, making it distinct in both visual characteristics and diagnostic reasoning. However, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for pathology are primarily developed on solid-tissue WSIs and struggle to generalize to PBS. To bridge this gap, we construct PBSInstr, the first vision-language dataset for PBS interpretation, comprising 353 PBS WSIs paired with microscopic impression paragraphs and 29k cell-level image crops annotated with cell type labels and morphological descriptions. To facilitate instruction tuning, PBSInstr further includes 27k question-answer (QA) pairs for cell crops and 1,286 QA pairs for PBS slides. Building upon PBSInstr, we develop PBS-VL, a hematopathology-tailored vision-language model for multi-level PBS interpretation at both cell and slide levels. To comprehensively evaluate PBS understanding, we construct PBSBench, a visual question answering (VQA) benchmark featuring four question categories and six PBS interpretation tasks. Experiments show that PBS-VL outperforms existing general-purpose and pathology MLLMs, underscoring the value of PBS-specific data. We release our code, datasets, and model weights to facilitate future research. Our proposed framework lays the foundation for developing practical AI assistants supporting decision-making in hematopathology.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对外周血涂片WSI的多级视觉语言框架与基准，构建专用数据集PBSInstr和模型PBS-VL，在细胞和切片两级解释中优于现有病理MLLM。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有病理多模态大模型主要基于实体组织WSI开发，难以泛化到外周血涂片（PBS）解释，而PBS在视觉特征和诊断推理上与实体组织病理有本质区别，缺乏专用数据集和模型。
analysis.problem: 解决外周血涂片全切片图像的多级（细胞级和切片级）视觉语言理解问题，包括数据集缺失和模型泛化能力不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建PBSInstr数据集（含353张PBS WSI、29k细胞级图像及QA对），基于此微调得到PBS-VL模型，并在PBSBench基准上评估。
contributions: 构建了首个PBS解释专用视觉语言数据集PBSInstr，包含多级标注和QA对。
开发了面向血液病理学的多级视觉语言模型PBS-VL，在细胞和切片两级实现PBS解释。
建立了PBSBench基准，涵盖四类问题和六项任务，用于全面评估PBS理解能力。
analysis.experiments: 在PBSBench上评估，PBS-VL优于现有通用和病理MLLM，验证了PBS专用数据的价值。
limitations: 数据集规模相对较小（353张WSI），可能限制模型泛化性。
仅针对PBS，未验证在其他血液病理任务上的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对外周血涂片WSI的多级视觉语言框架与基准，构建专用数据集PBSInstr和模型PBS-VL，在细胞和切片两级解释中优于现有病理MLLM。

papers.title: Multi-Camera Self-Calibration in Sports Motion Capture: Leveraging Human and Stick Poses
papers.abstract: Multi-camera systems are widely employed in sports to capture the 3D motion of athletes and equipment, yet calibrating their extrinsic parameters remains costly and labor-intensive. We introduce an efficient, tool-free method for multi-camera extrinsic calibration tailored to sports involving stick-like implements (e.g., golf clubs, bats, hockey sticks). Our approach jointly exploits two complementary cues from synchronized multi-camera videos: (i) human body keypoints with unknown metric scale and (ii) a rigid stick-like implement of known length. We formulate a three-stage optimization pipeline that refines camera extrinsics, reconstructs human and stick trajectories, and resolves global scale via the stick-length constraint. Our method achieves accurate extrinsic calibration without dedicated calibration tools. To benchmark this task, we present the first dataset for multi-camera self-calibration in stick-based sports, consisting of synthetic sequences across four sports categories with 3 to 10 cameras. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method delivers SOTA performance, achieving low rotation and translation errors. Our project page: https://fandulu.github.io/sport_stick_multi_cam_calib/.

analysis.tldr: 利用人体关键点和已知长度的刚性杆状物实现多相机自标定，无需专用工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 多相机系统在体育动作捕捉中广泛使用，但外参标定成本高、劳动密集，现有方法需要专用标定工具或繁琐流程。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用专用标定工具的情况下，仅从同步多相机视频中高效准确地标定相机外参。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三阶段优化流程：联合利用人体关键点（未知尺度）和已知长度的刚性杆状物（如球杆）作为互补线索，逐步优化相机外参、重建人体和杆状物轨迹，并通过杆长约束解析全局尺度。
contributions: 提出一种无需专用工具的多相机外参自标定方法，适用于杆状运动项目。
构建首个用于杆状运动多相机自标定的合成数据集，涵盖4类运动、3-10个相机视角。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据集上进行了全面实验，方法达到SOTA性能，旋转和平移误差低。
limitations: 依赖已知长度的刚性杆状物，不适用于无此类物体的场景。
合成数据集可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用人体关键点和已知长度的刚性杆状物实现多相机自标定，无需专用工具。

papers.title: UniGeo: Unifying Geometric Guidance for Camera-Controllable Image Editing via Video Models
papers.abstract: Camera-controllable image editing aims to synthesize novel views of a given scene under varying camera poses while strictly preserving cross-view geometric consistency. However, existing methods typically rely on fragmented geometric guidance, such as only injecting point clouds at the representation level despite models containing multiple levels, and are mainly based on image diffusion models that operate on discrete view mappings. These two limitations jointly lead to geometric drift and structural degradation under continuous camera motion. We observe that while leveraging video models provides continuous viewpoint priors for camera-controllable image editing, they still struggle to form stable geometric understanding if geometric guidance remains fragmented. To systematically address this, we inject unified geometric guidance across three levels that jointly determine the generative output: representation, architecture, and loss function. To this end, we propose UniGeo, a novel camera-controllable editing framework. Specifically, at the representation level, UniGeo incorporates a frame-decoupled geometric reference injection mechanism to provide robust cross-view geometry context. At the architecture level, it introduces geometric anchor attention to align multi-view features. At the loss function level, it proposes a trajectory-endpoint geometric supervision strategy to explicitly reinforce the structural fidelity of target views. Comprehensive experiments across multiple public benchmarks, encompassing both extensive and limited camera motion settings, demonstrate that UniGeo significantly outperforms existing methods in both visual quality and geometric consistency.

analysis.tldr: UniGeo通过三级统一几何引导（表征、架构、损失函数）实现相机可控图像编辑，显著提升几何一致性与视觉质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相机可控图像编辑方法依赖碎片化几何引导（如仅在表征层注入点云），且基于图像扩散模型处理离散视角映射，导致连续相机运动下出现几何漂移和结构退化。
analysis.problem: 如何为相机可控图像编辑提供统一、多层次的几何引导，以在连续视角变化中保持跨视图几何一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：即使利用视频模型提供连续视角先验，若几何引导仍碎片化，模型难以形成稳定的几何理解。
analysis.method: 提出UniGeo框架，在三个层面注入统一几何引导：表征层（帧解耦几何参考注入）、架构层（几何锚点注意力）、损失函数层（轨迹端点几何监督）。
contributions: 首次提出三级统一几何引导策略，系统解决相机可控图像编辑中的几何一致性问题。
设计帧解耦几何参考注入、几何锚点注意力和轨迹端点几何监督三个创新模块。
analysis.experiments: 在多个公开基准上，涵盖大范围和小范围相机运动设置，UniGeo在视觉质量和几何一致性上显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量几何参考帧，对输入噪声敏感。
三级引导增加计算开销，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniGeo通过三级统一几何引导（表征、架构、损失函数）实现相机可控图像编辑，显著提升几何一致性与视觉质量。

papers.title: SafeAgent: A Runtime Protection Architecture for Agentic Systems
papers.abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are vulnerable to prompt-injection attacks that propagate through multi-step workflows, tool interactions, and persistent context, making input-output filtering alone insufficient for reliable protection. This paper presents SafeAgent, a runtime security architecture that treats agent safety as a stateful decision problem over evolving interaction trajectories. The proposed design separates execution governance from semantic risk reasoning through two coordinated components: a runtime controller that mediates actions around the agent loop and a context-aware decision core that operates over persistent session state. The core is formalized as a context-aware advanced machine intelligence and instantiated through operators for risk encoding, utility-cost evaluation, consequence modeling, policy arbitration, and state synchronization. Experiments on Agent Security Bench (ASB) and InjecAgent show that SafeAgent consistently improves robustness over baseline and text-level guardrail methods while maintaining competitive benign-task performance. Ablation studies further show that recovery confidence and policy weighting determine distinct safety-utility operating points.

analysis.tldr: SafeAgent 提出运行时安全架构，通过分离执行治理与语义风险推理来防御针对 LLM Agent 的提示注入攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent 易受提示注入攻击，且攻击可通过多步工作流、工具交互和持久上下文传播，仅靠输入输出过滤不足以提供可靠保护。
analysis.problem: 如何为 LLM Agent 设计运行时安全架构，使其能防御传播性提示注入攻击，同时保持良性任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SafeAgent 包含两个协调组件：运行时控制器（在 Agent 循环中仲裁动作）和上下文感知决策核心（基于持久会话状态进行风险推理）。决策核心形式化为上下文感知高级机器智能，通过风险编码、效用-成本评估、后果建模、策略仲裁和状态同步等算子实例化。
contributions: 提出将 Agent 安全视为状态化决策问题的运行时安全架构。
设计分离执行治理与语义风险推理的双组件系统，并在 ASB 和 InjecAgent 基准上验证其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Agent Security Bench (ASB) 和 InjecAgent 上实验，SafeAgent 持续优于基线和文本级护栏方法，同时保持良性任务性能；消融研究表明恢复置信度和策略权重决定安全-效用权衡点。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的风险编码和策略仲裁设计。
未讨论对大规模多 Agent 系统的可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SafeAgent 提出运行时安全架构，通过分离执行治理与语义风险推理来防御针对 LLM Agent 的提示注入攻击。

papers.title: Causal-Temporal Event Graphs: A Formal Model for Recursive Agent Execution Traces
papers.abstract: We introduce causal-temporal event graphs (CTEGs) as a formal model for fully resolved recursive agent execution records under single-parenthood causal semantics. We formalise direct event emissions and recursive subagent invocations as extension procedures on generic typed temporal graphs and show that the recursive closure $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ of the induced maximal dynamics starting from single causal roots consists entirely of finite sequences of CTEGs. A CTEG is a rooted arborescence whose nodes carry timestamps and event types, subject to the constraint that timestamps be strictly increasing along causal paths. We realise $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ as the increasing union of a recursive hierarchy $\mathscr{E}_0 \subseteq \mathscr{E}_1 \subseteq \cdots$ of agent execution levels parametrised by recursion depth, which is recognised as the ascending Kleene chain of a monotone operator $\varphi$ admitting $\mathscr{E}_\infty$ as its least fixed point. Although the introduction of the full hierarchy is natural, stabilisation occurs already at $\mathscr{E}_1$ if one insists that the internal construction of a subagent execution trace be a delegated and opaque computational unit. The CTEG formalism supports compositional construction of globally well-formed execution traces from local agent behaviour without centralised coordination, preserves well-formedness under partial execution failure, and admits a natural relational database encoding. The arborescent structure of CTEGs is further compatible with cryptographic Merkle tree commitments for tamper-evident session verification.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果-时间事件图（CTEG）作为递归智能体执行轨迹的形式化模型，并证明其递归闭包是有限序列的递增并集。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体系统执行轨迹的递归性和因果依赖性需要严格的形式化模型，以支持组合构建、故障容错和可验证性。
analysis.problem: 如何形式化地建模递归智能体执行轨迹，确保因果一致性、组合性和可验证性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义因果-时间事件图（CTEG）为带时间戳和事件类型的根树，通过单调算子的最小不动点构建递归层次，并证明在子代理执行视为黑盒时稳定于第一层。
contributions: 提出CTEG作为递归智能体执行轨迹的形式化模型，具有严格因果语义。
证明递归闭包是有限CTEG序列的递增并集，并给出层次化构造。
展示CTEG支持组合构建、部分故障容错和关系数据库编码，且与Merkle树兼容。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 模型假设单亲因果语义，可能不适用于多因果源场景。
未讨论实际智能体系统的实现复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果-时间事件图（CTEG）作为递归智能体执行轨迹的形式化模型，并证明其递归闭包是有限序列的递增并集。

papers.title: CoSearch: Joint Training of Reasoning and Document Ranking via Reinforcement Learning for Agentic Search
papers.abstract: Agentic search -- the task of training agents that iteratively reason, issue queries, and synthesize retrieved information to answer complex questions -- has achieved remarkable progress through reinforcement learning (RL). However, existing approaches such as Search-R1, treat the retrieval system as a fixed tool, optimizing only the reasoning agent while the retrieval component remains unchanged. A preliminary experiment reveals that the gap between an oracle and a fixed retrieval system reaches up to +26.8% relative F1 improvement across seven QA benchmarks, suggesting that the retrieval system is a key bottleneck in scaling agentic search performance. Motivated by this finding, we propose CoSearch, a framework that jointly trains a multi-step reasoning agent and a generative document ranking model via Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). To enable effective GRPO training for the ranker -- whose inputs vary across reasoning trajectories -- we introduce a semantic grouping strategy that clusters sub-queries by token-level similarity, forming valid optimization groups without additional rollouts. We further design a composite reward combining ranking quality signals with trajectory-level outcome feedback, providing the ranker with both immediate and long-term learning signals. Experiments on seven single-hop and multi-hop QA benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, with ablation studies validating each design choice.
