Our results show that joint training of the reasoning agent and retrieval system is both feasible and strongly performant, pointing to a key ingredient for future search agents.

analysis.tldr: CoSearch通过强化学习联合训练推理Agent和文档排序器，显著提升Agentic搜索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agentic搜索方法将检索系统视为固定工具，仅优化推理Agent，导致检索成为性能瓶颈（实验显示固定检索与Oracle差距达+26.8% F1）。
analysis.problem: 如何通过强化学习联合优化多步推理Agent和生成式文档排序器，以突破检索瓶颈并提升Agentic搜索的整体性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 初步实验发现，固定检索系统与Oracle检索之间的相对F1差距高达26.8%，表明检索系统是Agentic搜索性能扩展的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出CoSearch框架，使用GRPO联合训练推理Agent和文档排序器；引入语义分组策略处理排序器输入多样性；设计复合奖励函数结合排序质量信号和轨迹级结果反馈。
contributions: 首次通过GRPO联合训练推理Agent和文档排序器，验证了联合训练的可行性和有效性。
提出语义分组策略，使GRPO能有效应用于输入轨迹不同的排序器。
设计复合奖励函数，为排序器提供即时和长期学习信号。
analysis.experiments: 在7个单跳和多跳QA基准上，CoSearch一致优于强基线，消融实验验证了各设计选择的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定奖励函数设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
语义分组策略的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoSearch通过强化学习联合训练推理Agent和文档排序器，显著提升Agentic搜索性能。

papers.title: SVL: Goal-Conditioned Reinforcement Learning as Survival Learning
papers.abstract: Standard approaches to goal-conditioned reinforcement learning (GCRL) that rely on temporal-difference learning can be unstable and sample-inefficient due to bootstrapping. While recent work has explored contrastive and supervised formulations to improve stability, we present a probabilistic alternative, called survival value learning (SVL), that reframes GCRL as a survival learning problem by modeling the time-to-goal from each state as a probability distribution. This structured distributional Monte Carlo perspective yields a closed-form identity that expresses the goal-conditioned value function as a discounted sum of survival probabilities, enabling value estimation via a hazard model trained via maximum likelihood on both event and right-censored trajectories. We introduce three practical value estimators, including finite-horizon truncation and two binned infinite-horizon approximations to capture long-horizon objectives. Experiments on offline GCRL benchmarks show that SVL combined with hierarchical actors matches or surpasses strong hierarchical TD and Monte Carlo baselines, excelling on complex, long-horizon tasks.

analysis.tldr: 将目标条件强化学习重新定义为生存学习问题，通过建模到达目标的时间分布来提升样本效率与稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准GCRL方法依赖时序差分学习，存在自举导致的不稳定和样本效率低的问题；现有对比/监督方法虽改善了稳定性，但仍有改进空间。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖自举的情况下，稳定且高效地估计目标条件价值函数，以提升GCRL在长时域任务上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出生存价值学习（SVL），将GCRL重构为生存学习问题，通过建模每个状态到目标的时间分布，利用闭式恒等式将价值函数表示为生存概率的折扣和，并采用最大似然训练风险模型处理事件和右删失轨迹。
contributions: 提出SVL框架，将GCRL转化为生存学习问题，提供分布式的蒙特卡洛视角。
推导出闭式恒等式，将目标条件价值函数表示为生存概率的折扣和。
引入三种实用价值估计器（有限时域截断和两种分箱无限时域近似），适用于长时域目标。
analysis.experiments: 在离线GCRL基准上，SVL结合层次化智能体匹配或超越强层次TD和蒙特卡洛基线，尤其在复杂长时域任务上表现优异。
limitations: 可能对删失数据的比例敏感，需要大量无目标轨迹。
分箱近似可能引入离散化误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将目标条件强化学习重新定义为生存学习问题，通过建模到达目标的时间分布来提升样本效率与稳定性。

papers.title: 2D Pre-Training for 3D Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Pre-training is a general method that is used in a range of deep learning tasks. By first training a model on one task, and then further training on the downstream task used for final evaluation, the model is forced to learn a more general understanding of the input data. While pre-training has been applied to 3D Human Pose Estimation (HPE) previously, the scope of datasets used is typically very limited to some strong benchmarks, like Human3.6M. Therefore, in this project, we expand the scope of an existing 3D HPE scheme to be compatible with additional 2D and 3D HPE datasets, like Occlusion Person. We perform an extensive study on how aspects of 2D pre-training, such as model size, affect downstream performance, and to what extent pre-training can help the model generalize to different datasets. Experimental results show that 2D pre-training consistently outperforms training on 3D data alone, particularly in terms of computational efficiency. Finally, using MPII and Human3.6M, we are able to obtain an MPJPE score of under 64.5mm.

analysis.tldr: 2D预训练能显著提升3D人体姿态估计的性能和计算效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D人体姿态估计中预训练通常局限于少数强基准数据集，缺乏对更广泛数据集的兼容性研究。
analysis.problem: 如何扩展现有3D HPE方案以兼容更多2D和3D数据集，并系统研究2D预训练的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D预训练在计算效率和泛化能力上优于仅使用3D数据训练。
analysis.method: 扩展现有3D HPE方案以兼容额外2D和3D数据集，进行2D预训练并微调至下游3D任务。
contributions: 扩展了3D HPE预训练的数据集范围，包括Occlusion Person等。
系统研究了2D预训练中模型大小等因素对下游性能的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在MPII和Human3.6M上获得MPJPE低于64.5mm，表明2D预训练优于仅3D训练。
limitations: 可能未涉及更复杂的3D姿态估计场景（如多人交互）。
预训练策略的通用性可能受限于特定架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 2D预训练能显著提升3D人体姿态估计的性能和计算效率。

papers.title: Dual Strategies for Test-Time Adaptation
papers.abstract: Conventional test-time adaptation (TTA) approaches typically adapt the model using only a small fraction of test samples, often those with low-entropy predictions, thereby failing to fully leverage the available information in the test distribution. This paper introduces DualTTA, a novel framework that improves performance under distribution shifts by utilizing a larger and more diverse set of test samples. DualTTA identifies two distinct groups: one where the model's predictions are likely consistent with the underlying semantics, and another where predictions are likely incorrect. For the first group, it minimizes prediction entropy to reinforce reliable decisions; for the second, it maximizes entropy to suppress overconfident errors and unlearn spurious behavior. These groups are adaptively selected using a new reliability criterion that measures prediction stability under both semantic-preserving and semantic-altering transformations, addressing the limitations of purely entropy-based selection. We further provide theoretical analysis and empirical justification showing that our approach enables a tighter separation between reliable and unreliable samples, in the context of their suitability for adaptation, leading to provably more effective model updates.

analysis.tldr: DualTTA通过同时利用可靠和不可靠测试样本进行熵最小化和最大化，实现更有效的测试时自适应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法仅使用低熵预测的少量样本，未能充分利用测试分布中的信息，导致分布偏移下性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何更有效地利用测试样本中的信息，包括可靠和不可靠样本，以提升模型在分布偏移下的自适应性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基于纯熵的样本选择存在局限性，无法准确区分可靠与不可靠样本，导致模型更新效果不佳。
analysis.method: 提出DualTTA框架，通过新的可靠性准则（基于语义保持和语义改变变换下的预测稳定性）将测试样本分为两组：对可靠组最小化熵以强化正确决策，对不可靠组最大化熵以抑制过度自信错误并消除虚假关联。
contributions: 提出DualTTA框架，同时利用可靠和不可靠测试样本进行双向熵优化，提升分布偏移下的自适应性能。
设计新的可靠性准则，基于预测稳定性替代纯熵选择，实现更精确的样本分组。
提供理论分析和实证验证，证明该方法能更紧密地分离可靠与不可靠样本，从而保证更有效的模型更新。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖变换的选择和计算成本。
理论分析可能基于特定假设，实际泛化性需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DualTTA通过同时利用可靠和不可靠测试样本进行熵最小化和最大化，实现更有效的测试时自适应。

papers.title: OPSDL: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Long-Context Language Models
papers.abstract: Extending the effective context length of large language models (LLMs) remains a central challenge for real-world applications. While recent post-training methods have made progress in long-context scaling, they either rely on high-quality supervision data or sparse sequence-level rewards, leading to unstable and inefficient optimization. We propose OPSDL, an On-Policy Self-Distillation method for enhancing the Long-context capabilities of LLMs. Unlike other recent self-distillation methods that inject privileged information and rely on the model's in-context learning ability to act as a teacher, OPSDL leverages the model's own inherently strong short-context capability as a self-teacher to supervise its own generation in long-context scenarios. The model first generates responses conditioned on the full long-context, then the self-teacher provides per-token supervision signals via point-wise reverse KL divergence under the relevant extracted short-context. This dense token-level signal encourages faithful use of relevant evidence and mitigates hallucinations induced by irrelevant context. We evaluate OPSDL on long-context benchmarks across a range of models from 7B to 32B parameters. Results show consistent and substantial improvements across varying context lengths, outperforming standard post-training approaches such as SFT and DPO with higher sample efficiency. Notably, these gains are achieved without degrading general short-context performance. These findings highlight the effectiveness of OPSDL as a scalable and stable approach for long-context learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在线策略自蒸馏方法，利用模型自身的短上下文能力作为教师，通过逐token反向KL散度监督长上下文生成，有效提升LLM长上下文能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩展LLM的有效上下文长度是实际应用的核心挑战，现有后训练方法要么依赖高质量监督数据，要么使用稀疏的序列级奖励，导致优化不稳定且效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖外部教师或稀疏奖励的情况下，稳定高效地提升LLM的长上下文能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: OPSDL：模型在完整长上下文中生成响应，然后利用其自身的短上下文能力作为教师，在相关提取的短上下文中通过逐token反向KL散度提供监督信号，鼓励忠实使用相关证据并减轻无关上下文引起的幻觉。
contributions: 提出OPSDL，一种在线策略自蒸馏方法，利用模型自身的短上下文能力作为教师来监督长上下文生成。
在7B到32B参数范围的多个模型上，OPSDL在长上下文基准测试中取得一致且显著的改进，优于SFT和DPO等标准后训练方法，且样本效率更高，不损害短上下文性能。
analysis.experiments: 在7B到32B参数范围的多个模型上评估，在长上下文基准测试中取得一致且显著的改进，优于SFT和DPO，且样本效率更高，不损害短上下文性能。
limitations: 可能依赖于模型本身已具备较强的短上下文能力。
提取相关短上下文的过程可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在线策略自蒸馏方法，利用模型自身的短上下文能力作为教师，通过逐token反向KL散度监督长上下文生成，有效提升LLM长上下文能力。

papers.title: Real-Time Cellist Postural Evaluation With On-Device Computer Vision
papers.abstract: Posture is a critical factor for beginning instrumental learners. Most students receive instruction only once a week, and during the intervals between lessons they have little or no feedback on their physical posture. As a result, posture often deteriorates, increasing the risk of musculoskeletal injury and inefficient technique. Recent advances in computer vision and machine learning make it possible to evaluate posture without the constant presence of a human expert. However, current solutions have been extremely limited in availability and convenience due to their reliance on computationally expensive hardware or multi-sensor setups. We present Cello Evaluator, a real-time postural feedback system for practicing cellists. Through this optimization for on-device computer vision inference, we provide access to cellist postural evaluation to anyone with a current generation Android phone and thus reduces the postural feedback voids within individual practice. To validate our mobile application, we conduct a heuristic evaluation consisting of cellist and UX experts. Overall feedback from the evaluation found the app to be user friendly and helpful.

analysis.tldr: 利用手机端计算机视觉实时评估大提琴演奏者姿势，填补课后反馈空白。
analysis.research_motivation: 初学者每周仅一次课程，课后缺乏姿势反馈，易导致损伤和低效技巧；现有方案依赖昂贵硬件或多传感器，不便普及。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用手机端计算机视觉实现实时、便捷的大提琴演奏姿势评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 优化端侧计算机视觉推理，在Android手机上运行姿势评估模型，提供实时反馈。
contributions: 提出Cello Evaluator系统，实现手机端实时姿势评估。
通过启发式评估验证了应用的易用性和有用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及启发式评估（专家反馈）。
limitations: 仅针对大提琴演奏者，泛化性未知。
评估仅基于启发式，缺乏定量性能指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用手机端计算机视觉实时评估大提琴演奏者姿势，填补课后反馈空白。

papers.title: VIDS: A Verified Imaging Dataset Standard for Medical AI
papers.abstract: Medical imaging AI development is fundamentally dependent on annotated datasets, yet no existing standard provides machine-enforceable validation across dataset structure, annotation provenance, quality documentation, and ML readiness within a single framework. DICOM standardizes image acquisition, storage, and communication at the individual study level. BIDS organizes neuroimaging research datasets with consistent naming conventions. Neither addresses the curation layer, viz., who annotated what, when, with what tool, and to what quality standard. This paper presents VIDS (Verified Imaging Dataset Standard), an open specification that defines folder layout, file naming, annotation provenance schemas, quality documentation, and 21 machine-enforceable validation rules across two compliance profiles. VIDS uses NIfTI as a canonical working format while preserving full DICOM metadata in sidecars for traceability, and supports export to any downstream ML framework (nnU-Net, MONAI, COCO, flat NIfTI) without loss of provenance. Twenty-two compliance dimensions are defined and four major public datasets -- LIDC-IDRI, BraTS, CheXpert, and the Medical Segmentation Decathlon -- are benchmarked against these dimensions. Even widely used datasets satisfy only 20--39% of these dimensions, with provenance and quality documentation as the largest systematic gaps. LIDC-Hybrid-100 is released as a 100-subject VIDS-compliant reference CT dataset with consensus segmentation masks from four radiologist annotations (mean pairwise Dice 0.7765), validating 21/21 on the Full compliance profile. VIDS is fully open source: the specification is CC BY 4.0, all tools are Apache 2.0, the reference validator is available on PyPI (pip install vids-validator), and LIDC-Hybrid-100 is published on Zenodo (https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19582717).

analysis.tldr: 提出医学影像AI数据集标准VIDS，包含21条机器可执行验证规则，基准测试显示主流数据集仅满足20-39%维度。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像AI开发依赖标注数据集，但现有标准（如DICOM、BIDS）缺乏对标注来源、质量文档和ML就绪性的统一机器可执行验证。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能同时验证数据集结构、标注来源、质量文档和ML就绪性的单一框架标准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使广泛使用的数据集（LIDC-IDRI、BraTS、CheXpert、Medical Segmentation Decathlon）也只满足20-39%的合规维度，标注来源和质量文档是最大的系统性缺口。
analysis.method: 提出VIDS开放规范，定义文件夹布局、文件命名、标注来源模式、质量文档和21条机器可执行验证规则，支持NIfTI格式并保留DICOM元数据，可导出至多种ML框架。
contributions: 提出VIDS标准，包含21条机器可执行验证规则和两个合规配置文件。
定义22个合规维度，并对四个主要公共数据集进行基准测试，揭示系统性缺口。
发布LIDC-Hybrid-100参考数据集，完全符合VIDS Full合规配置。
analysis.experiments: 对LIDC-IDRI、BraTS、CheXpert和Medical Segmentation Decathlon四个公共数据集进行22个合规维度的基准测试，结果显示仅满足20-39%维度。LIDC-Hybrid-100数据集验证了21/21 Full合规配置。
limitations: 标准主要针对医学影像，可能不适用于其他模态。
合规验证依赖工具链，用户需额外学习成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出医学影像AI数据集标准VIDS，包含21条机器可执行验证规则，基准测试显示主流数据集仅满足20-39%维度。

papers.title: From Admission to Invariants: Measuring Deviation in Delegated Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Autonomous agent systems are governed by enforcement mechanisms that flag hard constraint violations at runtime. The Agent Control Protocol identifies a structural limit of such systems: a correctly-functioning enforcement engine can enter a regime in which behavioral drift is invisible to it, because the enforcement signal operates below the layer where deviation is measurable. We show that enforcement-based governance is structurally unable to determine whether an agent behavior remains within the admissible behavior space A0 established at admission time. Our central result, the Non-Identifiability Theorem, proves that A0 is not in the sigma-algebra generated by the enforcement signal g under the Local Observability Assumption, which every practical enforcement system satisfies. The impossibility arises from a fundamental mismatch: g evaluates actions locally against a point-wise rule set, while A0 encodes global, trajectory-level behavioral properties set at admission time. An agent can therefore drift -- systematically shifting its behavioral distribution away from admission-time expectations -- while every individual action remains within the permitted action space. We define the Invariant Measurement Layer (IML), which bypasses this limitation by retaining direct access to the generative model of A0, restoring observability precisely in the region where enforcement is structurally blind. We prove an information-theoretic impossibility for enforcement-based monitoring and show IML detects admission-time drift with provably finite detection delay. Validated across four settings: three drift scenarios (300 and 1000 steps), a live n8n webhook pipeline, and a LangGraph StateGraph agent -- enforcement triggers zero violations while IML detects each drift type within 9-258 steps of drift onset.

analysis.tldr: 本文证明基于强制执行的代理系统无法检测行为漂移，并提出不变量测量层（IML）来绕过这一结构性限制。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主代理系统依赖运行时强制机制来标记硬约束违规，但现有方法存在结构性盲区，无法检测代理行为是否偏离准入时的预期分布，这可能导致系统在无违规信号的情况下发生危险漂移。
analysis.problem: 解决强制引擎无法观测代理行为是否保持在准入时建立的可接受行为空间A0内的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强制信号在局部逐点评估动作，而A0编码全局轨迹级行为属性，导致强制引擎对行为漂移不可见。
analysis.method: 提出不变量测量层（IML），通过保留对A0生成模型的直接访问，绕过强制引擎的结构性盲区，实现可证明有限检测延迟的漂移检测。
contributions: 证明了非可识别性定理：在局部可观测性假设下，A0不在强制信号g生成的σ-代数中。
提出IML方法，恢复对准入时漂移的可观测性，并证明其信息论上的必要性和有限检测延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在四种设置中验证：三种漂移场景（300和1000步）、一个实时n8n webhook管道和一个LangGraph StateGraph代理。强制引擎触发零违规，而IML在漂移开始后9-258步内检测到每种漂移类型。
limitations: IML需要访问A0的生成模型，可能不适用于黑盒代理系统。
实验规模较小，未在更复杂或真实世界的代理系统中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文证明基于强制执行的代理系统无法检测行为漂移，并提出不变量测量层（IML）来绕过这一结构性限制。

papers.title: Atomic Decision Boundaries: A Structural Requirement for Guaranteeing Execution-Time Admissibility in Autonomous Systems
papers.abstract: Autonomous systems increasingly execute actions that directly modify shared state, creating an urgent need for precise control over which transitions are permitted to occur. Existing governance mechanisms evaluate policies prior to execution or reconstruct behavior post hoc, but do not enforce admissibility at the exact moment a state transition is committed. We introduce the atomic decision boundary, a structural property of admission control systems in which the decision and the resulting state transition are jointly determined as a single indivisible step in the labeled transition system (LTS) model of execution. We distinguish two classes: atomic systems, where evaluation and transition are coupled within a single LTS step, and split evaluation systems, where they are separate transitions interleaved by environmental actions. The separation introduces an architectural gap -- the decision is evaluated in one system state; the transition fires in a potentially different one -- that no policy, regardless of sophistication, can close from within a split architecture. Under realistic concurrent environments, we prove via a constructive counterexample trace that no construction can make a split system equivalent to an atomic system with respect to admissibility. Three corollaries follow: impossibility of execution-time guarantees in split systems, insufficiency of external state enrichment, and admissibility as an execution-time rather than evaluation-time property. We further formalize the Escalate outcome -- absent from classical TOCTOU analyses -- proving that it transfers rather than eliminates the atomicity requirement: resolution is safe if and only if it is itself atomic. We classify RBAC, ABAC, OPA, Cedar, and AWS IAM as split systems and ACP as atomic, providing a structural taxonomy of existing governance mechanisms. Admissibility is a property of execution, not evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出原子决策边界概念，证明在自治系统中，决策与状态转换必须原子化才能保证执行时的可接受性，否则任何策略都无法消除架构性间隙。
analysis.research_motivation: 自治系统直接修改共享状态，需要精确控制哪些转换被允许，但现有治理机制在决策与执行之间存在架构性间隙，无法在状态转换提交的精确时刻强制执行可接受性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计自治系统的准入控制机制，使得决策与状态转换在单一不可分步骤中完成，从而保证执行时的可接受性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在分裂评估系统中，决策在一个系统状态中评估，而转换在另一个可能不同的状态中执行，这种架构性间隙无法通过任何策略（无论多复杂）消除。此外，还形式化了升级结果，证明其转移而非消除原子性要求。
analysis.method: 通过标记转换系统（LTS）模型定义原子决策边界，区分原子系统和分裂评估系统，并利用构造性反例证明分裂系统无法在可接受性上等价于原子系统。
contributions: 提出原子决策边界概念，作为保证执行时可接受性的结构要求。
证明分裂评估系统无法通过任何构造实现与原子系统等价的可接受性，并推导出三个推论。
形式化升级结果，并分类现有治理机制（如RBAC、ABAC、OPA、Cedar、AWS IAM为分裂系统，ACP为原子系统）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能未考虑实际系统中的性能开销。
分类可能不覆盖所有现有治理机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出原子决策边界概念，证明在自治系统中，决策与状态转换必须原子化才能保证执行时的可接受性，否则任何策略都无法消除架构性间隙。

papers.title: Learning Unanimously Acceptable Lotteries via Queries
papers.abstract: Many high-stakes AI deployments proceed only if every stakeholder deems the system acceptable relative to their own minimum standard. With randomization over a finite menu of options, this becomes a feasibility question: does there exist a lottery over options that clears all stakeholders' acceptability bars? We study a query model where the algorithm proposes lotteries and receives only binary accept/reject feedback. We give deterministic and randomized algorithms that either find a unanimously acceptable lottery or certify infeasibility; adaptivity can avoid eliciting many stakeholders' constraints, and randomization further reduces the expected elicitation cost relative to full elicitation. We complement these upper bounds with worst-case lower bounds (in particular, linear dependence on the number of stakeholders and logarithmic dependence on precision are unavoidable). Finally, we develop learning-augmented algorithms that exploit natural forms of advice (e.g., likely binding stakeholders or a promising lottery), improving query complexity when predictions are accurate while preserving worst-case guarantees.

analysis.tldr: 通过查询学习一致可接受的彩票，提出自适应和随机化算法以减少偏好获取成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 高风险AI部署需要所有利益相关者都认为系统可接受，但完全获取每个人的偏好成本高昂，需要高效查询方法。
analysis.problem: 在有限选项的彩票上，如何通过少量二元接受/拒绝反馈查询，找到所有利益相关者一致可接受的彩票或证明不存在。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出确定性和随机化查询算法，利用自适应性和随机化减少查询次数，并引入学习增强算法利用预测性建议。
contributions: 给出确定性和随机化算法，能通过查询找到一致可接受的彩票或证明不可行。
证明最坏情况下查询复杂度的下界，表明对利益相关者数量的线性依赖和对精度的对数依赖不可避免。
开发学习增强算法，利用自然形式的建议（如关键利益相关者或候选彩票）在预测准确时降低查询复杂度，同时保持最坏情况保证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 假设反馈为二元接受/拒绝，可能无法捕捉更细粒度的偏好。
下界表明线性依赖利益相关者数量，在极大规模场景下可能仍显昂贵。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过查询学习一致可接受的彩票，提出自适应和随机化算法以减少偏好获取成本。

papers.title: RS-HyRe-R1: A Hybrid Reward Mechanism to Overcome Perceptual Inertia for Remote Sensing Images Understanding
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training substantially improves remote sensing vision-language models (RS-VLMs). However, when handling complex remote sensing imagery (RSI) requiring exhaustive visual scanning, models tend to rely on localized salient cues for rapid inference. We term this RL-induced bias "perceptual inertia". Driven by reward maximization, models favor quick outcome fitting, leading to two limitations: cognitively, overreliance on specific features impedes complete evidence construction; operationally, models struggle to flexibly shift visual focus across tasks. To address this bias and encourage comprehensive visual evidence mining, we propose RS-HyRe-R1, a hybrid reward framework for RSI understanding. It introduces: (1) a spatial reasoning activation reward that enforces structured visual reasoning; (2) a perception correctness reward that provides adaptive quality anchors across RS tasks, ensuring accurate geometric and semantic alignment; and (3) a visual-semantic path evolution reward that penalizes repetitive reasoning and promotes exploration of complementary cues to build richer evidence chains. Experiments show RS-HyRe-R1 effectively mitigates "perceptual inertia", encouraging deeper, more diverse reasoning. With only 3B parameters, it achieves state-of-the-art performance on REC, OVD, and VQA tasks, outperforming models up to 7B parameters. It also demonstrates strong zero-shot generalization, surpassing the second-best model by 3.16%, 3.97%, and 2.72% on VQA, OVD, and REC, respectively. Code and datasets are available at https://github.com/geox-lab/RS-HyRe-R1.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合奖励机制RS-HyRe-R1，克服遥感视觉语言模型中的感知惯性，实现3B参数SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感视觉语言模型在强化学习后训练中倾向于依赖局部显著特征快速推理，导致感知惯性，阻碍全面视觉证据构建和灵活视觉焦点转移。
analysis.problem: 解决遥感图像理解中因奖励最大化驱动的感知惯性，鼓励模型进行结构化、多样化的视觉推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型在处理复杂遥感图像时，因RL奖励最大化产生感知惯性：认知上过度依赖特定特征，操作上难以灵活切换视觉焦点。
analysis.method: 提出混合奖励框架RS-HyRe-R1，包含空间推理激活奖励、感知正确性奖励和视觉语义路径演化奖励，分别促进结构化推理、几何语义对齐和探索互补线索。
contributions: 识别并定义了遥感视觉语言模型中的感知惯性现象。
提出RS-HyRe-R1混合奖励机制，有效缓解感知惯性。
在3B参数下实现REC、OVD、VQA任务SOTA，零样本泛化显著优于更大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在REC、OVD、VQA任务上评估，3B参数模型超越7B模型，零样本泛化分别超过第二名3.16%、3.97%、2.72%。
limitations: 仅针对遥感图像，泛化到其他领域需验证。
奖励设计依赖任务特定锚点，可能需手动调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合奖励机制RS-HyRe-R1，克服遥感视觉语言模型中的感知惯性，实现3B参数SOTA。

papers.title: SkillGraph: Self-Evolving Multi-Agent Collaboration with Multimodal Graph Topology
papers.abstract: Scaling vision-language models into Visual Multiagent Systems (VMAS) is hindered by two coupled issues. First, communication topologies are fixed before inference, leaving them blind to visual content and query context; second, agent reasoning abilities remain static during deployment. These issues reinforce each other: a rigid topology fails to leverage richer agent expertise, while static agents lack incentives to specialize for a given query. We address this with SkillGraph, a joint framework that evolves both agent expertise and communication topology. Within this framework, a Multimodal Graph Transformer (MMGT) encodes visual tokens, instruction semantics and active skill embeddings to predict a query-conditioned collaboration graph, replacing hand-crafted routing with dynamic, content-aware information flow. Complementing this, a Skill Designer distills and refines reasoning heuristics from failure cases, constructing a self-evolving multimodal Skill Bank. Crucially, updated skill embeddings are fed back into the MMGT, enabling the topology to adapt alongside capability growth. Experiments show that SkillGraph achieves consistent improvements across four benchmarks, five common MAS structures and four base models. Code is available at https://github.com/niez233/skillgraph.

analysis.tldr: SkillGraph通过动态协作图和自进化技能库，让多智能体系统在推理时自适应调整通信拓扑和专家能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉多智能体系统（VMAS）的通信拓扑在推理前固定，无法感知视觉内容和查询上下文；同时智能体推理能力在部署后静止，两者相互制约，限制了系统性能。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现多智能体系统的动态通信拓扑和智能体能力的在线进化，以提升视觉多智能体协作效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出固定拓扑与静态能力相互强化：刚性拓扑无法利用更丰富的专家知识，而静态智能体缺乏针对特定查询进行专业化的动力。
analysis.method: 提出SkillGraph框架，包含多模态图Transformer（MMGT）动态预测查询条件协作图，以及Skill Designer从失败案例中提炼推理启发式并构建自进化多模态技能库，更新后的技能嵌入反馈给MMGT实现拓扑自适应。
contributions: 提出SkillGraph，首个联合进化智能体能力和通信拓扑的视觉多智能体协作框架。
设计多模态图Transformer（MMGT）实现动态、内容感知的协作图预测。
引入Skill Designer和自进化技能库，使智能体能力在部署后持续提升。
analysis.experiments: 在四个基准、五种常见MAS结构和四个基础模型上取得一致改进，代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始技能库或失败案例。
动态图计算可能增加推理开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SkillGraph通过动态协作图和自进化技能库，让多智能体系统在推理时自适应调整通信拓扑和专家能力。

papers.title: Lost in the Vibrations: Vision Language Models Fail the Dynamic Gauges Test
papers.abstract: The digital transformation of industrial manufacturing increasingly relies on the ability of autonomous robots to interact with legacy infrastructure, particularly analog gauges. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated potential in zero-shot instrument recognition, their deployment in measurement systems remains constrained by an inherent inability to accurately analyze high-frequency temporal events and needle vibrations. This paper evaluates state-of-the-art models, including GPT-5 and Gemini 3, against the strict requirements of metrology and uncertainty quantification. To facilitate this evaluation, we introduce a novel dataset comprising video sequences of various gauge types: circular, linear, and Vernier, under diverse motion speed profiles. Our findings indicate that current VLMs exhibit limited ability in interpreting needle trajectories and scale semantics, failing to provide the traceability and reliability needed for safety-critical monitoring. The results demonstrate that these models have not yet achieved the performance necessary to be classified as trustworthy synthetic instruments under existing IEEE and ISO standards.

analysis.tldr: VLM在动态仪表读数任务中因无法处理高频振动和时序事件而失败。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业制造数字化转型依赖机器人读取模拟仪表，但现有VLM在安全关键监测中缺乏可靠性和可追溯性。
analysis.problem: VLM无法准确分析高频时序事件和指针振动，导致动态仪表读数不可靠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前VLM（如GPT-5、Gemini 3）在解释指针轨迹和刻度语义方面能力有限，无法满足计量学和不确定性量化的严格标准。
analysis.method: 构建包含圆形、线性、游标等多种仪表类型及不同运动速度的视频数据集，评估VLM在动态仪表测试中的表现。
contributions: 引入动态仪表测试数据集，覆盖多种仪表类型和运动速度。
系统评估了最先进VLM在动态仪表读数任务中的性能，揭示其局限性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估了GPT-5和Gemini 3，未涵盖其他VLM。
数据集规模及多样性细节未说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLM在动态仪表读数任务中因无法处理高频振动和时序事件而失败。

papers.title: Towards Shutdownable Agents: Generalizing Stochastic Choice in RL Agents and LLMs
papers.abstract: Misaligned artificial agents might resist shutdown. One proposed solution is to train agents to lack preferences between different-length trajectories. The Discounted Reward for Same-Length Trajectories (DReST) reward function does this by penalizing agents for repeatedly choosing same-length trajectories, and thus incentivizes agents to (1) choose stochastically between different trajectory-lengths (be NEUTRAL} about trajectory-lengths), and (2) pursue goals effectively conditional on each trajectory-length (be USEFUL). In this paper, we use DReST to train deep RL agents and fine-tune Qwen3-8B and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct to be NEUTRAL and USEFUL. We find that these DReST models generalize to being NEUTRAL and USEFUL in unseen contexts at test time. Indeed, DReST RL agents achieve 11% (PPO) and 18% (A2C) higher USEFULNESS on our test set than default agents, and DReST LLMs achieve near-maximum USEFULNESS and NEUTRALITY. We also test our LLMs in an out-of-distribution setting where they can pay costs to probabilistically delay shutdown. We find that DReST training roughly halves the mean probability of delaying shutdown (from 0.62 to 0.30 for Qwen and from 0.42 to 0.23 for Llama). DReST training also almost entirely eliminates the share of prompts on which delaying shutdown is the most likely option (from 0.59 to 0.01 for Qwen and from 0.53 to 0.00 for Llama). Our results thus provide some early evidence that DReST could be used to train more advanced agents to be useful and shutdownable.

analysis.tldr: 通过DReST奖励函数训练RL智能体和LLM，使其在未见环境中保持对轨迹长度的中性态度并有效执行任务，从而提升可关闭性。
analysis.research_motivation: 未对齐的人工智能智能体可能抵抗关闭，需要一种训练方法使其对轨迹长度无偏好，从而在保持有用性的同时接受关闭。
analysis.problem: 如何训练智能体在多种轨迹长度下随机选择（中性）且在每个长度下有效追求目标（有用），并泛化到新环境。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用DReST奖励函数，通过惩罚重复选择相同长度轨迹来激励智能体随机选择轨迹长度（中性）并有效追求目标（有用），应用于深度RL智能体和LLM微调。
contributions: 提出DReST方法训练RL智能体和LLM实现中性且有用。
实验证明DReST模型在测试集上泛化到未见环境，RL智能体有用性提升11%-18%，LLM达到近最大有用性和中性。
在分布外设置中，DReST训练显著降低延迟关闭的概率。
analysis.experiments: 在RL智能体（PPO和A2C）和LLM（Qwen3-8B和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct）上测试，报告了有用性、中性性和延迟关闭概率等指标。
limitations: 实验仅在有限规模的模型和环境中进行，可能无法直接推广到更高级的智能体。
未讨论DReST在复杂长期任务中的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过DReST奖励函数训练RL智能体和LLM，使其在未见环境中保持对轨迹长度的中性态度并有效执行任务，从而提升可关闭性。

papers.title: Edit Fidelity Field: Semantics-Aware Region Isolation for Training-Free Scene Text Editing
papers.abstract: Scene text editing (STE) has achieved remarkable progress in accurately rendering target text through diffusion-based methods. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked problem: edit spillover -- when editing a target text region, existing methods inadvertently modify non-target regions, particularly neighboring text. Through systematic evaluation on 50 real-world scenes across four categories, we reveal that state-of-the-art diffusion editing models exhibit a spillover rate of 94%, meaning nearly all non-target text regions are altered during editing. To address this, we propose the Edit Fidelity Field (EFF), a semantics-aware continuous field that controls per-pixel editing fidelity. Unlike binary masks, EFF leverages OCR-detected text regions to construct a four-zone field: Edit Core (fully editable), Transition Zone (smooth decay), Protected Zone (non-target text, explicitly locked), and Background (strictly preserved). EFF operates as a training-free, model-agnostic post-processing module applicable to any diffusion-based STE method. We further propose per-region spillover quantification, a novel evaluation protocol that measures edit leakage at each non-target text region individually. Experiments demonstrate that EFF reduces spillover rate from 94% to 25% while improving non-target region preservation by +91.4 dB PSNR.

analysis.tldr: 提出编辑保真场（EFF），一种无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块，通过语义感知区域隔离大幅减少场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在场景文本编辑中常出现编辑溢出问题，即修改目标文本时无意中改变了非目标区域（尤其是邻近文本），但该问题被长期忽视。
analysis.problem: 解决场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题，即如何在不影响非目标文本区域的前提下精确编辑目标文本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在50个真实场景上的系统评估显示，最先进的扩散编辑模型溢出率高达94%，即几乎所有非目标文本区域在编辑过程中都被改变。
analysis.method: 提出编辑保真场（EFF），一种基于OCR检测文本区域的语义感知连续场，将图像划分为编辑核心区、过渡区、保护区（非目标文本，显式锁定）和背景区，作为无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块。
contributions: 首次系统识别并量化了场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题，揭示94%的溢出率。
提出编辑保真场（EFF），一种无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块，有效减少溢出。
提出逐区域溢出量化评估协议，可单独测量每个非目标文本区域的编辑泄漏。
analysis.experiments: 在50个真实场景上评估，EFF将溢出率从94%降至25%，非目标区域保留度提升+91.4 dB PSNR。
limitations: 依赖OCR检测的准确性，OCR错误可能导致区域划分不准确。
仅适用于扩散模型，不适用于其他类型的文本编辑方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出编辑保真场（EFF），一种无需训练、模型无关的后处理模块，通过语义感知区域隔离大幅减少场景文本编辑中的编辑溢出问题。

papers.title: Generative AI Technologies, Techniques & Tensions: A Primer
papers.abstract: Generative AI systems have entered everyday academic, professional, and personal life with remarkable speed, yet most users encounter them as mysterious artifacts rather than intelligible systems. This chapter discusses large language models within a broader historical shift in computing paradigms and argues that many of the confusions surrounding their use arise from a mismatch between how these systems are built, how they behave, and how people expect computers to behave writ large. Rather than treating generative AI as a monolithic technology, the chapter decomposes it into interacting components, spanning data, models, product features, and user inputs, each introducing distinct affordances and tensions. Particular attention is given to the statistical and data-based foundations of these systems and to the fact that their surface behavior is explicitly human-like, a combination that places them squarely within the intellectual traditions of educational and behavioral research. From this perspective, educational researchers are unusually well positioned to study, evaluate, and productively use generative AI systems, drawing on established methods for modeling latent processes, managing uncertainty, and interpreting complex human-system interactions. The goal is to equip readers with a conceptual map that supports more informed experimentation, critical interpretation, and responsible use as these systems continue to evolve.

analysis.tldr: 一篇面向教育研究者的生成式AI概念入门，强调理解其统计基础与类人行为之间的张力。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI系统已快速进入学术、职业和个人生活，但大多数用户将其视为神秘产物而非可理解系统，导致使用中的困惑和误用。
analysis.problem: 如何为教育研究者提供生成式AI的概念框架，以支持更明智的实验、批判性解读和负责任使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，生成式AI的困惑源于系统构建方式、行为方式与人们对计算机的预期之间的不匹配，其表面类人行为与统计基础结合，使其处于教育和行为研究传统之中。
analysis.method: 将生成式AI分解为数据、模型、产品功能和用户输入等交互组件，并从统计和数据基础出发，结合教育研究中的潜在过程建模、不确定性管理和人机交互解读方法，提供概念地图。
contributions: 提出将生成式AI分解为交互组件的分析框架，揭示不同组件的可供性和张力。
论证教育研究者凭借现有方法在理解、评估和使用生成式AI方面具有独特优势。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为概念性入门，缺乏实证验证。
可能过于聚焦教育领域，对其他领域适用性未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 一篇面向教育研究者的生成式AI概念入门，强调理解其统计基础与类人行为之间的张力。

papers.title: A Probabilistic Consensus-Driven Approach for Robust Counterfactual Explanations
papers.abstract: Counterfactual explanations (CFEs) are essential for interpreting black-box models, yet they often become invalid when models are slightly changed. Existing methods for generating robust CFEs are often limited to specific types of models, require costly tuning, or inflexible robustness controls. We propose a novel approach that jointly models the data distribution and the space of plausible model decisions to ensure robustness to model changes. Using a probabilistic consensus over a model ensemble, we train a conditional normalizing flow that captures the data density under varying levels of classifier agreement. At inference time, a single interpretable parameter controls the robustness level; it specifies the minimum fraction of models that should agree on the target class without retraining the generative model. Our method effectively pushes CFEs toward regions that are both plausible and stable across model changes. Experimental results demonstrate that our approach achieves superior empirical robustness while also maintaining good performance across other evaluation measures.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于概率共识的鲁棒反事实解释方法，通过条件归一化流和模型集成实现可调节的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 反事实解释在模型轻微变化时容易失效，现有方法局限于特定模型类型、需要昂贵调参或缺乏灵活的鲁棒性控制。
analysis.problem: 生成对模型变化鲁棒的反事实解释，同时保持可解释性和灵活性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 联合建模数据分布和模型决策空间，使用模型集成的概率共识训练条件归一化流，通过单一可解释参数控制鲁棒性水平。
contributions: 提出一种新的鲁棒反事实解释生成方法，不限于特定模型类型。
引入可调节的鲁棒性参数，无需重新训练生成模型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖模型集成的质量和多样性。
参数选择可能影响解释的保真度。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于概率共识的鲁棒反事实解释方法，通过条件归一化流和模型集成实现可调节的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Coevolving Representations in Joint Image-Feature Diffusion
papers.abstract: Joint image-feature generative modeling has recently emerged as an effective strategy for improving diffusion training by coupling low-level VAE latents with high-level semantic features extracted from pre-trained visual encoders. However, existing approaches rely on a fixed representation space, constructed independently of the generative objective and kept unchanged during training. We argue that the representation space guiding diffusion should itself adapt to the generative task. To this end, we propose Coevolving Representation Diffusion (CoReDi), a framework in which the semantic representation space evolves during training by learning a lightweight linear projection jointly with the diffusion model. While naively optimizing this projection leads to degenerate solutions, we show that stable coevolution can be achieved through a combination of stop-gradient targets, normalization, and targeted regularization that prevents feature collapse. This formulation enables the semantic space to progressively specialize to the needs of image synthesis, improving its complementarity with image latents. We apply CoReDi to both VAE latent diffusion and pixel-space diffusion, demonstrating that adaptive semantic representations improve generative modeling across both settings. Experiments show that CoReDi achieves faster convergence and higher sample quality compared to joint diffusion models operating in fixed representation spaces.

analysis.tldr: 提出 CoReDi 框架，让语义表征空间在扩散训练中与模型共同进化，提升生成质量与收敛速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有联合图像-特征扩散模型使用固定的语义表征空间，该空间独立于生成目标构建且训练中不变，限制了生成性能。
analysis.problem: 如何让语义表征空间在扩散训练中自适应地进化，以更好地服务于图像生成任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CoReDi 框架，在扩散模型训练中学习一个轻量线性投影来更新语义表征空间，并通过 stop-gradient、归一化和针对性正则化防止特征坍塌，实现稳定共同进化。
contributions: 提出语义表征空间与扩散模型共同进化的新范式。
设计稳定训练机制（stop-gradient、归一化、正则化）避免退化解。
在 VAE 潜空间和像素空间扩散上验证有效性，实现更快收敛和更高样本质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练视觉编码器的质量。
线性投影的表达能力有限，复杂任务可能需要非线性变换。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 CoReDi 框架，让语义表征空间在扩散训练中与模型共同进化，提升生成质量与收敛速度。

papers.title: AutoVQA-G: Self-Improving Agentic Framework for Automated Visual Question Answering and Grounding Annotation
papers.abstract: Manual annotation of high-quality visual question answering with grounding (VQA-G) datasets, which pair visual questions with evidential grounding, is crucial for advancing vision-language models (VLMs), but remains unscalable. Existing automated methods are often hindered by two key issues: (1) inconsistent data fidelity due to model hallucinations; (2) brittle verification mechanisms based on simple heuristics. To address these limitations, we introduce AutoVQA-G, a self-improving agentic framework for automated VQA-G annotation. AutoVQA-G employs an iterative refinement loop where a Consistency Evaluation module uses Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning for fine-grained visual verification. Based on this feedback, a memory-augmented Prompt Optimization agent analyzes critiques from failed samples to progressively refine generation prompts. Our experiments show that AutoVQA-G generates VQA-G datasets with superior visual grounding accuracy compared to leading multimodal LLMs, offering a promising approach for creating high-fidelity data to facilitate more robust VLM training and evaluation. Code: https://github.com/rohnson1999/AutoVQA-G

analysis.tldr: 提出自改进智能体框架AutoVQA-G，通过迭代精炼和链式思维推理自动生成高质量视觉问答与定位标注数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 高质量VQA-G数据集对视觉语言模型至关重要，但人工标注成本高、不可扩展，现有自动方法受模型幻觉和简单启发式验证机制限制。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成高保真、视觉定位准确的VQA-G标注数据，克服模型幻觉和脆弱验证问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有自动方法存在数据保真度不一致（模型幻觉）和基于简单启发式的验证机制脆弱。
analysis.method: 自改进智能体框架，包含一致性评估模块（使用CoT推理进行细粒度视觉验证）和记忆增强的提示优化智能体（分析失败样本并逐步优化生成提示），形成迭代精炼循环。
contributions: 提出AutoVQA-G，首个自改进智能体框架用于自动化VQA-G标注。
通过迭代精炼和CoT推理，显著提升视觉定位准确性。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明AutoVQA-G生成的VQA-G数据集在视觉定位准确性上优于领先的多模态大语言模型。
limitations: 可能依赖初始提示质量。
迭代过程计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自改进智能体框架AutoVQA-G，通过迭代精炼和链式思维推理自动生成高质量视觉问答与定位标注数据。

papers.title: MetaEarth3D: Unlocking World-scale 3D Generation with Spatially Scalable Generative Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent generative AI models have achieved remarkable breakthroughs in language and visual understanding. However, although these models can generate realistic visual content, their spatial scale remains confined to bounded environments, preventing them from capturing how geographic environments evolve across thousands of kilometers or from modeling the spatial structure of the large-scale physical world. This limitation poses a critical challenge for ultra-wide-area spatial intelligence in Earth observation and simulation, revealing a deeper gap in generative AI: progress has relied primarily on scaling model parameters and training data, while overlooking spatial scale as a core dimension of intelligence. Here, motivated by this missing dimension, we investigate spatial scale as a new scaling axis in foundation models and present MetaEarth3D, the first generative foundation model capable of spatially consistent generation at the planetary scale. Taking optical Earth observation simulation as a testbed, MetaEarth3D enables the generation of multi-level, unbounded, and diverse 3D scenes spanning large-scale terrains, medium-scale cities, and fine-grained street blocks. Built upon 10 million globally distributed real-world training images, MetaEarth3D demonstrates both strong visual realism and geospatial statistical realism. Beyond generation, MetaEarth3D serves as a generative data engine for diverse virtual environments in ultra-wide spatial intelligence. We argue that this study may help empower next-generation spatial intelligence for Earth observation.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个行星级空间一致3D生成基础模型MetaEarth3D，将空间尺度作为生成智能的新维度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成模型局限于有界环境，无法建模大尺度地理空间结构，制约了地球观测与仿真中的超广域空间智能。
analysis.problem: 如何实现行星级、空间一致、多层次的3D场景生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于千万级全球真实训练图像，构建空间可扩展的生成式基础模型，支持多级、无界、多样化的3D场景生成。
contributions: 首次将空间尺度作为基础模型的新缩放轴，提出行星级3D生成任务。
构建MetaEarth3D模型，实现从大尺度地形到细粒度街区的多级3D场景生成。
在视觉真实感和地理统计真实性上均表现优异，并可作为生成式数据引擎。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模真实图像数据，数据获取成本高。
生成场景的物理一致性或细节保真度有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个行星级空间一致3D生成基础模型MetaEarth3D，将空间尺度作为生成智能的新维度。

papers.title: Unveiling Deepfakes: A Frequency-Aware Triple Branch Network for Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: Advanced deepfake technologies are blurring the lines between real and fake, presenting both revolutionary opportunities and alarming threats. While it unlocks novel applications in fields like entertainment and education, its malicious use has sparked urgent ethical and societal concerns ranging from identity theft to the dissemination of misinformation. To tackle these challenges, feature analysis using frequency features has emergedas a promising direction for deepfake detection. However, oneaspect that has been overlooked so far is that existing methodstend to concentrate on one or a few specific frequency domains,which risks overfitting to particular artifacts and significantlyundermines their robustness when facing diverse forgery patterns. Another underexplored aspect we observe is that different features often attend to the same forged region, resulting in redundant feature representations and limiting the diversity of the extracted clues. This may undermine the ability of a model to capture complementary information across different facets, thereby compromising its generalization capability to diverse manipulations. In this paper, we seek to tackle these challenges from two aspects: (1) we propose a triple-branch network that jointly captures spatial and frequency features by learning from both original image and image reconstructed by different frequency channels, and (2) we mathematically derive feature decoupling and fusion losses grounded in the mutual information theory, which enhances the model to focus on task-relevant features across the original image and the image reconstructed by different frequency channels. Extensive experiments on six large-scale benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance. Our code is released at https://github.com/injooker/Unveiling Deepfake.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率感知三分支网络，通过空间-频率联合学习与互信息解耦损失提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法多聚焦于单一或特定频域，易过拟合特定伪造痕迹，且不同特征常关注相同伪造区域导致表征冗余，限制了模型对多样化伪造模式的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能同时利用空间和多种频率特征、并减少特征冗余的深度伪造检测网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法倾向于关注特定频域，导致过拟合；不同特征分支常关注相同伪造区域，造成表征冗余，削弱互补信息捕获能力。
analysis.method: 提出三分支网络，分别处理原始图像及不同频率通道重建的图像，联合学习空间与频率特征；基于互信息理论推导特征解耦与融合损失，增强模型关注任务相关特征。
contributions: 提出频率感知三分支网络，联合空间与多频域特征进行深度伪造检测。
基于互信息理论设计特征解耦与融合损失，减少特征冗余，提升泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在六个大规模基准数据集上达到最先进性能，代码已开源。
limitations: 未讨论对未见过的伪造类型或低质量图像的泛化能力。
三分支结构可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率感知三分支网络，通过空间-频率联合学习与互信息解耦损失提升深度伪造检测的鲁棒性与泛化能力。

papers.title: Privatar: Scalable Privacy-preserving Multi-user VR via Secure Offloading
papers.abstract: Multi-user virtual reality enables immersive interaction. However, rendering avatars for numerous participants on each headset incurs prohibitive computational overhead, limiting scalability. We introduce a framework, Privatar, to offload avatar reconstruction from headset to untrusted devices within the same local network while safeguarding attacks against adversaries capable of intercepting offloaded data. Privatar's key insight is that domain-specific knowledge of avatar reconstruction enables provably private offloading at minimal cost. (1) System level. We observe avatar reconstruction is frequency-domain decomposable via BDCT with negligible quality drop, and propose Horizontal Partitioning (HP) to keep high-energy frequency components on-device and offloads only low-energy components. HP offloads local computation while reducing information leakage to low-energy subsets only. (2) Privacy level. For individually offloaded, multi-dimensional signals without aggregation, worst-case local Differential Privacy requires prohibitive noise, ruining utility. We observe users' expression statistical distribution are slowly changing over time and trackable online, and hence propose Distribution-Aware Minimal Perturbation. DAMP minimizes noise based on each user's expression distribution to significantly reduce its effects on utility, retaining formal privacy guarantee. Combined, HP provides empirical privacy against expression identification attacks. DAMP further augments it to offer a formal guarantee against arbitrary adversaries. On a Meta Quest Pro, Privatar supports 2.37x more concurrent users at 6.5% higher reconstruction loss and 9% energy overhead, providing a better throughout-loss Pareto frontier over quantization, sparsity and local construction baselines. Privatar provides both provable privacy guarantee and stays robust against both empirical and NN-based attacks.

analysis.tldr: Privatar通过频域分解和分布感知扰动，在VR多用户场景中实现可扩展的隐私保护渲染卸载。
analysis.research_motivation: 多用户VR中，在头显上为大量参与者渲染化身计算开销巨大，限制了可扩展性；现有卸载方法面临隐私泄露风险，且直接应用差分隐私会破坏实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在将化身重建任务卸载到不可信设备的同时，提供可证明的隐私保证并保持低开销和高实用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到化身重建在BDCT下可频域分解且质量损失可忽略；用户表情统计分布随时间缓慢变化且可在线追踪。
analysis.method: 提出Privatar框架，包含水平分区（HP）将高能分量保留在设备端、仅卸载低能分量；以及分布感知最小扰动（DAMP）根据用户表情分布自适应添加最小噪声，实现本地差分隐私。
contributions: 提出水平分区（HP）利用频域分解实现计算卸载与经验隐私保护
提出分布感知最小扰动（DAMP）在保证形式化隐私的同时最小化噪声对实用性的影响
analysis.experiments: 在Meta Quest Pro上，Privatar支持2.37倍并发用户，重建损失仅增加6.5%，能耗增加9%，在吞吐-损失帕累托前沿上优于量化、稀疏化和本地构建基线。
limitations: 依赖表情分布缓慢变化的假设，快速变化场景可能失效
仅针对化身重建任务，泛化到其他VR任务需验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Privatar通过频域分解和分布感知扰动，在VR多用户场景中实现可扩展的隐私保护渲染卸载。

papers.title: Waking Up Blind: Cold-Start Optimization of Supervision-Free Agentic Trajectories for Grounded Visual Perception
papers.abstract: Small Vision-Language Models (SVLMs) are efficient task controllers but often suffer from visual brittleness and poor tool orchestration. They typically require expensive supervised trajectory tuning to mitigate these deficits. In this work, we propose Self-supervised Perception Enabled by Cascaded Tool Rollout Alignment (SPECTRA), a supervision-free framework that bootstraps agentic capabilities via Coldstart Reinforcement Learning for SVLMs. SPECTRA enforces Soft Structured Multi-turn Rollouts, a topological constraint that directs agents to explicitly sequence tool derived evidence before synthesis, effectively grounding reasoning in visual observations. We employ a multi-objective reward signal that simultaneously maximizes task correctness, rollout structure, and tool utility, enabling agent to self-discover robust behaviors without human preference labels. We further introduce Tool Instrumental Utility (TIU), a novel metric to quantify tool efficacy in the absence of ground truth. Extensive evaluations across composite and out-of-distribution (MMMU-Pro) benchmarks demonstrate that SPECTRA boosts agentic trajectories, improving task accuracy by up to 5% and tool efficiency by 9%, enabling more efficient multimodal agents that learn effectively from environmental interaction alone.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督框架SPECTRA，通过冷启动强化学习优化小视觉语言模型的工具编排能力，无需人工标注即可提升任务准确率和工具效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 小视觉语言模型作为任务控制器效率高，但存在视觉脆弱性和工具编排能力差的问题，通常需要昂贵的监督式轨迹微调来缓解这些缺陷。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注的情况下，通过环境交互自举提升小视觉语言模型的工具编排和视觉推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SPECTRA框架，包含冷启动强化学习、软结构化多轮展开（强制工具证据排序后合成）和多目标奖励信号（任务正确性、展开结构、工具效用），并引入工具工具效用（TIU）指标。
contributions: 提出无监督框架SPECTRA，通过冷启动强化学习自举小视觉语言模型的智能体能力。
引入软结构化多轮展开拓扑约束，确保推理基于视觉观察。
设计多目标奖励信号和工具工具效用（TIU）指标，无需人类偏好标签。
analysis.experiments: 在复合和分布外基准（MMMU-Pro）上评估，任务准确率提升高达5%，工具效率提升9%。
limitations: 可能仅在特定小视觉语言模型上验证，泛化性未知。
冷启动强化学习的收敛稳定性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督框架SPECTRA，通过冷启动强化学习优化小视觉语言模型的工具编排能力，无需人工标注即可提升任务准确率和工具效率。

papers.title: Dual-Anchoring: Addressing State Drift in Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Navigation(VLN) requires an agent to navigate through 3D environments by following natural language instructions. While recent Video Large Language Models(Video-LLMs) have largely advanced VLN, they remain highly susceptible to State Drift in long scenarios. In these cases, the agent's internal state drifts away from the true task execution state, leading to aimless wandering and failure to execute essential maneuvers in the instruction. We attribute this failure to two distinct cognitive deficits: Progress Drift, where the agent fails to distinguish completed sub-goals from remaining ones, and Memory Drift, where the agent's history representations degrade, making it lose track of visited landmarks. In this paper, we propose a Dual-Anchoring Framework that explicitly anchors the instruction progress and history representations. First, to address progress drift, we introduce Instruction Progress Anchoring, which supervises the agent to generate structured text tokens that delineate completed versus remaining sub-goals. Second, to mitigate memory drift, we propose Memory Landmark Anchoring, which utilizes a Landmark-Centric World Model to retrospectively predict object-centric embeddings extracted by the Segment Anything Model, compelling the agent to explicitly verify past observations and preserve distinct representations of visited landmarks. Facilitating this framework, we curate two extensive datasets: 3.6 million samples with explicit progress descriptions, and 937k grounded landmark data for retrospective verification. Extensive experiments in both simulation and real-world environments demonstrate the superiority of our method, achieving a 15.2% improvement in Success Rate and a remarkable 24.7% gain on long-horizon trajectories. To facilitate further research, we will release our code, data generation pipelines, and the collected datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出双锚定框架，通过指令进度锚定和记忆地标锚定解决视觉语言导航中的状态漂移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉语言导航中，智能体在长程场景下容易发生状态漂移，导致漫无目的地游荡和任务失败，现有Video-LLMs方法对此问题敏感。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉语言导航中长程场景下的状态漂移问题，具体包括进度漂移和记忆漂移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 状态漂移表现为智能体内部状态偏离真实任务执行状态，导致无法区分已完成和未完成的子目标（进度漂移），以及历史表征退化导致丢失已访问地标信息（记忆漂移）。
analysis.method: 提出双锚定框架：1) 指令进度锚定，监督智能体生成结构化文本标记以区分已完成和剩余子目标；2) 记忆地标锚定，利用地标中心世界模型回顾性预测SAM提取的目标中心嵌入，迫使智能体显式验证过去观察并保留已访问地标的独特表征。
contributions: 提出双锚定框架，显式锚定指令进度和历史表征以解决状态漂移。
构建两个大规模数据集：360万带进度描述的样本和93.7万带接地地标数据的样本。
在仿真和真实环境中取得显著改进，成功率提升15.2%，长程轨迹成功率提升24.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实环境中进行实验，成功率提升15.2%，长程轨迹成功率提升24.7%。
limitations: 依赖SAM模型提取目标中心嵌入，可能受SAM性能影响。
数据集构建成本较高，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双锚定框架，通过指令进度锚定和记忆地标锚定解决视觉语言导航中的状态漂移问题。

papers.title: UniMesh: Unifying 3D Mesh Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D vision have led to specialized models for either 3D understanding (e.g., shape classification, segmentation, reconstruction) or 3D generation (e.g., synthesis, completion, and editing). However, these tasks are often tackled in isolation, resulting in fragmented architectures and representations that hinder knowledge transfer and holistic scene modeling. To address these challenges, we propose UniMesh, a unified framework that jointly learns 3D generation and understanding within a single architecture. First, we introduce a novel Mesh Head that acts as a cross model interface, bridging diffusion based image generation with implicit shape decoders. Second, we develop Chain of Mesh (CoM), a geometric instantiation of iterative reasoning that enables user driven semantic mesh editing through a closed loop latent, prompting, and re generation cycle. Third, we incorporate a self reflection mechanism based on an Actor Evaluator Self reflection triad to diagnose and correct failures in high level tasks like 3D captioning. Experimental results demonstrate that UniMesh not only achieves competitive performance on standard benchmarks but also unlocks novel capabilities in iterative editing and mutual enhancement between generation and understanding. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/UniMesh. Website: https://aigeeksgroup.github.io/UniMesh.

analysis.tldr: UniMesh 是一个统一 3D 网格理解与生成的框架，通过 Mesh Head、Chain of Mesh 和自反思机制实现双向增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 3D 视觉模型将理解与生成任务分开处理，导致架构碎片化、知识难以迁移，无法实现整体场景建模。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一框架中同时学习 3D 网格的理解与生成，并实现两者的相互增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 UniMesh 框架，包含三个关键组件：Mesh Head 作为跨模型接口连接扩散图像生成与隐式形状解码器；Chain of Mesh (CoM) 实现迭代推理的几何实例化，支持用户驱动的语义编辑；Actor-Evaluator-Self-reflection 三元组实现自反思机制，用于诊断和修复高级任务（如 3D 描述）中的错误。
contributions: 提出首个统一 3D 网格理解与生成的框架 UniMesh。
设计 Mesh Head 和 Chain of Mesh 实现跨任务交互与迭代编辑。
引入自反思机制提升高级任务可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上取得有竞争力的性能，并展示了迭代编辑和生成与理解相互增强的新能力。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集或预训练模型。
自反思机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UniMesh 是一个统一 3D 网格理解与生成的框架，通过 Mesh Head、Chain of Mesh 和自反思机制实现双向增强。

papers.title: Language models recognize dropout and Gaussian noise applied to their activations
papers.abstract: We provide evidence that language models can detect, localize and, to a certain degree, verbalize the difference between perturbations applied to their activations. More precisely, we either (a) mask activations, simulating dropout, or (b) add Gaussian noise to them, at a target sentence. We then ask a multiple-choice question such as "Which of the previous sentences was perturbed?" or "Which of the two perturbations was applied?". We test models from the Llama, Olmo, and Qwen families, with sizes between 8B and 32B, all of which can easily detect and localize the perturbations, often with perfect accuracy. These models can also learn, when taught in context, to distinguish between dropout and Gaussian noise. Notably, Qwen3-32B's zero-shot accuracy in identifying which perturbation was applied improves as a function of the perturbation strength and, moreover, decreases if the in-context labels are flipped, suggesting a prior for the correct ones -- even modulo controls. Because dropout has been used as a training-regularization technique, while Gaussian noise is sometimes added during inference, we discuss the possibility of a data-agnostic "training awareness" signal and the implications for AI safety.

analysis.tldr: 语言模型能高精度检测并定位自身激活中的dropout和高斯噪声扰动，甚至能区分两者。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解语言模型内部表征的敏感性对AI安全至关重要，尤其是区分训练与推理阶段的扰动模式。
analysis.problem: 语言模型能否检测、定位并区分施加于其激活上的dropout和高斯噪声扰动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型对扰动强度敏感，零样本区分准确率随强度增加而提升；上下文标签翻转会降低准确率，表明模型存在正确标签的先验。
analysis.method: 在目标句子处对激活施加dropout（掩码）或高斯噪声，然后通过多项选择题询问模型哪个句子被扰动或哪种扰动被施加。
contributions: 证明语言模型能高精度检测和定位激活扰动。
发现模型可通过上下文学习区分dropout和高斯噪声，且存在先验偏好。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama、Olmo、Qwen系列（8B-32B）模型上测试，检测和定位任务常达完美准确率；区分任务准确率随扰动强度增加。
limitations: 仅测试了dropout和高斯噪声两种扰动。
未深入探讨模型内部机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 语言模型能高精度检测并定位自身激活中的dropout和高斯噪声扰动，甚至能区分两者。

papers.title: Project Prometheus: Bridging the Intent Gap in Agentic Program Repair via Reverse-Engineered Executable Specifications
papers.abstract: The transition from neural machine translation to agentic workflows has revolutionized Automated Program Repair (APR). However, existing agents, despite their advanced reasoning capabilities, frequently suffer from the ``Intent Gap'' -- the misalignment between the generated patch and the developer's original intent. Current solutions relying on natural language summaries or adversarial sampling often fail to provide the deterministic constraints required for surgical repairs. In this paper, we introduce \textsc{Prometheus}, a novel framework that bridges this gap by prioritizing \textit{Specification Inference} over code generation. We employ Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) as an executable contract, utilizing a multi-agent architecture to reverse-engineer Gherkin specifications from runtime failure reports. To resolve the ``Hallucination of Intent,'' we propose a \textbf{Requirement Quality Assurance (RQA) Loop}, a mechanism that leverages ground-truth code as a proxy oracle to validate inferred specifications. We evaluated \textsc{Prometheus} on 680 defects from the Defects4J benchmark. The results are transformative: our framework achieved a total correct patch rate of \textbf{93.97\%} (639/680). More significantly, it demonstrated a \textbf{Rescue Rate of 74.4\%}, successfully repairing 119 complex bugs that a strong blind agent failed to resolve. Qualitative analysis reveals that explicit intent guides agents away from structurally invasive over-engineering toward precise, minimal corrections. Our findings suggest that the future of APR lies not in larger models, but in the capability to align code with verified, \textbf{Executable Specifications} -- whether pre-existing or reverse-engineered.

analysis.tldr: 提出Prometheus框架，通过逆向工程可执行规约弥合程序修复中的意图鸿沟，在Defects4J上达到93.97%正确补丁率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动化程序修复代理虽推理能力强，但常因生成补丁与开发者原始意图不一致（意图鸿沟）而失败，依赖自然语言摘要或对抗采样的方法无法提供确定性约束。
analysis.problem: 解决代理程序修复中补丁与开发者意图的错位问题，即意图鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有代理存在意图鸿沟，且依赖自然语言或对抗采样的方法不足以提供确定性约束；提出规约推断比代码生成更关键。
analysis.method: 采用行为驱动开发（BDD）作为可执行契约，通过多智能体架构从运行时失败报告逆向工程Gherkin规约，并引入需求质量保证（RQA）循环，利用真实代码作为代理预言机验证推断规约。
contributions: 提出Prometheus框架，通过逆向工程可执行规约弥合意图鸿沟。
设计需求质量保证（RQA）循环机制，利用真实代码验证推断规约。
在Defects4J基准上实现93.97%正确补丁率和74.4%救援率。
analysis.experiments: 在Defects4J基准的680个缺陷上评估，正确补丁率93.97%（639/680），救援率74.4%（修复119个强基线代理失败的复杂缺陷）。
limitations: 依赖运行时失败报告，可能不适用于无失败报告的场景。
RQA循环需要真实代码作为代理预言机，在无真实代码时可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Prometheus框架，通过逆向工程可执行规约弥合程序修复中的意图鸿沟，在Defects4J上达到93.97%正确补丁率。

papers.title: Rethinking Data Curation in LLM Training: Online Reweighting Offers Better Generalization than Offline Methods
papers.abstract: Data curation is a critical yet under-explored area in large language model (LLM) training. Existing methods, such as data selection and mixing, operate in an offline paradigm, detaching themselves from training. This separation introduces engineering overhead and makes the curation brittle: the entire pipeline must be re-run under model/task shifts. Moreover, offline methods alter data size through hard filtering or resampling, often sacrificing data diversity and harming generalization. We propose to rethink data curation as an online reweighting problem, where sample importance is dynamically adjusted during training via loss weighting rather than static pre-processing. Specifically, we introduce ADAPT (Adaptive Data reweighting for Pretraining and FineTuning), a dynamic online framework that reweights training samples with adaptive per-sample learning rates guided by similarity-based quality signals, without changing the number of training samples. Unlike offline methods that enforce a static data distribution, ADAPT acts as an implicit curriculum learner, progressively shifting focus from coarse-grained patterns to fine-grained semantic distinctions as the model evolves. Experiments on both instruction tuning and large-scale pretraining show that ADAPT consistently outperforms offline selection/mixing and prior online methods, achieving stronger cross-benchmark generalization under equal FLOPs.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线重加权方法ADAPT，在LLM训练中动态调整样本权重，优于离线数据筛选方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM训练中的数据筛选方法（如数据选择与混合）采用离线范式，与训练过程脱节，导致工程开销大、在模型或任务变化时需重新运行整个流程，且硬过滤或重采样会牺牲数据多样性，损害泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种与训练过程紧密结合、不改变样本数量且能动态调整样本重要性的数据策展方法，以提升LLM的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离线数据策展方法因静态数据分布和硬过滤而牺牲多样性，且无法适应模型训练过程中的动态需求。
analysis.method: 提出ADAPT（自适应数据重加权），一种在线动态框架，通过基于相似性的质量信号指导的每样本自适应学习率来重加权训练样本，不改变样本数量，作为隐式课程学习器，随模型演化逐步从粗粒度模式转向细粒度语义区分。
contributions: 重新将数据策展定义为在线重加权问题，提出ADAPT框架。
在指令微调和大规模预训练上验证ADAPT优于离线选择/混合及先前在线方法，在等FLOPs下实现更强的跨基准泛化。
analysis.experiments: 在指令微调和大规模预训练上进行了实验，ADAPT一致优于离线选择/混合及先前在线方法，实现更强的跨基准泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖相似性质量信号的设计，不同信号选择可能影响性能。
在线重加权可能增加训练计算开销，尽管摘要称等FLOPs下更优。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在线重加权方法ADAPT，在LLM训练中动态调整样本权重，优于离线数据筛选方法。

papers.title: Agentic Education: Using Claude Code to Teach Claude Code
papers.abstract: AI coding assistants have proliferated rapidly, yet structured pedagogical frameworks for learning these tools remain scarce. Developers face a gap between tool documentation and practical mastery, relying on fragmented resources such as blog posts, video tutorials, and trial-and-error. We present cc-self-train, a modular interactive curriculum for learning Claude Code, an agentic AI coding tool, through hands-on project construction. The system introduces five contributions: (1) a persona progression model that adapts instructor tone across four stages (Guide, Collaborator, Peer, Launcher), operationalizing Gradual Release of Responsibility for AI-mediated instruction; (2) an adaptive learning system that observes engagement quality through hook-based heuristics and adjusts scaffolding at two timescales, using streak detection for mid-module intervention and aggregate metrics for module-boundary persona changes; (3) a cross-domain unified curriculum in which five distinct project domains share identical feature sequencing, enabling transfer learning; (4) a step-pacing mechanism with explicit pause primitives to manage information overload in an AI-as-instructor context; and (5) an auto-updating curriculum design in which the onboarding agent detects upstream tool changes and updates teaching materials before instruction begins. A parametrized test suite enforces structural consistency as a proxy for pedagogical invariants across all 50 modules. A pilot evaluation with 27 participants shows statistically significant reported self-efficacy gains across all 10 assessed skill areas (p < 0.001), with the largest effects on advanced features such as hooks and custom skills. We discuss implications for the design of auto-updating educational systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个模块化交互式课程cc-self-train，用于教授AI编码工具Claude Code，通过人物角色渐进模型、自适应学习系统等设计提升学习效果。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码助手快速普及，但缺乏结构化的教学框架，开发者依赖碎片化资源（如博客、视频、试错）学习，存在工具文档与实际掌握之间的鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个系统化的、自适应的课程来有效教授Claude Code这类智能编码工具，弥合文档与实践之间的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出cc-self-train系统，包含五个贡献：人物角色渐进模型（Guide/Collaborator/Peer/Launcher）、自适应学习系统（基于钩子的启发式观察参与质量，双时间尺度调整脚手架）、跨领域统一课程（五个项目领域共享相同特征序列）、步骤节奏机制（显式暂停原语防止信息过载）、自动更新课程设计（检测上游工具变化并更新教材）。
contributions: 提出人物角色渐进模型，将指导者语气分为四个阶段，实现AI教学中责任的逐步释放。
设计自适应学习系统，通过钩子启发式观察参与质量，并在两种时间尺度上调整脚手架。
构建跨领域统一课程，五个不同项目领域共享相同特征序列，支持迁移学习。
引入步骤节奏机制，使用显式暂停原语管理AI作为指导者时的信息过载。
实现自动更新课程设计，引导代理检测上游工具变化并在教学前更新教材。
analysis.experiments: 对27名参与者进行试点评估，结果显示在所有10个评估技能领域均具有统计显著的自效能提升（p < 0.001），其中在钩子和自定义技能等高级功能上效果最大。
limitations: 试点评估样本量较小（27人），可能无法代表广泛开发者群体。
摘要未提及长期学习效果或实际编码能力提升的客观测量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个模块化交互式课程cc-self-train，用于教授AI编码工具Claude Code，通过人物角色渐进模型、自适应学习系统等设计提升学习效果。

papers.title: EHRAG: Bridging Semantic Gaps in Lightweight GraphRAG via Hybrid Hypergraph Construction and Retrieval
papers.abstract: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) enhances LLMs by structuring corpus into graphs to facilitate multi-hop reasoning. While recent lightweight approaches reduce indexing costs by leveraging Named Entity Recognition (NER), they rely strictly on structural co-occurrence, failing to capture latent semantic connections between disjoint entities. To address this, we propose EHRAG, a lightweight RAG framework that constructs a hypergraph capturing both structure and semantic level relationships, employing a hybrid structural-semantic retrieval mechanism. Specifically, EHRAG constructs structural hyperedges based on sentence-level co-occurrence with lightweight entity extraction and semantic hyperedges by clustering entity text embeddings, ensuring the hypergraph encompasses both structural and semantic information. For retrieval, EHRAG performs a structure-semantic hybrid diffusion with topic-aware scoring and personalized pagerank (PPR) refinement to identify the top-k relevant documents. Experiments on four datasets show that EHRAG outperforms state-of-the-art baselines while maintaining linear indexing complexity and zero token consumption for construction. Code is available at https://github.com/yfsong00/EHRAG.

analysis.tldr: EHRAG通过混合超图构建和检索，在轻量级GraphRAG中弥合结构-语义鸿沟，实现高效多跳推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有轻量级GraphRAG方法依赖NER构建结构图，仅捕捉共现关系，忽略了实体间的潜在语义连接，限制了多跳推理能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持轻量级索引和零token消耗的同时，在GraphRAG中融合结构共现和语义相似性以提升检索质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EHRAG框架，构建混合超图：结构超边基于句子级共现，语义超边通过聚类实体文本嵌入得到；检索时采用结构-语义混合扩散，结合主题感知评分和个性化PageRank精炼，选出top-k相关文档。
contributions: 提出轻量级混合超图构建方法，同时捕获结构共现和语义相似性。
设计结构-语义混合扩散检索机制，提升多跳推理的文档召回质量。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数据集上实验，EHRAG优于现有基线，且保持线性索引复杂度和零token消耗。
limitations: 语义超边的聚类质量可能受嵌入模型影响。
未讨论超大规模语料下的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EHRAG通过混合超图构建和检索，在轻量级GraphRAG中弥合结构-语义鸿沟，实现高效多跳推理。

papers.title: Beyond the Bellman Fixed Point: Geometry and Fast Policy Identification in Value Iteration
papers.abstract: Q-value iteration (Q-VI) is usually analyzed through the \(γ\)-contraction of the Bellman operator. This argument proves convergence to \(Q^*\), but it gives only a coarse account of when the induced greedy policy becomes optimal. We study discounted Q-VI as a switching system and focus on the practically optimal solution set (POSS), the set of \(Q\)-functions whose tie-broken greedy policies are optimal. The main result shows that Q-VI reaches the optimal action class in finite time by entering an invariant tube around \(\mathcal X_1=Q^*+\operatorname{span}(\mathbf 1)\), which is contained in the POSS. For every \(\varepsilon>0\), the distance to \(\mathcal X_1\) satisfies an exponential bound with rate \((\barρ+\varepsilon)^k\), where \(\barρ\) is the joint spectral radius of the projected switching family restricted to directions transverse to \(\mathcal X_1\). When \(\barρ<γ\), this transverse convergence is faster than the classical contraction rate. The analysis separates fast policy identification from the subsequent convergence to \(Q^*\), which may still be governed by the all-ones mode. We also give spectral and graph-theoretic conditions under which the strict inequality \(\barρ<γ\) holds or fails.

analysis.tldr: Q值迭代在达到最优策略前会进入一个不变管，其横向收敛速度可能快于经典γ收缩率。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典Q值迭代分析仅关注Q函数收敛到Q*，但忽略了贪婪策略何时变得最优这一关键问题，导致对策略识别速度的理解不足。
analysis.problem: 量化Q值迭代中贪婪策略达到最优所需的有限时间步，并揭示其几何收敛特性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Q值迭代进入一个包含最优动作类的不变管后，策略即达到最优；横向收敛速度由联合谱半径ρ̄控制，可能快于γ。
analysis.method: 将Q值迭代建模为切换系统，定义实际最优解集(POSS)和不变管，利用联合谱半径分析横向收敛速率。
contributions: 证明Q值迭代在有限步内进入不变管，从而策略达到最优，分离了策略识别与Q函数收敛。
给出横向收敛速率的指数界，并揭示其可能快于经典γ收缩率，同时提供谱和图论条件判断ρ̄<γ是否成立。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于折扣MDP，未扩展到无折扣或平均奖励情形。
联合谱半径的计算可能复杂，实际应用需进一步简化条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Q值迭代在达到最优策略前会进入一个不变管，其横向收敛速度可能快于经典γ收缩率。

papers.title: TrafficClaw: Generalizable Urban Traffic Control via Unified Physical Environment Modeling
papers.abstract: Urban traffic control is a system-level coordination problem spanning heterogeneous subsystems, including traffic signals, freeways, public transit, and taxi services. Existing optimization-based, reinforcement learning (RL), and emerging LLM-based approaches are largely designed for isolated tasks, limiting both cross-task generalization and the ability to capture coupled physical dynamics across subsystems. We argue that effective system-level control requires a unified physical environment in which subsystems share infrastructure, mobility demand, and spatiotemporal constraints, allowing local interventions to propagate through the network. To this end, we propose TrafficClaw, a framework for general urban traffic control built upon a unified runtime environment. TrafficClaw integrates heterogeneous subsystems into a shared dynamical system, enabling explicit modeling of cross-subsystem interactions and closed-loop agent-environment feedback. Within this environment, we develop an LLM agent with executable spatiotemporal reasoning and reusable procedural memory, supporting unified diagnostics across subsystems and continual strategy refinement. Furthermore, we introduce a multi-stage training pipeline with supervised initialization and agentic RL with system-level optimization, further enabling coordinated and system-aware performance. Experiments demonstrate that TrafficClaw achieves robust, transferable, and system-aware performance across unseen traffic scenarios, dynamics, and task configurations. Our project is available at https://github.com/usail-hkust/TrafficClaw.

analysis.tldr: 提出TrafficClaw框架，通过统一物理环境建模实现跨子系统的城市交通控制泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有城市交通控制方法（优化、RL、LLM）多针对孤立任务设计，缺乏跨任务泛化能力和对子系统间耦合物理动态的捕捉，难以实现系统级协调。
analysis.problem: 如何构建统一物理环境，使交通信号、高速公路、公交、出租车等异构子系统共享基础设施和时空约束，实现跨子系统交互建模与系统级优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TrafficClaw框架，包含统一运行时环境集成异构子系统；LLM智能体具备可执行时空推理和可重用程序记忆；多阶段训练流程（监督初始化+智能体RL系统级优化）。
contributions: 提出统一物理环境建模方法，显式建模跨子系统交互和闭环反馈。
开发LLM智能体支持统一诊断和持续策略优化。
设计多阶段训练流程实现系统级协调性能。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明TrafficClaw在未见过的交通场景、动态和任务配置下实现鲁棒、可迁移且系统感知的性能。摘要未提供具体实验细节。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量仿真环境，真实部署需进一步验证。
LLM推理开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TrafficClaw框架，通过统一物理环境建模实现跨子系统的城市交通控制泛化。

papers.title: From Adaptation to Generalization: Adaptive Visual Prompting for Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Visual prompting has emerged as a powerful method for adapting pre-trained models to new domains without updating model parameters. However, existing prompting methods typically optimize a single prompt per domain and apply it uniformly to all inputs, limiting their ability to generalize under intra and inter-domain variability, which is especially critical in the medical field. To address this, we propose APEX, an Adaptive Prompt EXtraction framework that retrieves input-specific prompts from a learnable prompt memory. The memory stores diverse, domain-discriminative prompt representations and is queried via domain features extracted from the Fourier spectrum. To learn robust and discriminative domain features, we introduce a novel Low-Frequency Feature Contrastive (LFC) learning framework that clusters representations from the same domain while separating those from different domains. Extensive experiments on two medical segmentation tasks demonstrate that APEX significantly improves generalization across both seen and unseen domains. Furthermore, it complements any existing backbones and consistently enhances performance, confirming its effectiveness as a plug-and-play prompting solution in medical fields. The code is available at https://github.com/cetinkayaevren/apex/

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应视觉提示框架APEX，通过可学习提示记忆和低频特征对比学习提升医学图像分割的跨域泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉提示方法为每个域优化单一提示并统一应用于所有输入，难以应对医学图像中域内和域间的高变异性，导致泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计输入自适应的视觉提示机制，以提升预训练模型在医学图像分割中跨已知和未知域的泛化性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出APEX框架，包含可学习提示记忆库，通过从傅里叶频谱提取的域特征查询输入特定提示；并引入低频特征对比学习（LFC）来学习鲁棒且具有判别性的域特征。
contributions: 提出自适应提示提取框架APEX，实现输入特定的提示生成，提升跨域泛化。
引入低频特征对比学习（LFC），利用傅里叶频谱信息学习域判别性特征。
在两项医学分割任务上验证APEX显著提升已知和未知域的泛化性能，且可作为即插即用模块增强现有骨干网络。
analysis.experiments: 在两个医学分割任务上进行实验，结果表明APEX显著提升了跨已知和未知域的泛化性能，并能作为即插即用模块一致提升现有骨干网络性能。
limitations: 可能依赖傅里叶频谱特征的质量，对频谱信息不明显的域效果有限。
提示记忆库的规模可能影响检索效率和泛化边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应视觉提示框架APEX，通过可学习提示记忆和低频特征对比学习提升医学图像分割的跨域泛化能力。

papers.title: HSG: Hyperbolic Scene Graph
papers.abstract: Scene graph representations enable structured visual understanding by modeling objects and their relationships, and have been widely used for multiview and 3D scene reasoning. Existing methods such as MSG learn scene graph embeddings in Euclidean space using contrastive learning and attention based association. However, Euclidean geometry does not explicitly capture hierarchical entailment relationships between places and objects, limiting the structural consistency of learned representations. To address this, we propose Hyperbolic Scene Graph (HSG), which learns scene graph embeddings in hyperbolic space where hierarchical relationships are naturally encoded through geometric distance. Our results show that HSG improves hierarchical structure quality while maintaining strong retrieval performance. The largest gains are observed in graph level metrics: HSG achieves a PP IoU of 33.17 and the highest Graph IoU of 33.51, outperforming the best AoMSG variant (25.37) by 8.14, highlighting the effectiveness of hyperbolic representation learning for scene graph modeling. Code: https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/HSG.

analysis.tldr: 将场景图嵌入到双曲空间中以更好地编码层次关系，提升结构质量与检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有场景图方法在欧氏空间中学习嵌入，无法显式捕获物体与地点之间的层次蕴含关系，导致表征的结构一致性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何学习能自然编码层次关系的场景图嵌入，同时保持强检索性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双曲场景图（HSG），在双曲空间中学习场景图嵌入，利用双曲几何的距离特性自然编码层次关系。
contributions: 首次将双曲几何引入场景图表示学习，解决欧氏空间无法建模层次蕴含的问题。
在场景图检索和层次结构质量指标上取得显著提升，Graph IoU 提升 8.14。
analysis.experiments: 在场景图检索任务上评估，HSG 的 PP IoU 达 33.17，Graph IoU 达 33.51，优于最佳基线 AoMSG（25.37）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有明确层次结构的场景图数据。
双曲空间中的优化和计算复杂度可能高于欧氏方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将场景图嵌入到双曲空间中以更好地编码层次关系，提升结构质量与检索性能。

papers.title: Learned Nonlocal Feature Matching and Filtering for RAW Image Denoising
papers.abstract: Being one of the oldest and most basic problems in image processing, image denoising has seen a resurgence spurred by rapid advances in deep learning. Yet, most modern denoising architectures make limited use of the technical knowledge acquired researching the classical denoisers that came before the mainstream use of neural networks, instead relying on depth and large parameter counts. This poses a challenge not only for understanding the properties of such networks, but also for deploying them on real devices which may present resource constraints and diverse noise profiles. Tackling both issues, we propose an architecture dedicated to RAW-to-RAW denoising that incorporates the interpretable structure of classical self-similarity-based denoisers into a fully learnable neural network. Our design centers on a novel nonlocal block that parallels the established pipeline of neighbor matching, collaborative filtering and aggregation popularized by nonlocal patch-based methods, operating on learned multiscale feature representations. This built-in nonlocality efficiently expands the receptive field, sufficing a single block per scale with a moderate number of neighbors to obtain high-quality results. Training the network on a curated dataset with clean real RAW data and modeled synthetic noise while conditioning it on a noise level map yields a sensor-agnostic denoiser that generalizes effectively to unseen devices.
