Both quantitative and visual results on benchmarks and in-the-wild photographs position our method as a practical and interpretable solution for real-world RAW denoising, achieving results competitive with state-of-the-art convolutional and transformer-based denoisers while using significantly fewer parameters. The code is available at https://github.com/MIA-UIB/nonlocal-matchfilter .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合经典自相似性与可学习非局部模块的RAW图像去噪网络，以少量参数达到SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习去噪网络依赖深度和大参数量，缺乏可解释性且难以部署到资源受限设备；经典去噪方法虽可解释但性能不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高去噪性能的同时，减少网络参数并增强可解释性，实现传感器无关的RAW图像去噪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计一种可学习的非局部块，模拟经典非局部自相似去噪的邻居匹配、协同滤波和聚合流程，在可学习多尺度特征上操作；结合真实干净RAW数据和模拟合成噪声训练，并利用噪声水平图条件化，实现传感器无关。
contributions: 提出一种融合经典自相似去噪结构的新型可学习非局部块，用于RAW图像去噪。
构建传感器无关的去噪器，在多个基准和真实照片上以显著更少的参数达到与SOTA卷积和Transformer去噪器竞争的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集和真实照片上进行了定量和视觉对比，结果显示方法在参数更少的情况下与SOTA方法竞争。
limitations: 可能对极端噪声或复杂场景的泛化能力有待进一步验证。
非局部块的计算复杂度可能仍较高，需优化实际部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合经典自相似性与可学习非局部模块的RAW图像去噪网络，以少量参数达到SOTA性能。

papers.title: SegTTA: Training-Free Test-Time Augmentation for Zero-Shot Medical Imaging Segmentation
papers.abstract: Increasingly advanced data augmentation techniques have greatly aided clinical medical research, increasing data diversity and improving model generalization capabilities. Although most current basic models exhibit strong generalization abilities, image quality varies due to differences in equipment and operators. To address these challenges, we present SegTTA, a framework that improves medical image segmentation without model retraining by combining four augmentations (Gamma correction, Contrast enhancement, Gaussian blur, Gaussian noise) with weighted voting across multiple MedSAM2 checkpoints. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements across three diverse datasets: healthy uterus segmentation, uterine myoma detection, and multi class hepatic structure segmentation. Ablation studies reveal that large organs benefit from intensity augmentations while small lesions require noise augmentations. The voting threshold controls the coverage precision trade off, enabling task specific optimization for different clinical requirements. Ultimately, on a multiclass hepatic vessel dataset, compared to MedSAM2 baselines, our method achieves an increase of 1.6 in mIoU and 1.9 in aIoU, along with a reduction of approximately 2.0 in HD95. Code will be available at https://github.com/AIGeeksGroup/SegTTA.

analysis.tldr: 无需重训练的测试时增强框架SegTTA，通过组合四种图像增强与多模型加权投票，提升零样本医学图像分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基础模型泛化能力强，但医学图像因设备和操作差异导致质量不一，需要无需重训练的方法来提升分割鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，通过测试时增强提高医学图像分割的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 大器官受益于强度增强（如Gamma校正、对比度增强），小病灶需要噪声增强（如高斯模糊、高斯噪声）；投票阈值控制覆盖与精度的权衡。
analysis.method: 结合Gamma校正、对比度增强、高斯模糊、高斯噪声四种增强，对多个MedSAM2检查点的预测结果进行加权投票。
contributions: 提出无需重训练的测试时增强框架SegTTA，适用于零样本医学图像分割。
通过实验揭示了不同器官大小对增强类型的偏好，以及投票阈值对覆盖-精度权衡的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在健康子宫分割、子宫肌瘤检测、多类肝脏结构分割三个数据集上验证，并在多类肝血管数据集上相比MedSAM2基线mIoU提升1.6，aIoU提升1.9，HD95降低约2.0。
limitations: 仅基于MedSAM2模型，可能不直接适用于其他架构。
增强组合和投票权重需针对任务调整，泛化性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无需重训练的测试时增强框架SegTTA，通过组合四种图像增强与多模型加权投票，提升零样本医学图像分割性能。

papers.title: Compiling Deterministic Structure into SLM Harnesses
papers.abstract: Enterprise SLM deployment faces epistemic asymmetry: small models cannot self-correct reasoning errors, while frontier LLMs incur prohibitive costs and data sovereignty risks at scale. We propose Semantic Gradient Descent (SGDe), a teacher-student framework that compiles agentic workflows into discrete execution plans--DAG topologies, system prompts, and deterministic code. The trailing e distinguishes this discrete, compilation-based approach from stochastic gradient descent. Operating in discrete semantic space, a frontier teacher generates natural-language critiques that serve as directional gradients to iteratively refine the SLM's workflow artefacts. We formalise SGDe under PAC learning, establishing sample-complexity bounds that enable convergence with as few as three training examples by leveraging the teacher as a statistical prior. On an adversarially synthesized GSM-Hard test set, compiled workflows achieve 91.3% accuracy at m=5 and 99.3% at m=3--a +26.3% to +34.3% absolute gain over state-of-the-art prompt optimisers. Within harness engineering, SGDe treats deterministic code placement (which subtasks to delegate to Python versus retain as LLM calls) as a trace-driven, per-node optimisation target, generalising static whole-problem offloading in PAL and PoT. The teacher compiles two deterministic structures: capability offloading (delegating subtasks to Python when the SLM is unreliable) and structural consensus (wrapping variance-sensitive steps in fan-out/fan-in subgraphs with deterministic voting).

analysis.tldr: 提出语义梯度下降（SGDe），通过教师模型将智能体工作流编译为确定性执行计划，显著提升小模型推理准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业部署小语言模型（SLM）面临认知不对称问题：小模型无法自我纠正推理错误，而大模型成本高昂且存在数据主权风险。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大模型在线推理的情况下，提升小模型在复杂推理任务上的准确性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出语义梯度下降（SGDe）框架，教师模型在离散语义空间中生成自然语言批评作为方向梯度，迭代优化SLM的工作流工件（DAG拓扑、系统提示、确定性代码），并形式化PAC学习下的样本复杂度界限。
contributions: 提出SGDe框架，将智能体工作流编译为确定性执行计划，实现小模型推理性能的大幅提升。
理论证明在教师作为统计先验下，仅需3个训练样本即可收敛。
在GSM-Hard测试集上，编译工作流在m=5和m=3时分别达到91.3%和99.3%准确率，比最先进的提示优化器绝对提升26.3%至34.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在对抗性合成的GSM-Hard测试集上评估，编译工作流在m=5时准确率91.3%，m=3时99.3%，优于现有提示优化方法。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型的质量和领域覆盖。
编译过程可能增加前期部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义梯度下降（SGDe），通过教师模型将智能体工作流编译为确定性执行计划，显著提升小模型推理准确率。

papers.title: HyKey: Hyperspectral Keypoint Detection and Matching in Minimally Invasive Surgery
papers.abstract: Purpose: 3D reconstruction in minimally invasive surgery (MIS) enables enhanced surgical guidance through improved visualisation, tool tracking, and augmented reality. However, traditional RGB-based keypoint detection and matching pipelines struggle with surgical challenges, such as poor texture and complex illumination. We investigate whether using snapshot hyperspectral imaging (HSI) can provide improved results on keypoint detection and matching surgical scenes. Methods: We developed HyKey, a HYperspectral KEYpoint detection and description model made up of a hybrid 3D-2D convolutional neural network that jointly extracts spatial-spectral features from HSI. The model was trained using synthetic homographic augmentation and epipolar geometry constraints on a robotically-acquired dual-camera RGB-HSI laparoscopic dataset of ex-vivo organs with calibrated camera poses. We benchmarked performance against established RGB-based methods, including SuperPoint and ALIKE. Results: Our HSI-based model outperformed RGB baselines on registered RGB frames, achieving 96.62% mean matching accuracy and 67.18% mean average accuracy at 10 degree on pose estimation, demonstrating consistent improvements across multiple evaluation metrics. Conclusion: Integrating spectral information from an HSI cube offers a promising approach for robust monocular 3D reconstruction in MIS, addressing limitations of texture-poor surgical environments through enhanced spectral-spatial feature discrimination. Our model and dataset are available at https://github.com/alexsaikia/HyKey-Hyperspectral-Keypoint-Detection

analysis.tldr: HyKey利用高光谱成像和混合3D-2D CNN在微创手术中实现关键点检测与匹配，显著优于RGB方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 微创手术中基于RGB的关键点检测在纹理贫乏和复杂光照场景下性能不佳，而高光谱成像可提供额外光谱信息以增强特征判别。
analysis.problem: 解决微创手术场景中因纹理不足和光照复杂导致的关键点检测与匹配精度低的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HyKey模型，使用混合3D-2D CNN联合提取高光谱图像的空间-光谱特征，并通过合成单应性增强和对极几何约束进行训练。
contributions: 首次将高光谱成像用于微创手术中的关键点检测与匹配，并构建了RGB-HSI双相机腹腔镜数据集。
HyKey在匹配精度和姿态估计上显著优于SuperPoint和ALIKE等RGB基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在离体器官的机器人采集RGB-HSI数据集上评估，HyKey达到96.62%平均匹配精度和67.18%平均姿态估计精度（10度阈值）。
limitations: 仅在离体器官数据集上验证，未在体内手术场景测试。
高光谱成像设备可能增加系统复杂性和成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyKey利用高光谱成像和混合3D-2D CNN在微创手术中实现关键点检测与匹配，显著优于RGB方法。

papers.title: Attention Is not Everything: Efficient Alternatives for Vision
papers.abstract: Recently computer vision has seen advancements mainly thanks to Transformer-based models. However many non-Transformer methods are still doing well being a direct competition of Transformer-based models. This review tries to present a comprehensive taxonomy of such methods and organize these methods into categories like convolution-based models, MLP-based models, state-space-based and more. These methods are looked at in terms of how efficient they are, how well they scale, how easy they are to understand and how robust they are. A total of 40 papers were chosen for this study. The goal is to give a view of non-Transformer methods and find out what challenges and opportunities exist for future computer vision research.

analysis.tldr: 综述非Transformer视觉模型，分类比较效率、可扩展性等，指出未来挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer模型在计算机视觉中占据主导，但非Transformer方法仍有竞争力，缺乏系统梳理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对非Transformer视觉方法的全面分类和比较分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非Transformer方法（如卷积、MLP、状态空间模型）在效率、可扩展性等方面有独特优势，但未被充分总结。
analysis.method: 对40篇论文进行综述，按卷积、MLP、状态空间等分类，从效率、可扩展性、可理解性、鲁棒性四个维度分析。
contributions: 提出非Transformer视觉方法的分类体系
从多维度比较不同方法的优缺点，指出未来研究方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖40篇论文，可能不全面
未提供定量比较结果
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述非Transformer视觉模型，分类比较效率、可扩展性等，指出未来挑战。

papers.title: DEM Refinement and Validation on the Lunar Surface Using Shape-from-Shading with Chandrayaan-2 OHRC Imagery
papers.abstract: This study presents a Shape from Shading (SfS) framework to enhance sub-metre resolution lunar digital elevation models (DEMs) using imagery from the Orbiter High Resolution Camera (OHRC) aboard Chandrayaan-2. The framework applies SfS to an independent OHRC image of the same region, enabling SfS not just as a refinement tool, but as a source of new topographic data, unconstrained by stereo baseline limitations. The method is applied across three lunar sites, including the Cyrillus crater, the Vikram landing region, and the lunar south pole (Mons Mouton), with a systematic three-stage parameter sweep on the SfS smoothness weight. Results show measurable topographic enhancement, particularly in surface slope statistics, revealing fine-scale crater morphology previously unresolved. A limiting case is also characterized, where large pitch angle separation between the shading image and stereo pair reduces SfS sensitivity, and partial footprint coverage of the shading image is identified as a factor influencing spatially variable enhancement quality.

analysis.tldr: 利用Chandrayaan-2 OHRC影像的明暗形状法(SfS)提升月球亚米级DEM分辨率，并在三个月球站点验证了地形增强效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有月球数字高程模型(DEM)受限于立体基线，难以达到亚米级分辨率，而高分辨率影像可提供额外地形信息，但缺乏有效的融合方法。
analysis.problem: 如何利用单张高分辨率影像的明暗信息，在不依赖立体基线的情况下，提升已有DEM的分辨率和细节质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个基于明暗形状法(SfS)的框架，对同一区域的独立OHRC影像应用SfS，通过三阶段参数扫描优化平滑权重，生成新的地形数据并用于DEM精化。
contributions: 将SfS从精化工具扩展为独立的地形数据源，突破立体基线限制。
在三个月球站点（Cyrillus坑、Vikram着陆区、月球南极Mons Mouton）系统验证了方法，展示了坡度统计和细尺度坑形态的增强。
analysis.experiments: 在三个月球站点进行实验，通过三阶段参数扫描评估SfS平滑权重的影响，并与原始DEM对比坡度统计和坑形态。
limitations: 大俯仰角分离会降低SfS灵敏度。
部分覆盖的阴影影像会导致空间不均匀的增强质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用Chandrayaan-2 OHRC影像的明暗形状法(SfS)提升月球亚米级DEM分辨率，并在三个月球站点验证了地形增强效果。

papers.title: MoVE: Translating Laughter and Tears via Mixture of Vocalization Experts in Speech-to-Speech Translation
papers.abstract: Recent Speech-to-Speech Translation (S2ST) systems achieve strong semantic accuracy yet consistently strip away non-verbal vocalizations (NVs), such as laughter and crying that convey pragmatic intent, which severely limits real-world utility. We address this via three contributions. First, we propose a synthesis pipeline for building scalable expressive datasets to overcome the data scarcity limitation. Second, we propose MoVE, a Mixture-of-LoRA-Experts architecture with expressive-specialized adapters and a soft-weighting router that blends experts for capturing hybrid expressive states. Third, we show pretrained AudioLLMs enable striking data efficiency: 30 minutes of curated data is enough for strong performance. On English-Chinese S2ST, while comparing with strong baselines, MoVE reproduces target NVs in 76% of cases and achieves the highest human-rated naturalness and emotional fidelity among all compared systems, where existing S2ST systems preserve at most 14% of NVs.

analysis.tldr: MoVE通过混合语音专家架构在语音到语音翻译中保留笑声、哭泣等非语言发声，仅用30分钟数据即可达到76%的NV保留率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有S2ST系统虽语义准确，但会丢弃笑声、哭泣等非语言发声（NVs），这些声音承载语用意图，限制了实际应用价值。
analysis.problem: 如何在语音到语音翻译中有效保留并再现非语言发声（如笑声、哭泣），同时保持语义准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有S2ST系统最多仅保留14%的非语言发声，而MoVE通过混合专家架构和合成数据管道显著提升至76%。
analysis.method: 提出MoVE架构，包含Mixture-of-LoRA-Experts（混合低秩适配专家）和软权重路由器，结合表达专用适配器；并设计合成数据管道构建可扩展的表达性数据集。
contributions: 提出合成数据管道以解决非语言发声数据稀缺问题
提出MoVE架构，通过混合专家和软权重路由器捕捉混合表达状态
证明预训练AudioLLM在仅30分钟精选数据下即可实现强性能
analysis.experiments: 在英中S2ST任务上，与强基线相比，MoVE在76%的案例中再现目标非语言发声，并获得最高的人类自然度和情感保真度评分，而现有系统最多仅保留14%的非语言发声。
limitations: 仅针对英中语言对验证，其他语言对效果未知
合成数据质量可能影响泛化能力
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoVE通过混合语音专家架构在语音到语音翻译中保留笑声、哭泣等非语言发声，仅用30分钟数据即可达到76%的NV保留率。

papers.title: Self-Consistency from Only Two Samples: CoT-PoT Ensembling for Efficient LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Self-consistency (SC) is a popular technique for improving the reasoning accuracy of large language models by aggregating multiple sampled outputs, but it comes at a high computational cost due to extensive sampling. We introduce a hybrid ensembling approach that leverages the complementary strengths of two distinct modes of reasoning: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) and Program-of-Thought (PoT). We describe a general framework for combining these two forms of reasoning in self-consistency, as well as particular strategies for both full sampling and early-stopping. We show that CoT-PoT ensembling not only improves overall accuracy, but also drastically reduces the number of samples required for SC by a factor of 9.3x. In particular, the majority of tasks (78.6%) can be addressed with only two samples, which has not been possible with any prior SC methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoT-PoT集成方法，仅需两个样本即可实现高效自一致性推理，大幅降低计算成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 自一致性（SC）通过多次采样提升LLM推理准确率，但计算成本高，需要大量采样。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲准确率的前提下，显著减少自一致性所需的采样数量，降低推理成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 混合集成Chain-of-Thought（CoT）和Program-of-Thought（PoT）两种推理模式，提出通用框架及全采样和早停策略。
contributions: 提出CoT-PoT集成框架，结合两种推理模式提升自一致性效果。
将所需样本数量减少9.3倍，78.6%的任务仅需两个样本。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于数学推理等结构化任务。
早停策略的通用性未充分验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoT-PoT集成方法，仅需两个样本即可实现高效自一致性推理，大幅降低计算成本。

papers.title: Jupiter-N Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present Jupiter-N, a hybrid reasoning model post-trained from Nemotron 3 Super, a fully open-source 120 billion parameter LLM. We target three objectives: (1) agentic capability via uncertainty-curated trajectories; (2) UK cultural alignment via synthetic data grounded in cultural norms; and (3) Welsh language support via parallel corpora and LLM-translated Welsh conversations. Our data curation strategy carefully preserves the base model's capabilities: using our Forget-Me-Not framework, we mix on-policy synthetic replay with off-policy task data to mitigate catastrophic forgetting, and include a mixture of reasoning and non-reasoning traces to maintain Nemotron's hybrid reasoning ability. Jupiter-N achieves standout gains over Nemotron in Welsh (+18 on ARC-Easy, +5.25 on MMLU-Lite), terminal-use (+9.1 on Terminal Bench 2) and instruction following (+4.4 on IFBench), while retaining the base model capabilities. We frame this work as a reproducible template for sovereign post-training: substituting cultural knowledge, institutional corpora, and target languages produces an equivalent pipeline for any country. All model weights and all post-training datasets are publicly released under open licences.

analysis.tldr: 基于Nemotron 3 Super开源模型，通过混合推理后训练实现智能体能力、英国文化对齐和威尔士语支持，并公开所有数据和权重。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开源大模型在特定文化、语言和智能体任务上缺乏定制化能力，且后训练容易导致灾难性遗忘，需要一种可复现的主权后训练模板。
analysis.problem: 如何在不破坏基础模型能力的前提下，同时提升模型的智能体能力、文化对齐和低资源语言支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Jupiter-N混合推理模型，采用不确定性筛选轨迹增强智能体能力、基于文化规范的合成数据实现文化对齐、平行语料和LLM翻译对话支持威尔士语；使用Forget-Me-Not框架混合在线策略合成回放和离线策略任务数据以缓解灾难性遗忘，并混合推理与非推理轨迹保持混合推理能力。
contributions: 提出可复现的主权后训练模板，支持替换文化知识、机构语料和目标语言。
公开所有模型权重和后训练数据集，采用开放许可。
analysis.experiments: 在威尔士语（ARC-Easy +18, MMLU-Lite +5.25）、终端使用（Terminal Bench 2 +9.1）和指令跟随（IFBench +4.4）上取得提升，同时保持基础模型能力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定文化（英国）和语言（威尔士语），泛化性需验证。
未提供与其他开源后训练方法的全面对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于Nemotron 3 Super开源模型，通过混合推理后训练实现智能体能力、英国文化对齐和威尔士语支持，并公开所有数据和权重。

papers.title: Long-CODE: Isolating Pure Long-Context as an Orthogonal Dimension in Video Evaluation
papers.abstract: As video generation models achieve unprecedented capabilities, the demand for robust video evaluation metrics becomes increasingly critical. Traditional metrics are intrinsically tailored for short-video evaluation, predominantly assessing frame-level visual quality and localized temporal smoothness. However, as state-of-the-art video generation models scale to generate longer videos, these metrics fail to capture essential long-range characteristics, such as narrative richness and global causal consistency. Recognizing that short-term visual perception and long-context attributes are fundamentally orthogonal dimensions, we argue that long-video metrics should be disentangled from short-video assessments. In this paper, we focus on the rigorous justification and design of a dedicated framework for long-video evaluation. We first introduce a suite of long-video attribute corruption tests, exposing the critical limitations of existing hort-video metrics from their insensitivity to structural inconsistencies, such as shot-level perturbations and narrative shuffling. To bridge this gap, we design a novel long-video metric based on shot dynamics, which is highly sensitive to the long-range testing framework. Furthermore, we introduce Long-CODE (Long-Context as an Orthogonal Dimension for video Evaluation), a specialized dataset designed to benchmark long-video evaluation, with human annotations isolated specifically to genuine long-range characteristics. Extensive experiments show that our proposed metrics achieve state-of-the-art correlation with human judgments. Ultimately, our metric and benchmark seamlessly complement existing short-video standards, establishing a holistic and unbiased evaluation paradigm for video generation models.

analysis.tldr: 提出将长视频评估与短视频评估解耦，设计基于镜头动态的长视频指标和Long-CODE数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频评估指标主要针对短视频，无法捕捉长视频中的叙事丰富性和全局因果一致性等长程特征，亟需专门的长视频评估框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计能够有效评估长视频长程特征（如叙事连贯性、全局因果一致性）的指标和基准数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有短视频指标对镜头级扰动和叙事打乱等结构不一致性不敏感，暴露了其在长视频评估中的局限性。
analysis.method: 提出基于镜头动态的长视频评估指标，并构建Long-CODE数据集，该数据集包含专门针对长程特征的人工标注。
contributions: 提出将长视频评估与短视频评估解耦的视角，并设计基于镜头动态的长视频指标。
构建Long-CODE数据集，用于长视频评估基准，包含针对长程特征的人工标注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅关注长程结构特征，未涉及其他长视频属性如音频一致性。
数据集规模可能有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将长视频评估与短视频评估解耦，设计基于镜头动态的长视频指标和Long-CODE数据集。

papers.title: DGHMesh: A Large-scale Dual-radar mmWave Dataset and Generalization-focused Benchmark for Human Mesh Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar has shown great potential for contactless, privacy-preserving, and robust human sensing, yet existing mmWave-based human mesh reconstruction (HMR) studies are still limited by the lack of benchmarks for generalization analysis under configuration shifts and fair comparison of different algorithms. To address the limitation, we present DGHMesh, a large-scale dual-radar mmWave dataset and generalization-focused benchmark for HMR. It contains data from 15 subjects performing 8 actions, with 360,000 synchronized frames collected from FMCW radar, SFCW radar, RGB images, and high-precision 3D HMR annotations. In addition, the dataset provides synchronized raw I/Q data from both radar modalities and accurately calibrated radar spatial positions. The benchmark is designed to evaluate HMR methods under diverse measurement configurations, including human position shifts, human orientation shifts, subarray size variations, and cross-subject settings. Based on DGHMesh, we also propose mmPTM, a query-based multi-radar fusion framework that jointly exploits point clouds and imaging tubes for HMR. Extensive experiments are conducted against representative baselines under different settings. The results demonstrate that mmPTM consistently achieves outstanding accuracy and competitive generalization capability across multiple sub-benchmarks, validating the effectiveness of multi-radar fusion and the practical value of the proposed dataset and benchmark for mmWave-based HMR research. DGHMesh and mmPTM are publicly available at https://github.com/SPIresearch/DGHMesh.(The complete benchmark and code will be released after paper publication)

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模双雷达毫米波数据集DGHMesh和泛化基准，并设计多雷达融合框架mmPTM用于人体网格重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有毫米波人体网格重建研究缺乏用于配置变化下泛化分析的基准和不同算法的公平比较。
analysis.problem: 毫米波雷达人体网格重建在配置变化（如位置、朝向、子阵列大小、跨主体）下的泛化能力评估不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出mmPTM，一种基于查询的多雷达融合框架，联合利用点云和成像管进行人体网格重建。
contributions: 构建了大规模双雷达毫米波数据集DGHMesh，包含15名受试者、8种动作、36万帧同步数据及高精度3D标注。
设计了专注于泛化能力的基准，涵盖位置偏移、朝向偏移、子阵列大小变化和跨主体设置。
提出了多雷达融合框架mmPTM，在多个子基准上取得优异精度和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在DGHMesh基准上对多个代表性基线进行了广泛实验，mmPTM在多个子基准上持续取得优异精度和竞争力泛化能力。
limitations: 数据集仅包含15名受试者，规模可能不足以覆盖全部人群多样性。
仅使用两种雷达（FMCW和SFCW），其他雷达模态未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模双雷达毫米波数据集DGHMesh和泛化基准，并设计多雷达融合框架mmPTM用于人体网格重建。

papers.title: Where to Focus: Query-Modulated Multimodal Keyframe Selection for Long Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Long video understanding remains a formidable challenge for Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) due to the prohibitive computational cost of processing dense frame sequences. Prevailing solutions, which select a keyframe subset, typically rely on either a single visual-centric metric (e.g., CLIP similarity) or a static fusion of heuristic scores. This ``one-size-fits-all'' paradigm frequently fails: visual-only metrics are ineffective for plot-driven narrative queries, while indiscriminately incorporating textual scores introduces severe ``modal noise'' for purely visual tasks. To break this bottleneck, we propose Q-Gate, a plug-and-play and training-free framework that treats keyframe selection as a dynamic modality routing problem. We decouple the retrieval process into three lightweight expert streams: Visual Grounding for local details, Global Matching for scene semantics, and Contextual Alignment for subtitle-driven narratives. Crucially, Q-Gate introduces a Query-Modulated Gating Mechanism that leverages the in-context reasoning of an LLM to assess the query's intent and dynamically allocate attention weights across the experts. This mechanism intelligently activates necessary modalities while ``muting'' irrelevant ones, thereby maximizing the signal-to-noise ratio. Extensive experiments on LongVideoBench and Video-MME across multiple MLLM backbones demonstrate that Q-Gate substantially outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. By effectively suppressing modality-specific noise, it provides a robust, highly interpretable solution for scalable video reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出Q-Gate，一种即插即用、无需训练的关键帧选择框架，通过查询调制门控机制动态融合多模态专家，显著提升长视频理解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中，处理密集帧序列的计算成本高昂，现有关键帧选择方法采用单一视觉指标或静态融合启发式分数，无法适应不同查询类型，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何根据查询意图动态选择关键帧，避免模态噪声，实现高效且鲁棒的长视频理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 视觉指标对情节驱动查询无效，而盲目融合文本分数会为纯视觉任务引入模态噪声。
analysis.method: 提出Q-Gate框架，将关键帧选择视为动态模态路由问题，解耦为三个轻量级专家流（视觉定位、全局匹配、上下文对齐），并通过查询调制门控机制利用LLM的上下文推理动态分配专家权重。
contributions: 提出Q-Gate，一种即插即用、无需训练的关键帧选择框架，通过查询调制门控机制动态融合多模态专家。
在LongVideoBench和Video-MME上超越现有方法，有效抑制模态噪声，提供可解释的解决方案。
analysis.experiments: 在LongVideoBench和Video-MME上使用多个MLLM骨干进行实验，Q-Gate显著优于现有基线。
limitations: 依赖LLM的上下文推理能力，可能受限于LLM本身的质量。
专家流的设计可能需针对特定场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Q-Gate，一种即插即用、无需训练的关键帧选择框架，通过查询调制门控机制动态融合多模态专家，显著提升长视频理解性能。

papers.title: TransXion: A High-Fidelity Graph Benchmark for Realistic Anti-Money Laundering
papers.abstract: Money laundering poses severe risks to global financial systems, driving the widespread adoption of machine learning for transaction monitoring. However, progress remains stifled by the lack of realistic benchmarks. Existing transaction-graph datasets suffer from two pervasive limitations: (i) they provide sparse node-level semantics beyond anonymized identifiers, and (ii) they rely on template-driven anomaly injection, which biases benchmarks toward static structural motifs and yields overly optimistic assessments of model robustness. We propose TransXion, a benchmark ecosystem for Anti-Money Laundering (AML) research that integrates profile-aware simulation of normal activity with stochastic, non-template synthesis of illicit subgraphs.TransXion jointly models persistent entity profiles and conditional transaction behavior, enabling evaluation of "out-of-character" anomalies where observed activity contradicts an entity's socio-economic context. The resulting dataset comprises approximately 3 million transactions among 50,000 entities, each endowed with rich demographic and behavioral attributes. Empirical analyses show that TransXion reproduces key structural properties of payment networks, including heavy-tailed activity distributions and localized subgraph structure. Across a diverse array of detection models spanning multiple algorithmic paradigms, TransXion yields substantially lower detection performance than widely used benchmarks, demonstrating increased difficulty and realism. TransXion provides a more faithful testbed for developing context-aware and robust AML detection methods. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/chaos-max/TransXion.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个高保真反洗钱图基准数据集，通过结合实体画像模拟与随机异常子图生成，解决现有基准缺乏语义和模板偏差问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有反洗钱图数据集缺乏节点语义且依赖模板驱动异常注入，导致模型评估过于乐观，阻碍了真实场景下的方法发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能反映真实交易网络复杂性和异常多样性的高保真基准数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准因模板偏差导致模型性能被高估，而TransXion通过非模板合成异常子图，使检测性能显著下降，表明其更具挑战性和真实性。
analysis.method: 集成画像感知的正常活动模拟与随机非模板的非法子图合成，联合建模实体画像和条件交易行为，支持评估“出格”异常。
contributions: 提出TransXion基准，包含5万实体、300万交易，附有丰富人口统计和行为属性。
通过非模板异常合成和实体画像建模，提供更真实、更具挑战性的反洗钱评估环境。
实验表明TransXion重现了支付网络的关键结构特性，且检测难度高于现有基准。
analysis.experiments: 在多种检测模型上评估，TransXion上的检测性能显著低于现有基准，表明其难度和真实性。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有洗钱模式，异常合成仍基于特定随机过程。
数据集规模相对有限，可能无法完全代表全球金融网络。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个高保真反洗钱图基准数据集，通过结合实体画像模拟与随机异常子图生成，解决现有基准缺乏语义和模板偏差问题。

papers.title: Project resilience as network robustness
papers.abstract: Engineering projects are the result of the combined effort of their members. Yet, it has been documented that labor division withing projects is unevenly distributed: some project members are specialists undertaking only few tasks, whereas other are generalists and are responsible for the success of many tasks. Moreover, the latter are often facilitators of project integration. Such a workload distribution prompts one question: how resilient is a project to key personnel loss? Far from being a theoretical problem, the reliance of a project on a few key people can lead to severe economic losses and delays. We argue that current methods to estimate such a risk are unsatisfactory: some methods offer a best-case estimate and are, therefore, too optimistic; other methods fail to capture project fragmentation leading to biased estimates and unrealistic consequences in many settings. In this paper, we develop a novel method to assess project vulnerability by looking at it from the lens of network robustness. We compare our method against existing alternatives and show that it offers better and more consistent estimates of project resilience to personnel loss.

analysis.tldr: 从网络鲁棒性视角评估工程项目对关键人员流失的韧性。
analysis.research_motivation: 工程项目中关键人员流失可能导致严重经济损失和延误，现有风险评估方法过于乐观或无法捕捉项目碎片化，需要更准确的评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何准确评估工程项目对关键人员流失的韧性（脆弱性）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 项目内部分工不均，少数通才承担大量关键任务，导致项目对关键人员依赖度高。
analysis.method: 将项目视为网络，利用网络鲁棒性理论开发新的脆弱性评估方法。
contributions: 提出一种基于网络鲁棒性的项目韧性评估新方法
与现有方法比较，证明新方法能提供更一致和准确的估计

limitations: 可能未考虑人员替代或知识转移的影响
网络模型简化可能忽略项目动态特性
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从网络鲁棒性视角评估工程项目对关键人员流失的韧性。

papers.title: Reward Score Matching: Unifying Reward-based Fine-tuning for Flow and Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Reward-based fine-tuning steers a pretrained diffusion or flow-based generative model toward higher-reward samples while remaining close to the pretrained model. Although existing methods are derived from different perspectives, we show that many can be written under a common framework, which we call reward score matching (RSM). Under this view, alignment becomes score matching against a value-guided target, and the main differences across methods reduce to the construction of the value-guidance estimator and the effective optimization strength across timesteps. This unification clarifies the bias-variance-compute tradeoffs of existing designs, and distinguishes core optimization components from auxiliary mechanisms that add complexity without clear benefit. Guided by this perspective, we develop simpler, more efficient redesigns across representative differentiable and black-box reward alignment tasks. Overall, RSM turns a seemingly fragmented collection of reward-based fine-tuning methods into a smaller, more interpretable, and more actionable design space.

analysis.tldr: 提出奖励分数匹配（RSM）统一框架，将基于奖励的扩散/流模型微调简化为更可解释和高效的设计空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于奖励的微调方法从不同角度推导，缺乏统一视角，导致设计复杂且难以比较优劣。
analysis.problem: 如何统一并简化扩散和流模型的奖励微调方法，使其更可解释、高效且易于优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出不同方法可统一为奖励分数匹配框架，核心差异在于价值引导估计器和时间步优化强度，揭示了偏差-方差-计算权衡。
analysis.method: 提出奖励分数匹配（RSM）框架，将对齐视为对价值引导目标的分数匹配，通过统一视角简化设计，并开发更简单的重设计。
contributions: 统一了多种基于奖励的微调方法为奖励分数匹配框架，澄清了偏差-方差-计算权衡。
基于框架开发了更简单、更高效的微调方法，适用于可微和黑盒奖励对齐任务。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未涵盖所有奖励微调变体。
框架的理论优势需更多实证验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出奖励分数匹配（RSM）统一框架，将基于奖励的扩散/流模型微调简化为更可解释和高效的设计空间。

papers.title: The Open-Weight Paradox: Why Restricting Access to AI Models May Undermine the Safety It Seeks to Protect
papers.abstract: The governance of open-weight artificial intelligence (AI) models has been framed as a binary choice: openness as risk, restriction as safety. This paper challenges that framing, arguing that access restrictions, without governed alternatives, may displace risks rather than reduce them. The global concentration of compute infrastructure makes open-weight models one of the most viable pathways to sovereign AI capacity in the Global South; restricting such access deepens asymmetries while driving proliferation into unsupervised settings. This analysis proposes that hardware-layer governance, including chip-level attestation mechanisms such as FlexHEG, trusted execution environments, confidential computing, and complementary software-layer safeguards, offers a defense-in-depth alternative to the current binary. A threat model taxonomy mapping misuse vectors to hardware, software, institutional, and liability layers illustrates why no single governance mechanism suffices. To operationalize this approach, the paper argues that effective AI governance as a dual-use technology will likely require a multilateral institutional architecture functionally analogous, though not identical, to the role performed by the IAEA in the nuclear domain, with explicit safeguards against the co-option of hardware controls for domestic repression. The relevant policy question is how to make openness safer through technical and institutional design while addressing the transition realities of legacy hardware, attestation at scale, and civil liberties protection.

analysis.tldr: 论文挑战开放权重AI模型治理的二元对立，提出硬件层治理与多边机构架构作为更安全的替代方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI治理被简化为开放即风险、限制即安全的二元选择，但这种框架可能忽视风险转移和全球不平等问题，尤其影响全球南方国家获取主权AI能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既能利用开放权重模型优势，又能有效降低安全风险的治理机制，避免简单限制带来的风险扩散和权力不对称。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，限制开放权重模型访问可能将风险转移到无监督环境，并加深全球计算基础设施的集中化，导致安全目标适得其反。
analysis.method: 提出硬件层治理（如芯片级认证机制FlexHEG、可信执行环境、机密计算）与软件层防护相结合的多层防御策略，并建议建立类似IAEA的多边机构架构。
contributions: 挑战开放权重AI治理的二元对立框架，揭示限制访问可能带来的风险转移和全球不平等问题。
提出硬件层治理与多边机构架构相结合的综合治理方案，并给出威胁模型分类法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 硬件层治理可能面临遗留硬件兼容性和大规模部署挑战。
多边机构架构可能被滥用为国内镇压工具，需设计明确保障措施。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文挑战开放权重AI模型治理的二元对立，提出硬件层治理与多边机构架构作为更安全的替代方案。

papers.title: DuConTE: Dual-Granularity Text Encoder with Topology-Constrained Attention for Text-attributed Graphs
papers.abstract: Text-attributed graphs integrate semantic information of node texts with topological structure, offering significant value in various applications such as document classification and information extraction. Existing approaches typically encode textual content using language models (LMs), followed by graph neural networks (GNNs) to process structural information. However, during the LM-based text encoding phase, most methods not only perform semantic interaction solely at the word-token granularity, but also neglect the structural dependencies among texts from different nodes. In this work, we propose DuConTE, a dual-granularity text encoder with topology-constrained attention. The model employs a cascaded architecture of two pretrained LMs, encoding semantics first at the word-token granularity and then at the node granularity. During the self-attention computation in each LM, we dynamically adjust the attention mask matrix based on node connectivity, guiding the model to learn semantic correlations informed by the graph structure. Furthermore, when composing node representations from word-token embeddings, we separately evaluate the importance of tokens under the center-node context and the neighborhood context, enabling the capture of more contextually relevant semantic information. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that DuConTE achieves state-of-the-art performance on the majority of them.

analysis.tldr: 提出双粒度文本编码器DuConTE，通过拓扑约束注意力在文本属性图中融合语义与结构信息，实现SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在文本编码阶段仅进行词元级语义交互，忽略了不同节点文本间的结构依赖，限制了文本属性图的表示能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计文本编码器，使其在编码节点文本时同时考虑词元级语义和节点级结构依赖，以提升文本属性图的表示质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用级联双预训练LM架构，先进行词元级语义编码，再进行节点级编码；在自注意力中根据节点连接性动态调整注意力掩码矩阵，引导模型学习图结构约束的语义相关性；在组合节点表示时，分别评估中心节点上下文和邻域上下文下的词元重要性。
contributions: 提出双粒度文本编码器，同时捕获词元级和节点级语义。
引入拓扑约束注意力，利用图结构指导语义交互。
设计上下文感知的词元重要性评估机制，增强节点表示的上下文相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上实验，DuConTE在大多数数据集上达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 级联双LM架构可能增加计算开销。
对大规模图的可扩展性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双粒度文本编码器DuConTE，通过拓扑约束注意力在文本属性图中融合语义与结构信息，实现SOTA性能。

papers.title: EvoMaster: A Foundational Evolving Agent Framework for Agentic Science at Scale
papers.abstract: The convergence of large language models and agents is catalyzing a new era of scientific discovery: Agentic Science. While the scientific method is inherently iterative, existing agent frameworks are predominantly static, narrowly scoped, and lack the capacity to learn from trial and error. To bridge this gap, we present EvoMaster, a foundational evolving agent framework engineered specifically for Agentic Science at Scale. Driven by the core principle of continuous self-evolution, EvoMaster empowers agents to iteratively refine hypotheses, self-critique, and progressively accumulate knowledge across experimental cycles, faithfully mirroring human scientific inquiry. Crucially, as a domain-agnostic base harness, EvoMaster is exceptionally easy to scale up -- enabling developers to build and deploy highly capable, self-evolving scientific agents for arbitrary disciplines in approximately 100 lines of code. Built upon EvoMaster, we incubated the SciMaster ecosystem across domains such as machine learning, physics, and general science. Evaluations on four authoritative benchmarks (Humanity's Last Exam, MLE-Bench Lite, BrowseComp, and FrontierScience) demonstrate that EvoMaster achieves state-of-the-art scores of 41.1%, 75.8%, 73.3%, and 53.3%, respectively. It comprehensively outperforms the general-purpose baseline OpenClaw with relative improvements ranging from +159% to +316%, robustly validating its efficacy and generality as the premier foundational framework for the next generation of autonomous scientific discovery. EvoMaster is available at https://github.com/sjtu-sai-agents/EvoMaster.

analysis.tldr: EvoMaster是一个面向大规模科学发现的进化式智能体框架，通过持续自我进化在多个基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体框架多为静态、范围狭窄且缺乏从试错中学习的能力，无法满足科学发现固有的迭代需求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够持续自我进化、可扩展且领域无关的科学智能体框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EvoMaster框架，核心是连续自我进化，使智能体能够迭代优化假设、自我批评并逐步积累知识；基于该框架孵化了跨领域的SciMaster生态系统。
contributions: 提出EvoMaster，首个面向大规模科学发现的进化式智能体基础框架。
在四个权威基准上取得SOTA，相对改进达159%-316%。
analysis.experiments: 在Humanity's Last Exam、MLE-Bench Lite、BrowseComp和FrontierScience四个基准上评估，EvoMaster得分分别为41.1%、75.8%、73.3%和53.3%，全面优于基线OpenClaw。
limitations: 摘要未提及局限性，可能依赖基础模型能力。
跨领域泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EvoMaster是一个面向大规模科学发现的进化式智能体框架，通过持续自我进化在多个基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: STRIDE: Strategic Iterative Decision-Making for Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Hop Question Answering
papers.abstract: Multi-hop question answering (MHQA) enables accurate answers to complex queries by retrieving and reasoning over evidence dispersed across multiple documents. Existing MHQA approaches mainly rely on iterative retrieval-augmented generation, which suffer from the following two major issues. 1) Existing methods prematurely commit to surface-level entities rather than underlying reasoning structures, making question decomposition highly vulnerable to lexical ambiguity. 2) Existing methods overlook the logical dependencies among reasoning steps, resulting in uncoordinated execution. To address these issues, we propose STRIDE, a framework that separates strategic planning, dynamic control, and grounded execution. At its core, a Meta-Planner first constructs an entity-agnostic reasoning skeleton to capture the abstract logic of the query, thereby deferring entity grounding until after the reasoning structure is established, which mitigates disambiguation errors caused by premature lexical commitment. A Supervisor then orchestrates sub-question execution in a dependency-aware manner, enabling efficient parallelization where possible and sequential coordination when necessary. By dynamically deciding whether to retrieve new evidence or infer from existing facts, it avoids redundant queries and error propagation, while fusing cross-branch information and reformulating failed queries to enhance robustness. Grounded fact extraction and logical inference are delegated to specialized execution modules, ensuring faithfulness through explicit separation of retrieval and reasoning. We further propose STRIDE-FT, a modular fine-tuning framework that uses self-generated execution trajectories from STRIDE, requiring neither human annotations nor stronger teacher models. Experiments show that STRIDE achieves robust and accurate reasoning, while STRIDE-FT effectively enhances open-source LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出STRIDE框架，通过分离策略规划、动态控制和执行，解决多跳问答中的过早实体承诺和推理步骤依赖问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多跳问答需要跨文档检索和推理，现有方法过早绑定表面实体导致歧义，且忽略推理步骤间的逻辑依赖，造成执行不协调。
analysis.problem: 如何避免过早实体承诺带来的歧义错误，并协调多步推理的逻辑依赖，提升多跳问答的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法过早承诺表面实体而非推理结构，使问题分解易受词汇歧义影响；同时忽略推理步骤间的逻辑依赖，导致执行不协调。
analysis.method: STRIDE框架包含Meta-Planner构建实体无关的推理骨架，延迟实体绑定；Supervisor按依赖关系编排子问题执行，动态决策检索或推理；专用执行模块负责事实提取和逻辑推理。STRIDE-FT利用STRIDE自生成轨迹微调开源LLM。
contributions: 提出STRIDE框架，通过分离策略规划、动态控制和执行，解决过早实体承诺和推理依赖问题。
提出STRIDE-FT，无需人工标注或强教师模型，利用自生成轨迹微调开源LLM。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量检索器，检索失败时影响性能。
Meta-Planner构建推理骨架的泛化性可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STRIDE框架，通过分离策略规划、动态控制和执行，解决多跳问答中的过早实体承诺和推理步骤依赖问题。

papers.title: Phase-Scheduled Multi-Agent Systems for Token-Efficient Coordination
papers.abstract: Multi-agent systems (MAS) powered by large language models suffer from severe token inefficiency arising from two compounding sources: (i) unstructured parallel execution, where all agents activate simultaneously irrespective of input readiness; and (ii) unrestricted context sharing, where every agent receives the full accumulated context regardless of relevance. Existing mitigation strategies - static pruning, hierarchical decomposition, and learned routing - treat coordination as a structural allocation problem and fundamentally ignore its temporal dimension. We propose Phase-Scheduled Multi-Agent Systems (PSMAS), a framework that reconceptualizes agent activation as continuous control over a shared attention space modeled on a circular manifold. Each agent i is assigned a fixed angular phase theta_i in the range [0, 2*pi], derived from the task dependency topology; a global sweep signal phi(t) rotates at velocity omega, activating only agents within an angular window epsilon. Idle agents receive compressed context summaries, reducing per-step token consumption. We implement PSMAS on LangGraph, evaluate on four structured benchmarks (HotPotQA-MAS, HumanEval-MAS, ALFWorld-Multi, WebArena-Coord) and two unstructured conversational settings, and prove stability, convergence, and optimality results for the sweep dynamics. PSMAS achieves a mean token reduction of 27.3 percent (range 21.4-34.8 percent) while maintaining task performance within 2.1 percentage points of a fully activated baseline (p < 0.01, n = 500 per configuration), and outperforms the strongest learned routing baseline by 5.6 percentage points in token reduction with 2.0 percentage points less performance drop. Crucially, we show that scheduling and compression are independent sources of gain: scheduling alone accounts for 18-20 percentage points of reduction, robust to compression degradation up to alpha = 0.40.

analysis.tldr: 提出相位调度多智能体框架，通过循环流形上的相位激活和上下文压缩，实现27.3%的token节省且性能损失极小。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体系统存在严重的token效率问题，源于无结构并行执行和无限制上下文共享，而现有方法忽略了协调的时间维度。
analysis.problem: 如何通过引入时间调度机制，在保持任务性能的同时显著降低多智能体系统的token消耗。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出token低效的两个来源：所有智能体同时激活（无论输入是否就绪）和每个智能体接收全部累积上下文（无论相关性）。
analysis.method: 将智能体激活重新概念化为对共享注意力空间的连续控制，每个智能体分配固定相位角，全局扫描信号旋转激活窗口内的智能体，空闲智能体接收压缩上下文摘要。
contributions: 提出相位调度多智能体系统（PSMAS），将时间维度引入协调机制。
在多个基准上验证了平均27.3%的token减少，性能损失在2.1个百分点以内。
analysis.experiments: 在HotPotQA-MAS、HumanEval-MAS、ALFWorld-Multi、WebArena-Coord四个结构化基准和两个非结构化对话设置上评估，每配置n=500，p<0.01。
limitations: 可能依赖任务依赖拓扑的准确提取。
压缩退化阈值alpha=0.40可能不适用于所有场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出相位调度多智能体框架，通过循环流形上的相位激活和上下文压缩，实现27.3%的token节省且性能损失极小。

papers.title: Beyond Meta-Reasoning: Metacognitive Consolidation for Self-Improving LLM Reasoning
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong reasoning capabilities, and as existing approaches for enhancing LLM reasoning continue to mature, increasing attention has shifted toward meta-reasoning as a promising direction for further improvement. However, most existing meta-reasoning methods remain episodic: they focus on executing complex meta-reasoning routines within individual instances, but ignore the accumulation of reusable meta-reasoning skills across instances, leading to recurring failure modes and repeatedly high metacognitive effort. In this paper, we introduce Metacognitive Consolidation, a novel framework in which a model consolidates metacognitive experience from past reasoning episodes into reusable knowledge that improves future meta-reasoning. We instantiate this framework by structuring instance-level problem solving into distinct roles for reasoning, monitoring, and control to generate rich, attributable meta-level traces. These traces are then consolidated through a hierarchical, multi-timescale update mechanism that gradually forms evolving meta-knowledge. Experimental results demonstrate consistent performance gains across benchmarks and backbone models, and show that performance improves as metacognitive experience accumulates over time.

analysis.tldr: 提出元认知巩固框架，让LLM从过往推理经验中积累可复用元知识，实现自我改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有元推理方法局限于单次实例，忽略跨实例的可复用元推理技能积累，导致重复失败和高元认知开销。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM从历史推理经验中提取并巩固元认知知识，以持续提升未来推理表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前元推理方法存在‘ episodic ’局限，即每次推理独立执行复杂元推理流程，但未能积累经验，导致相同错误反复出现。
analysis.method: 提出元认知巩固框架，包括：1）实例级问题求解中分离推理、监控、控制角色以生成丰富元级轨迹；2）通过分层多时间尺度更新机制将轨迹巩固为可演化的元知识。
contributions: 提出元认知巩固概念，将元推理从单次实例扩展到跨实例经验积累。
设计实例级角色分离与分层多时间尺度更新机制，实现元知识的自动巩固与演化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在多个基准和骨干模型上取得一致性能提升，且性能随元认知经验积累而提高。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量元级轨迹生成，对初始推理能力要求较高。
分层更新机制的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出元认知巩固框架，让LLM从过往推理经验中积累可复用元知识，实现自我改进。

papers.title: Speculative Decoding for Autoregressive Video Generation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion is emerging as a promising paradigm for streaming video synthesis, with step distillation serving as the primary means of accelerating inference. Whether speculative decoding, the dominant acceleration strategy for large language models, can be effectively adapted to autoregressive video generation remains an open question, because video blocks are continuous spatiotemporal tensors with no token-level distribution for exact rejection sampling. We introduce SDVG, which brings speculative decoding to block-based autoregressive video diffusion by replacing token verification with an image-quality router. A 1.3B drafter proposes candidate blocks via four denoising steps; each block is VAE-decoded and scored by ImageReward using worst-frame aggregation--taking the minimum per-frame reward to catch single-frame artifacts that averaging would mask. Blocks scoring above a fixed threshold tau are accepted into the 14B target's KV cache; the rest are regenerated by the target. Two additional design choices prove critical: the first block is always force-rejected to anchor scene composition, and tau serves as a single knob that traces a smooth quality-speed Pareto frontier. On 1003 MovieGenVideoBench prompts (832x480), SDVG retains 98.1% of target-only VisionReward quality (0.0773 vs. 0.0788) at a 1.59x speedup with tau=-0.7, and reaches 2.09x at 95.7% quality retention--while consistently outperforming draft-only generation by over +17%. The framework is training-free, requires no architectural changes, and can be seamlessly integrated into existing autoregressive video generation pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 将投机解码引入自回归视频生成，用图像质量路由器替代令牌验证，实现训练无关的加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频扩散模型推理慢，步蒸馏是主要加速手段，但投机解码在视频生成中尚未被探索，因为视频块是连续张量，缺乏令牌级分布进行精确拒绝采样。
analysis.problem: 如何将投机解码有效适配到基于块的自回归视频扩散模型中，以加速推理而不牺牲质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SDVG框架：1.3B草稿模型通过4步去噪生成候选块，VAE解码后用ImageReward评分（最差帧聚合），高于阈值τ的块被14B目标模型接受并加入KV缓存，否则目标模型重新生成；第一个块强制拒绝以锚定场景构图，τ可调以平衡速度和质量。
contributions: 首次将投机解码引入自回归视频生成，提出基于图像质量路由器的验证机制。
设计关键组件：最差帧聚合评分、首块强制拒绝、单参数τ控制Pareto前沿。
在MovieGenVideoBench上实现1.59倍加速且质量保持98.1%，2.09倍加速质量保持95.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在1003个MovieGenVideoBench提示（832x480）上评估，SDVG在τ=-0.7时达到1.59倍加速，VisionReward质量0.0773（目标仅0.0788），质量保持98.1%；2.09倍加速时质量保持95.7%，且始终优于仅草稿生成17%以上。
limitations: 依赖ImageReward评分器，可能引入评分偏差。
阈值τ需要针对不同场景调整，未提供自适应方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将投机解码引入自回归视频生成，用图像质量路由器替代令牌验证，实现训练无关的加速。

papers.title: Shape: A Self-Supervised 3D Geometry Foundation Model for Industrial CAD Analysis
papers.abstract: Industrial CAD workflows require robust, generalizable 3D geometric representations supporting accuracy and explainability. We introduce Shape, a self-supervised foundation model converting surface meshes into dense per-token embeddings. Shape combines a structured 3D latent grid, a multi-scale geometry-aware tokenizer (MAGNO) with cross-attention, and a transformer processor using grouped-query attention and RMSNorm. A learned reconstruction prior enables per-region attribution for explainable predictions. Pretraining uses masked-token reconstruction of normalized geometry statistics and multi-resolution contrastive consistency. The 10.9M-parameter backbone is pretrained on 61,052 CAD meshes from Thingi10K, MFCAD, and Fusion360. On a held-out split of 2,983 meshes, Shape achieves reconstruction R2 = 0.729 and 98.1% top-1 retrieval under the Wang-Isola protocol, with near-zero reconstruction train/val gap (contrastive scores use a larger evaluation pool). A 2x2 ablation on loss type and target-space normalization shows per-dimension normalization is critical: without it, performance collapses (R2 < 0.14, top-1 < 88%); with it, both losses succeed (R2 > 0.70, top-1 > 96%). Smooth-L1 offers secondary stability. Code, embeddings, and an interactive demo are released at https://github.com/simd-ai/shape.

analysis.tldr: Shape是一个自监督3D几何基础模型，专为工业CAD分析设计，通过掩码重建和对比学习实现高精度可解释的几何表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业CAD工作流需要鲁棒、可泛化的3D几何表示，同时支持准确性和可解释性，现有方法在精度和解释性上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个自监督的3D几何基础模型，能够从表面网格中提取密集的逐token嵌入，并支持可解释的预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过消融实验发现，逐维度归一化对性能至关重要：缺少它会导致性能崩溃（R2<0.14，top-1<88%），而使用后两种损失函数均能成功（R2>0.70，top-1>96%），Smooth-L1提供次要稳定性。
analysis.method: Shape结合结构化3D潜在网格、多尺度几何感知分词器MAGNO（带交叉注意力）和Transformer处理器（分组查询注意力+RMSNorm），通过掩码重建和对比学习进行自监督预训练。
contributions: 提出Shape，一个自监督3D几何基础模型，用于工业CAD分析。
设计MAGNO分词器和学习重建先验，实现可解释的逐区域归因。
在多个CAD数据集上预训练，并展示高重建精度和检索性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Thingi10K、MFCAD和Fusion360的61,052个CAD网格上预训练，在2,983个网格的测试集上达到重建R2=0.729和98.1% top-1检索，并进行了2x2消融实验。
limitations: 仅针对CAD网格，可能不适用于其他3D数据（如点云）。
模型规模较小（10.9M参数），在大规模数据上的泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Shape是一个自监督3D几何基础模型，专为工业CAD分析设计，通过掩码重建和对比学习实现高精度可解释的几何表示。

papers.title: MESA: A Training-Free Multi-Exemplar Deep Framework for Restoring Ancient Inscription Textures
papers.abstract: Ancient inscriptions frequently suffer missing or corrupted regions from fragmentation, erosion, or other damage, hindering reading, and analysis. We review prior image restoration methods and their applicability to inscription image recovery, then introduce MESA (Multi-Exemplar, Style-Aware) -an image-level restoration method that uses well-preserved exemplar inscriptions (from the same epigraphic monument, material, or similar letterforms) to guide reconstruction of damaged text. MESA encodes VGG19 convolutional features as Gram matrices to capture exemplar texture, style, and stroke structure; for each neural network layer it selects the exemplar minimizing Mean-Squared Displacement (MSD) to the damaged input. Layer-wise contribution weights are derived from Optical Character Recognition-estimated character widths in the exemplar set to bias filters toward scales matching letter geometry, and a training mask preserves intact regions so synthesis is restricted to damaged areas. We also summarize prior network architectures and exemplar and single-image synthesis, inpainting, and Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approaches, highlighting limitations that MESA addresses. Comparative experiments demonstrate the advantages of MESA. Finally, we provide a practical roadmap for choosing restoration strategies given available exemplars and metadata.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的多示例图像修复框架，利用完好铭文示例的纹理和风格指导受损古代铭文纹理重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 古代铭文常因破损、侵蚀等导致文字缺失或模糊，影响阅读和分析，现有图像修复方法在铭文恢复中效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用完好铭文示例的纹理和风格信息，无需额外训练即可有效修复受损铭文图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MESA框架：使用VGG19卷积特征的Gram矩阵捕获示例纹理和风格，通过最小化均方位移选择最佳示例，利用OCR估计字符宽度确定层贡献权重，并采用训练掩码保护完整区域。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的多示例铭文纹理修复方法MESA。
引入基于OCR字符宽度的层贡献权重机制，使修复更符合文字几何结构。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到对比实验展示了MESA的优势，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖高质量且风格匹配的示例铭文。
可能不适用于严重破损或缺乏示例的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的多示例图像修复框架，利用完好铭文示例的纹理和风格指导受损古代铭文纹理重建。

papers.title: Deep learning based Non-Rigid Volume-to-Surface Registration for Brain Shift compensation Using Point Cloud
papers.abstract: Soft-tissue deformation remains a major limitation in image-guided neurosurgery, where intra-operative anatomy can deviate substantially from pre-operative imaging due to brain shift, compromising navigation accuracy and surgical safety. Existing compensation methods often rely on intra-operative MRI, CT, or ultrasound, which are disruptive and difficult to integrate repeatedly into the surgical workflow. In contrast, partial 3D cortical surfaces can be reconstructed as point clouds from stereoscopic microscopes or laser range scanners (LRS), capturing only a limited portion of the exposed cortex. This makes point cloud registration a practical alternative without interrupting surgery; however, such partial and noisy observations make deformation estimation highly challenging. In this study, we propose a deep learning-based framework for non-rigid volume-to-surface registration, enabling dense displacement field estimation from sparse intra-operative surface observations without explicit point correspondences or volumetric intra-operative imaging. The network leverages multi-scale point-based feature extraction and a hierarchical deformation decoder to capture both global and local deformations. The key contribution lies in integrating partial intra-operative surface information into the full pre-operative point cloud domain, enabling implicit correspondence learning and dense deformation recovery under limited visibility. Quantitative results demonstrate accurate recovery of fine-scale deformations, achieving an Endpoint Error (EPE) of 1.13 +/- 0.75 mm and RMSE of 1.33 +/- 0.81 mm under challenging partial-surface conditions. The proposed approach supports automatic, workflow-compatible brain-shift compensation from sparse surface observations.

analysis.tldr: 提出深度学习非刚性体-表配准框架，利用术中稀疏点云补偿脑移位，EPE达1.13mm。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑移位导致术中解剖与术前影像严重偏差，现有补偿方法依赖术中MRI/CT/超声，干扰手术流程且难以重复集成；而术中获取的局部皮层点云稀疏且含噪声，传统配准难以估计变形。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从稀疏、不完整的术中皮层点云观测中，估计全脑的密集位移场，实现非刚性体-表配准以补偿脑移位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于深度学习的非刚性体-表配准框架：利用多尺度点云特征提取网络和分层变形解码器，将部分术中表面信息集成到完整术前点云域，隐式学习对应关系并恢复密集位移场。
contributions: 提出无需显式点对应或术中体积成像的深度学习非刚性体-表配准方法。
在部分表面观测条件下实现密集位移场估计，EPE达1.13±0.75mm，RMSE达1.33±0.81mm。
analysis.experiments: 在部分表面条件下进行定量评估，报告了Endpoint Error (EPE)和RMSE指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定手术场景的仿真或有限临床数据训练。
未提及对极端变形或噪声的鲁棒性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出深度学习非刚性体-表配准框架，利用术中稀疏点云补偿脑移位，EPE达1.13mm。

papers.title: Back to Repair: A Minimal Denoising Network for Time Series Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: We introduce JuRe (Just Repair), a minimal denoising network for time series anomaly detection that exposes a central finding: architectural complexity is unnecessary when the training objective correctly implements the manifold-projection principle. JuRe consists of a single depthwise-separable convolutional residual block with hidden dimension 128, trained to repair corrupted time series windows and scored at inference by a fixed, parameter-free structural discrepancy function. Despite using no attention, no latent variable, and no adversarial component, JuRe ranks second on the TSB-AD multivariate benchmark (AUC-PR 0.404, 180 series, 17 datasets) and second on the UCR univariate archive by AUC-PR (0.198, 250 series), leading all neural baselines on AUC-PR and VUS-PR. Component ablation on TSB-AD identifies training-time corruption as the dominant factor ($Δ$AUC-PR $= 0.047$ on removal), confirming that the denoising objective, not network capacity, drives detection quality. Pairwise Wilcoxon signed-rank tests establish statistical significance against 21 of 25 baselines on TSB-AD. Code is available at the URL https://github.com/iis-esslingen/JuRe.

analysis.tldr: JuRe用极简去噪网络证明时间序列异常检测中架构复杂度不必要，训练目标正确实现流形投影原则即可。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间序列异常检测方法依赖复杂架构（如注意力、潜变量、对抗组件），但性能提升有限，且难以解释。本文探索是否可以通过简化架构并聚焦训练目标来达到同等或更优效果。
analysis.problem: 时间序列异常检测中，如何设计一个极简网络，使其仅通过正确的训练目标（去噪）实现高性能，同时避免不必要的架构复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但通过消融实验发现训练时加噪是主导因素（去除后AUC-PR下降0.047），说明去噪目标而非网络容量驱动检测质量。
analysis.method: JuRe：一个极简去噪网络，包含单个深度可分离卷积残差块（隐藏维度128），训练时修复被破坏的时间序列窗口，推理时使用固定无参数的结构差异函数进行评分。
contributions: 提出JuRe，一个极简去噪网络，在多个基准上达到领先性能，证明架构复杂度不必要。
通过消融实验和统计检验，确认训练时加噪（去噪目标）是性能的关键因素。
analysis.experiments: 在TSB-AD多变量基准（180个序列，17个数据集）上AUC-PR 0.404排名第二，在UCR单变量档案上AUC-PR 0.198排名第二，领先所有神经基线。在TSB-AD上对25个基线中的21个具有统计显著性。
limitations: 可能仅在特定类型的时间序列上有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
未与最新基于Transformer的方法进行直接比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JuRe用极简去噪网络证明时间序列异常检测中架构复杂度不必要，训练目标正确实现流形投影原则即可。

papers.title: SpatialImaginer: Towards Adaptive Visual Imagination for Spatial Reasoning
papers.abstract: Spatial intelligence, which refers to the ability to reason about geometric and physical structure from visual observations, remains a core challenge for multimodal large language models. Despite promising performance, recent multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often exhibit fragile reasoning traces in spatial intelligence tasks that involve consistent spatial state recognition. We argue that these failures stem from a mismatch between the spatial recognition mechanism and the text-only reasoning behavior of these MLLMs. Effective spatial reasoning requires low-level geometric structure to be faithfully preserved and updated throughout the reasoning process, whereas textual representations tend to abstract away precisely these critical details. To address this issue, we propose SpatialImaginer, a unified multimodal generation framework that integrates textual reasoning with visual imagination. Our framework adopts a divide-and-conquer strategy, using text chain-of-thought for high-level semantic planning and the visual imagination for geometry-sensitive state transformation and consistency preservation. To support this capability, we further introduce a difficulty-aware data engine with closed-loop verification to train the model to invoke visual imagination selectively when stable spatial state tracking is required. Extensive experiments on diverse spatial intelligence benchmarks show that SpatialImaginer achieves state-of-the-art performance and substantially improves robustness on complex multi-step spatial reasoning tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SpatialImaginer 框架，通过结合文本推理与视觉想象提升多模态大模型的空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在空间智能任务中表现脆弱，因为文本推理会丢失几何结构细节，导致空间状态追踪不一致。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型在空间推理中无法同时保持高层语义规划和低层几何结构保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多模态大模型在空间推理中失败的原因是空间识别机制与纯文本推理行为不匹配，文本表示会抽象掉关键的几何细节。
analysis.method: 提出 SpatialImaginer 统一多模态生成框架，采用分治策略：文本思维链用于高层语义规划，视觉想象用于几何敏感的状态变换和一致性保持；并引入难度感知数据引擎和闭环验证训练模型选择性调用视觉想象。
contributions: 提出 SpatialImaginer 框架，结合文本推理与视觉想象解决空间推理中的几何保真问题。
设计难度感知数据引擎与闭环验证，训练模型在需要稳定空间状态追踪时选择性调用视觉想象。
analysis.experiments: 在多个空间智能基准上达到最先进性能，显著提升复杂多步空间推理的鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量视觉想象生成，对低质量输入敏感。
分治策略可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SpatialImaginer 框架，通过结合文本推理与视觉想象提升多模态大模型的空间推理能力。

papers.title: Study and Improvement of Search Algorithms in Multi-Player Perfect-Information Games
papers.abstract: In this article, we generalize Unbounded Minimax, the state-of-the-art search algorithm for zero sums two-player games with perfect information to the framework of multiplayer games with perfect information. We experimentally show that this generalized algorithm also achieves better performance than the main multiplayer search algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 将双人零和完美信息博弈的Unbounded Minimax算法推广到多人完美信息博弈，实验表明性能优于现有算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多人完美信息博弈的搜索算法性能不足，现有算法存在局限性，需要更高效的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将双人零和博弈的最优搜索算法Unbounded Minimax推广到多人完美信息博弈，并提升搜索性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将Unbounded Minimax算法推广到多人完美信息博弈框架，并进行了实验验证。
contributions: 将Unbounded Minimax算法从双人零和博弈推广到多人完美信息博弈。
实验证明推广后的算法在多人博弈中优于现有主流搜索算法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验表明推广算法性能优于主要多人搜索算法，但未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于完美信息博弈，不适用于不完全信息博弈。
实验规模或场景可能有限，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将双人零和完美信息博弈的Unbounded Minimax算法推广到多人完美信息博弈，实验表明性能优于现有算法。

papers.title: Towards Generalizable Deepfake Image Detection with Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: In today's day and age, we face a challenge in detecting deepfake images because of the fast evolution of modern generative models and the poor generalization capability of existing methods. In this paper, we use an ensemble of fine-tuned vision transformers like DINOv2, AIMv2 and OpenCLIP's ViT-L/14 to create generalizable method to detect deepfakes. We use the DF-Wild dataset released as part of the IEEE SP Cup 2025, because it uses a challenging and diverse set of manipulations and generation techniques. We started our experiments with CNN classifiers trained on spatial features. Experimental results show that our ensemble outperforms individual models and strong CNN baselines, achieving an AUC of 96.77% and an Equal Error Rate (EER) of just 9% on the DF-Wild test set, beating the state-of-the-art deepfake detection algorithm Effort by 7.05% and 8% in AUC and EER respectively. This was the winning solution for SP Cup, presented at ICASSP 2025.

analysis.tldr: 使用集成视觉Transformer（DINOv2、AIMv2、OpenCLIP ViT-L/14）在DF-Wild数据集上实现通用深度伪造图像检测，AUC达96.77%。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度伪造图像检测面临生成模型快速演进和现有方法泛化能力差的挑战，亟需通用性更强的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 现有深度伪造检测方法在多样化生成技术下泛化能力不足，难以应对不断演变的伪造手段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成多个微调的视觉Transformer（DINOv2、AIMv2、OpenCLIP ViT-L/14），在DF-Wild数据集上训练和评估。
contributions: 提出基于集成视觉Transformer的通用深度伪造检测方法，在DF-Wild数据集上取得SOTA性能。
在IEEE SP Cup 2025中获胜，验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在DF-Wild测试集上，集成模型AUC达96.77%，EER为9%，优于单个模型和CNN基线，并超过SOTA方法Effort（AUC提升7.05%，EER降低8%）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集（DF-Wild），在其他数据集上的泛化性未验证。
集成模型计算成本较高，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用集成视觉Transformer（DINOv2、AIMv2、OpenCLIP ViT-L/14）在DF-Wild数据集上实现通用深度伪造图像检测，AUC达96.77%。

papers.title: When Text Hijacks Vision: Benchmarking and Mitigating Text Overlay-Induced Hallucination in Vision Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have substantially enhanced their ability across multimodal video understanding benchmarks spanning temporal, action, object, and spatial understanding. However, we identify a critical yet overlooked issue: when embedded on-screen text contradicts the visual scene, existing VLMs systematically hallucinate, prioritizing overlay textual semantics over the actual visual content. We define this phenomenon as Text Overlay-Induced Hallucination (TOIH). In this work, we propose VisualTextTrap, the first comprehensive benchmark, including large-scale human-validated samples with specifically designed evaluation metrics. In particular, we construct VisualTextTrap from widely-used public datasets using a scalable hybrid pipeline of VLMs assisted text generation and rigorous manual verification. The benchmark features 6,057 samples annotated across 88 fine-grained attributes within four dimensions, with hallucination intensity quantified on a five-level scale (L1--L5) that reflects the semantic contradiction between overlay text and visual reality. Moreover, we propose Visual Text Hallucination Mitigation Mixture-of-Experts (VTHM-MoE), a novel Vision-Text Disentanglement framework that employs a dual-encoder architecture. Concretely, four dimension-specialized expert modules spanning Temporal, Action, Object, and Spatial reasoning are first pre-trained to identify and leverage cross-modal discrepancies between textual semantics and actual video content. We develop an Adaptive Token Routing Strategy to enable dynamic expert allocation, conferring robust resistance to TOIH while preserving performance on uncontaminated videos. Extensive experiments conducted on our VisualTextTrap benchmark verify the effectiveness of VTHM-MoE, outperforming state-of-the-art counterparts with diverse video question answering tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个文本叠加幻觉基准VisualTextTrap和缓解方法VTHM-MoE，揭示VLM在文本与视觉矛盾时优先相信文本的缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在多模态视频理解中表现优异，但忽略了屏幕文本与视觉内容矛盾时模型会系统性产生幻觉，优先采纳文本语义而忽视真实视觉内容，这一关键问题尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 解决视觉语言模型中的文本叠加诱导幻觉（TOIH）问题，即当嵌入屏幕文本与视觉场景矛盾时模型产生幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当屏幕文本与视觉内容矛盾时，现有VLM系统性产生幻觉，优先采纳文本语义而非实际视觉内容，定义为文本叠加诱导幻觉（TOIH）。
analysis.method: 提出VisualTextTrap基准（含6057个人工验证样本，88个细粒度属性，五级幻觉强度）和VTHM-MoE方法（双编码器架构，四个维度专家模块预训练，自适应令牌路由策略动态分配专家）。
contributions: 首次定义并系统研究文本叠加诱导幻觉（TOIH）问题。
构建首个大规模人工验证的TOIH基准VisualTextTrap，含多级幻觉强度标注。
提出VTHM-MoE框架，通过视觉-文本解耦和专家混合有效缓解TOIH。
analysis.experiments: 在VisualTextTrap基准上进行了大量实验，VTHM-MoE在多种视频问答任务中优于现有方法。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖视频模态，未涉及图像或音频中的类似现象。
方法依赖预定义的四个维度专家，可能无法泛化到其他类型的文本叠加幻觉。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个文本叠加幻觉基准VisualTextTrap和缓解方法VTHM-MoE，揭示VLM在文本与视觉矛盾时优先相信文本的缺陷。

papers.title: Internalizing Outcome Supervision into Process Supervision: A New Paradigm for Reinforcement Learning for Reasoning
papers.abstract: The central challenge of reinforcement learning for reasoning lies not only in the sparsity of outcome-level supervision, but more fundamentally in how to transform feedback provided only at the end of a sequence into fine-grained learning signals that can guide intermediate reasoning steps. Existing approaches either rely on outcome-level rewards for sequence-level optimization, which makes precise credit assignment difficult, or depend on externally constructed process supervision, which is costly and difficult to scale sustainably. To address this, we propose a new perspective: reinforcement learning for reasoning can be understood as the problem of internalizing outcome supervision into process supervision. From this perspective, we introduce a supervision-internalization method for reinforcement learning for reasoning, enabling the model to automatically extract process-level learning signals through identifying, correcting, and reusing failed reasoning trajectories, thereby achieving finer-grained policy optimization under outcome-only supervision. We further abstract this idea into a new training paradigm, in which the model continually generates and refines its own internal process supervision during reinforcement learning, opening a new path for fine-grained credit assignment in reinforcement learning for reasoning that differs from externally provided process supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出将结果监督内化为过程监督的新范式，使模型在仅结果监督下自动提取过程级学习信号，实现细粒度策略优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习用于推理面临结果监督稀疏和外部过程监督成本高、难扩展的问题，亟需一种能自动生成细粒度学习信号的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何将序列末尾的结果反馈转化为中间推理步骤的细粒度学习信号，实现精确的信用分配。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出监督内化方法，通过识别、纠正和重用失败推理轨迹，自动提取过程级学习信号，实现仅结果监督下的细粒度策略优化。
contributions: 提出将结果监督内化为过程监督的新视角，重新定义推理强化学习问题。
引入监督内化方法，使模型自动生成内部过程监督，无需外部标注。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法可能依赖于失败轨迹的质量和多样性。
内化过程可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将结果监督内化为过程监督的新范式，使模型在仅结果监督下自动提取过程级学习信号，实现细粒度策略优化。

papers.title: ArgBench: Benchmarking LLMs on Computational Argumentation Tasks
papers.abstract: Argumentation skills are an essential toolkit for large language models (LLMs). These skills are crucial in various use cases, including self-reflection, debating collaboratively for diverse answers, and countering hate speech. In this paper, we create the first benchmark for a standardized evaluation of LLM-based approaches to computational argumentation, encompassing 33 datasets from previous work in unified form. Using the benchmark, we evaluate the generalizability of five LLM families across 46 computational argumentation tasks that cover mining arguments, assessing perspectives, assessing argument quality, reasoning about arguments, and generating arguments. On the benchmark, we conduct an extensive systematic analysis of the contribution of few-shot examples, reasoning steps, model size, and training skills to the performance of LLMs on the computational argumentation tasks in the benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 首个计算论证基准ArgBench，统一33个数据集评估LLM在46项论证任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 论证技能对LLM在自我反思、协作辩论、反仇恨言论等场景至关重要，但缺乏标准化评估基准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一基准来系统评估LLM在计算论证任务上的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建ArgBench基准，整合33个已有数据集，覆盖5大类46项任务，并系统分析少样本示例、推理步骤、模型规模和训练技能的影响。
contributions: 首个标准化计算论证基准ArgBench，包含33个统一格式的数据集。
对5个LLM家族在46项任务上的系统评估，分析多种因素对性能的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在46项任务上评估5个LLM家族，分析少样本示例、推理步骤、模型规模和训练技能的影响。
limitations: 基准仅包含已有数据集，可能未覆盖最新论证任务。
评估限于特定LLM家族，泛化性有待扩展。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个计算论证基准ArgBench，统一33个数据集评估LLM在46项论证任务上的表现。

papers.title: SGP-SAM: Self-Gated Prompting for Transferring 3D Segment Anything Models to Lesion Segmentation
papers.abstract: Large segmentation foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) have reshaped promptable segmentation in natural images, and recent efforts have extended these models to medical images and volumetric settings. However, directly transferring a 3D SAM-style model to lesion segmentation remains challenging due to (i) weak spatial representational capacity for small, irregular targets in intermediate features, and (ii) extreme foreground-background imbalance in 3D volumes.We propose SGP-SAM, a self-gated prompting framework for efficient and effective transfer to 3D lesion segmentation. Our key component, the Self-Gated Prompting Module (SGPM), performs conditional multi-scale spatial enhancement: a lightweight multi-channel gating unit predicts whether the current features require additional multi-scale fusion, and only then activates a Multi-Scale Feature Fusion Block to enrich spatial context. To further address small-lesion learning, we design a Zoom Loss that up-weights lesion-focused supervision by combining Dice and a voxel-balanced focal term.Experiments on MSD Liver Tumor and MSD Brain Tumor (enhancing tumor) show consistent gains over strong transfer baselines based on SAM-Med3D. On MSD Liver Tumor, SGP-SAM improves mDice by 7.3% over fine-tuning.

analysis.tldr: 提出自门控提示模块SGP-SAM，通过条件多尺度空间增强和Zoom Loss提升3D病灶分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D SAM模型直接迁移到病灶分割面临小目标空间表征弱和前景-背景极度不平衡的挑战，现有方法效果有限。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将3D SAM模型迁移到病灶分割，解决小、不规则目标的空间表征和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出3D SAM在病灶分割中中间特征对小、不规则目标的空间表征能力弱，且3D体积中前景-背景极度不平衡。
analysis.method: 提出SGP-SAM框架，核心是自门控提示模块（SGPM），通过轻量级多通道门控单元判断是否需要多尺度融合，并激活多尺度特征融合块；同时设计Zoom Loss结合Dice和体素平衡焦点项以增强小病灶监督。
contributions: 提出自门控提示模块SGPM，实现条件多尺度空间增强，有效提升小病灶特征表征。
设计Zoom Loss，通过加权病灶监督缓解前景-背景不平衡。
在MSD肝脏肿瘤和脑肿瘤数据集上取得一致提升，mDice提升7.3%。
analysis.experiments: 在MSD Liver Tumor和MSD Brain Tumor（增强肿瘤）上实验，与基于SAM-Med3D的强迁移基线相比，SGP-SAM在肝脏肿瘤上mDice提升7.3%。
limitations: 仅在两个肿瘤数据集上验证，泛化性需更多实验。
门控机制可能增加额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自门控提示模块SGP-SAM，通过条件多尺度空间增强和Zoom Loss提升3D病灶分割性能。

papers.title: LLM-Guided Strategy Synthesis for Scalable Equality Saturation
papers.abstract: Equality saturation (EqSat) is a powerful optimization paradigm that compactly represents many equivalent programs in an e-graph and delays commitment until extraction selects a lowest-cost program. Making EqSat effective, therefore, requires not only domain-specific rewrite rules but also domain-specific strategies. Today, much of this strategy design is still manual, making it a major obstacle to automating e-graph-based compilers. Recent rule-synthesis frameworks can automatically infer large rewrite vocabularies from semantic specifications, but they also enlarge the rewrite space and further exacerbate e-graph explosion. Although large language models (LLMs) make automated strategy synthesis plausible, directly evolving backend code remains ineffective in practice. The search lacks reusable strategy abstractions and actionable feedback, and can easily trigger e-graph explosion or converge to poor designs. We present EggMind, an LLM-guided, end-to-end framework for synthesizing reusable EqSat strategies. At its core, EggMind introduces a domain-specific language, EqSatL, to represent EqSat strategies as explicit and inspectable artifacts. It then proposes an LLM-guided agentic workflow, equipped with novel techniques including proof-derived rewrite motif caching and tractability guidance, to search efficiently for high-quality strategies while keeping synthesis stable under e-graph growth. Evaluation shows that EggMind substantially improves the resource-quality trade-off on vectorization benchmarks, reducing final cost by 45.1% and peak RAM by 69.1% relative to full EqSat. We further show that the same methodology transfers effectively to an XLA-based tensor compiler, and demonstrate its practical potential in a logic-synthesis case study with augmented rewrite spaces.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EggMind 框架，利用 LLM 引导的智能体工作流自动合成可复用的等式饱和策略，显著降低资源消耗并提升优化质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 等式饱和（EqSat）是强大的优化范式，但依赖领域特定的策略设计，目前主要靠手工完成，成为自动化 e-graph 编译器的主要障碍。现有规则合成框架虽能自动推断重写规则，但会扩大重写空间，加剧 e-graph 爆炸问题。
analysis.problem: 如何自动合成高质量、可复用的 EqSat 策略，避免 e-graph 爆炸并提升优化效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接使用 LLM 进化后端代码在实践中效果不佳，搜索缺乏可重用的策略抽象和可操作的反馈，容易触发 e-graph 爆炸或收敛到次优设计。
analysis.method: 提出 EggMind 框架，包含：1) 领域特定语言 EqSatL，将策略表示为显式可检查的工件；2) LLM 引导的智能体工作流，配备证明派生的重写模式缓存和可处理性引导技术，高效搜索高质量策略并保持合成稳定性。
contributions: 提出 EggMind，首个 LLM 引导的端到端框架，用于合成可复用的 EqSat 策略。
设计 EqSatL 语言，将策略表示为显式工件，便于检查和复用。
引入证明派生的重写模式缓存和可处理性引导技术，提升搜索效率并控制 e-graph 增长。
在向量化基准上实现最终成本降低 45.1%、峰值 RAM 降低 69.1%，并成功迁移到 XLA 张量编译器和逻辑综合案例。
analysis.experiments: 在向量化基准上评估，与完整 EqSat 相比，最终成本降低 45.1%，峰值 RAM 降低 69.1%。方法有效迁移到基于 XLA 的张量编译器，并在逻辑综合案例中展示了实际潜力。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 的生成质量，对复杂领域策略的泛化性有待验证。
EqSatL 的表达能力可能限制某些高级策略的表示。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EggMind 框架，利用 LLM 引导的智能体工作流自动合成可复用的等式饱和策略，显著降低资源消耗并提升优化质量。

papers.title: T-DuMpRa: Teacher-guided Dual-path Multi-prototype Retrieval Augmented framework for fine-grained medical image classification
papers.abstract: Fine-grained medical image classification is challenged by subtle inter-class variations and visually ambiguous cases, where confidence estimates often exhibit uncertainty rather than being overconfident. In such scenarios, purely discriminative classifiers may achieve high overall accuracy yet still fail to distinguish between highly similar categories, leading to miscalibrated predictions. We propose T-DuMpRa, a teacher-guided dual-path multi-prototype retrieval-augmented framework, where discriminative classification and multi-prototype retrieval jointly drive both training and prediction. During training, we jointly optimize cross-entropy and supervised contrastive objectives to learn a cosine-compatible embedding geometry for reliable prototype matching. We further employ an exponential moving average (EMA) teacher to obtain smoother representations and build a multi-prototype memory bank by clustering teacher embeddings in the teacher embedding space. Our framework is plug-and-play: it can be easily integrated into existing classification models by constructing a compact prototype bank, thereby improving performance on visually ambiguous cases. At inference, we combine the classifier's predicted distribution with a similarity-based distribution computed via cosine matching to prototypes, and apply a conservative confidence-gated fusion that activates retrieval only when the classifier's prediction is uncertain and the retrieval evidence is decisive and conflicting, otherwise keeping confident predictions unchanged. On HAM10000 and ISIC2019, our method yields 0.68%-0.21% and 0.44%-2.69% improvements on 5 different backbones. And visualization analysis proves our model can enhance the model's ability to handle visually ambiguous cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出教师引导双路径多原型检索增强框架，通过联合判别分类与原型检索提升细粒度医学图像分类在模糊案例上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 细粒度医学图像分类中类间差异细微、视觉模糊案例多，纯判别分类器虽整体准确率高但难以区分高度相似类别，导致预测校准差。
analysis.problem: 如何提升细粒度医学图像分类在视觉模糊案例上的判别能力和预测校准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在模糊案例中，分类器的置信度估计存在不确定性而非过度自信，纯判别方法难以区分高度相似类别。
analysis.method: 提出T-DuMpRa框架，包含双路径：判别分类路径和多原型检索路径。训练时联合优化交叉熵和监督对比损失，使用EMA教师网络获得平滑表征并构建多原型记忆库；推理时通过置信门控融合机制，仅在分类器不确定且检索证据决定性且冲突时激活检索。
contributions: 提出教师引导的双路径多原型检索增强框架，联合判别分类与原型检索。
设计EMA教师网络和聚类构建多原型记忆库，实现即插即用。
提出保守置信门控融合策略，仅在不确定时激活检索。
analysis.experiments: 在HAM10000和ISIC2019数据集上，使用5种不同骨干网络，准确率提升0.68%-0.21%和0.44%-2.69%，可视化分析证明模型增强了对模糊案例的处理能力。
limitations: 仅针对细粒度医学图像分类，泛化性未验证。
原型记忆库构建依赖聚类，可能受聚类质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出教师引导双路径多原型检索增强框架，通过联合判别分类与原型检索提升细粒度医学图像分类在模糊案例上的性能。

papers.title: PsychBench: Auditing Epidemiological Fidelity in Large Language Model Mental Health Simulations
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly deployed to simulate patients for clinical training, research, and mental health tools, yet population-level validity remains largely untested. We introduce PsychBench, the first epidemiological audit of LLM patient simulation: 28,800 profiles from four frontier models (GPT-4o-mini, DeepSeek-V3, Gemini-3-Flash, GLM-4.7) evaluated against NHANES and NESARC-III baselines across 120 intersectional cohorts. The central finding is a coherence-fidelity dissociation: models produce clinically plausible individuals while misrepresenting the populations they are drawn from.
