analysis.problem: 如何实现害虫的细粒度多模态学习，以提升识别和管理效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 害虫数据收集困难，种类多样且形态复杂，现有方法无法有效建模关键视觉和高层语义特征。
analysis.method: PestVL-Net 框架：视觉通路采用 RWKV 架构和显著性引导的自适应窗口划分；语言通路利用 MLLM 先验和农业专家知识，通过多模态 CoT 推理生成精确语义描述；最后深度融合视觉和文本表示。
contributions: 提出 PestVL-Net，一种新颖的视觉-语言框架，用于细粒度害虫学习。
构建两个多物种害虫数据集，促进细粒度害虫学习。
analysis.experiments: 在多个害虫数据集上进行广泛实验，验证了 PestVL-Net 的优越性能。
limitations: 依赖 MLLM 先验和专家知识，可能限制泛化性。
未提及计算开销和实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 PestVL-Net，通过细粒度视觉-语言交互实现多模态害虫学习。

papers.title: Fully Analog Resonant Recurrent Neural Network via Metacircuit
papers.abstract: Physical neural networks offer a transformative route to edge intelligence, providing superior inference speed and energy efficiency compared to conventional digital architectures. However, realizing scalable, end-to-end, fully analog recurrent neural networks for temporal information processing remains challenging due to the difficulty of faithfully mapping trained network models onto physical hardware. Here we present a fully analog resonant recurrent neural network (R$^2$NN) implemented via a metacircuit architecture composed of coupled electrical local resonators. A reformulated mechanical-electrical analogy establishes a direct mapping between the R$^2$NN model and metacircuit elements, enabling accurate physical implementation of trained neural network parameters. By integrating jointly trainable global resistive coupling and local resonances, which generate effective frequency-dependent negative resistances, the architecture shapes an impedance landscape that steers currents along frequency-selective pathways. This mechanism enables direct extraction of discriminative spectral features, facilitating real-time temporal classification of raw analog inputs while bypassing analog-to-digital conversion. We demonstrate the cross-domain versatility of this framework using integrated hardware for tactile perception, speech recognition, and condition monitoring. This work establishes a scalable, fully analog paradigm for intelligent temporal processing and paves the way for low-latency, resource-efficient physical neural hardware for edge intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种全模拟谐振递归神经网络，通过元电路架构实现端到端时间信息处理，无需模数转换。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理神经网络在边缘智能中具有速度和能效优势，但实现可扩展、端到端的全模拟递归神经网络仍面临挑战，主要困难在于将训练好的网络模型忠实映射到物理硬件上。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种全模拟递归神经网络架构，能够直接处理时间序列模拟信号，并实现训练参数到物理硬件的精确映射。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出全模拟谐振递归神经网络（R²NN），基于元电路架构，由耦合电局部谐振器组成；通过重新表述的机械-电类比建立R²NN模型与元电路元件之间的直接映射；集成可训练的全局电阻耦合和局部谐振，产生有效频率相关负电阻，形成阻抗景观，引导电流沿频率选择性路径流动，从而直接提取判别性频谱特征。
contributions: 提出一种全模拟谐振递归神经网络架构，实现端到端时间信息处理，无需模数转换。
通过机械-电类比实现训练参数到物理硬件的精确映射，并展示在触觉感知、语音识别和状态监测等跨领域应用中的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对硬件精度和噪声敏感，影响实际部署。
扩展性可能受限于谐振器耦合的物理实现复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种全模拟谐振递归神经网络，通过元电路架构实现端到端时间信息处理，无需模数转换。

papers.title: Instinct vs. Reflection: Unifying Token and Verbalized Confidence in Multimodal Large Models
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated exceptional capabilities in various perception and reasoning tasks. Despite this success, ensuring their reliability in practical deployment necessitates robust confidence estimation. Prior works have predominantly focused on text-only LLMs, often relying on computationally expensive self-consistency sampling. In this paper, we extend this to multimodal settings and conduct a comprehensive evaluation of MLLMs' response confidence estimation. Our analysis reveals a significant instinct-reflection misalignment: the model's implicit token-level support frequently diverges from its verbal self-assessment confidence. To address this misalignment, we propose a monotone confidence fusion framework to merge dual-channel signals and cross-channel consistency to estimate correctness. Subsequently, an order-preserving mean alignment step is applied to correct global bias, which improves calibration while preserving the risk-coverage trade-off for selective prediction. Experiments on diverse open-source and closed-source MLLMs show that our method consistently yields more reliable confidence estimates and improves both calibration and failure prediction. Code will be available at https://github.com/Yunkaidang/Instinct-vs.-Reflection.

analysis.tldr: 提出融合隐式token级与显式语言自信度的单调置信融合框架，解决多模态大模型中的本能-反思错位问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在感知和推理任务中表现出色，但实际部署中需要可靠的置信度估计以确保可靠性。现有工作主要针对纯文本LLM，且依赖计算昂贵的自一致性采样，缺乏对多模态场景的全面评估。
analysis.problem: 多模态大模型存在本能-反思错位：隐式token级支持与显式语言自信度不一致，导致置信度估计不可靠。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了模型隐式token级支持与显式语言自信度之间存在显著分歧，即本能-反思错位现象。
analysis.method: 提出单调置信融合框架，融合双通道信号（token级和语言级）并通过跨通道一致性估计正确性，再应用保序均值对齐校正全局偏差，改善校准并保持选择性预测的风险-覆盖权衡。
contributions: 首次在多模态大模型上系统评估置信度估计，并揭示本能-反思错位现象。
提出单调置信融合框架，有效融合隐式和显式置信信号，提升校准和失败预测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多种开源和闭源多模态大模型上进行实验，结果表明方法持续产生更可靠的置信度估计，并改善了校准和失败预测。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构或置信度表达方式。
未提及对极端分布外样本的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出融合隐式token级与显式语言自信度的单调置信融合框架，解决多模态大模型中的本能-反思错位问题。

papers.title: The Continuity Layer: Why Intelligence Needs an Architecture for What It Carries Forward
papers.abstract: The most important architectural problem in AI is not the size of the model but the absence of a layer that carries forward what the model has come to understand. Sessions end. Context windows fill. Memory APIs return flat facts that the model has to reinterpret from scratch on every read. The result is intelligence that is powerful per session and amnesiac across time. This position paper argues that the layer which fixes this, the continuity layer, is the most consequential piece of infrastructure the field has not yet built, and that the engineering work to build it has begun in public. The formal evaluation framework for the property described here is the ATANT benchmark (arXiv:2604.06710), published separately with evaluation results on a 250-story corpus; a companion paper (arXiv:2604.10981) positions this framework against existing memory, long-context, and agentic-memory benchmarks. The paper defines continuity as a system property with seven required characteristics, distinct from memory and from retrieval; describes a storage primitive (Decomposed Trace Convergence Memory) whose write-time decomposition and read-time reconstruction produce that property; maps the engineering architecture to the theological pattern of kenosis and the symbolic pattern of Alpha and Omega, and argues this mapping is structural rather than metaphorical; proposes a four-layer development arc from external SDK to hardware node to long-horizon human infrastructure; examines why the physics limits now constraining the model layer make the continuity layer newly consequential; and argues that the governance architecture (privacy implemented as physics rather than policy, founder-controlled class shares on non-negotiable architectural commitments) is inseparable from the product itself.

analysis.tldr: 提出连续性层作为AI架构缺失的关键组件，解决模型跨会话的遗忘问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI模型在单次会话中表现强大，但跨时间缺乏记忆连续性，导致每次交互都需重新理解上下文，限制了长期智能的发展。
analysis.problem: AI架构缺少一个专门负责跨会话携带和理解信息的连续性层，现有方法（如上下文窗口、记忆API）无法有效解决。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 会话结束、上下文窗口填满、记忆API返回扁平事实导致模型每次读取需重新解释，造成智能在时间上的遗忘。
analysis.method: 定义连续性为具有七个特征的系统属性，提出分解痕迹收敛记忆（DTCM）作为存储原语，通过写入时分解和读取时重建实现连续性。
contributions: 提出连续性层的概念并定义其七个必要特征
设计分解痕迹收敛记忆（DTCM）原语实现连续性
将工程架构与神学模式（kenosis）和符号模式（Alpha and Omega）进行结构映射
提出从外部SDK到硬件节点再到长期人类基础设施的四层发展路径
论证治理架构（隐私作为物理而非政策）与产品不可分割
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及ATANT基准（arXiv:2604.06710）在250个故事语料库上的评估结果。
limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏实证验证
DTCM原语的具体实现细节未在摘要中展开
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出连续性层作为AI架构缺失的关键组件，解决模型跨会话的遗忘问题。

papers.title: What Security and Privacy Transparency Users Need from Consumer-Facing Generative AI
papers.abstract: Users increasingly rely on consumer-facing generative AI (GenAI) for tasks ranging from everyday needs to sensitive use cases. Yet, it remains unclear whether and how existing security and privacy (S&P) communications in GenAI tools shape users' adoption decisions and subsequent experiences. Understanding how users seek, interpret, and evaluate S&P information is critical for designing usable transparency that users can trust and act on. We conducted semi-structured interviews and design sessions with 21 U.S. GenAI users. We find that available S&P information rarely drove initial adoption in practice, as participants often perceived it as incomplete, ineffective, or lacking credibility. Instead, they relied on rough proxies, such as popularity, to infer S&P practices. After adoption, uncertainty about S&P practices constrained participants' willingness to use GenAI tools, particularly in high-stakes contexts, and, in some cases, contributed to discontinued use. Participants therefore called for transparency that supports decision-making and use, including trustworthy information (e.g., independent evaluations) and usable interfaces (e.g., on-demand disclosure). We synthesize participants' desired design practices into five dimensions to facilitate systematic future investigation into best practices. We conclude with recommendations for researchers, designers, and policymakers to improve S&P transparency in consumer-facing GenAI.

analysis.tldr: 用户认为现有生成式AI的安全与隐私透明度信息不完整、不可信，转而依赖流行度等粗略指标，并呼吁可信赖的独立评估和按需披露。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户日益依赖生成式AI处理从日常到敏感的任务，但现有安全与隐私沟通是否影响用户采纳和体验尚不明确，设计可信任的透明度至关重要。
analysis.problem: 现有生成式AI工具的安全与隐私透明度信息在用户采纳决策和后续使用中作用有限，用户感知为不完整、无效或缺乏可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户很少因现有安全与隐私信息而决定采纳，反而依赖流行度等粗略指标；采纳后，不确定性限制了高风险场景的使用，甚至导致停止使用。
analysis.method: 对21名美国生成式AI用户进行半结构化访谈和设计会话，分析用户对安全与隐私信息的寻求、解释和评估方式。
contributions: 揭示了用户对现有安全与隐私透明度信息的感知缺陷（不完整、无效、不可信）及替代行为（依赖流行度）。
提出了五个维度的设计实践框架，以系统化未来对最佳透明度的研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及了基于21名用户的访谈和设计会话的定性发现。
limitations: 样本仅限美国用户，可能不具全球代表性。
未量化不同透明度设计对用户行为的实际影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用户认为现有生成式AI的安全与隐私透明度信息不完整、不可信，转而依赖流行度等粗略指标，并呼吁可信赖的独立评估和按需披露。

papers.title: Fractal Characterization of Low-Correlation Signals in AI-Generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: AI-generated imagery has reached near-photorealistic fidelity, yet this technology poses significant threats to information security and societal trust. Existing deepfake detection methods often exhibit limited robustness in open-world scenarios. To address this limitation, this paper investigates intrinsic discrepancies between synthetic and authentic images from a signal-level perspective. Our analysis reveals that low-correlation signals serve as distinctive markers for differentiating AI-generated imagery from real photographs. Building on this insight, we introduce a novel method for quantifying these signals based on fractal theory. By analyzing the fractal characteristics of low-correlation signals, our method effectively captures the subtle statistical anomalies inherent to the synthesis process. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the method's robustness and superior detection performance. This work emphasizes the need to shift research focus to a new signal-level direction for deepfake detection. Theoretically, this proposed approach is not limited to face image identification but can be applied to all AI-generated image detection tasks. This study provides a new research direction for deepfake detection.

analysis.tldr: 基于分形理论量化低相关信号，实现鲁棒的AI生成图像检测。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像逼近照片级真实度，威胁信息安全与社会信任，现有深度伪造检测方法在开放场景下鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从信号层面捕捉合成图像与真实图像之间的内在差异，提升检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低相关信号可作为区分AI生成图像与真实照片的独特标记，其分形特征能有效捕获合成过程中的统计异常。
analysis.method: 基于分形理论量化低相关信号的特征，通过分析其分形特性来检测AI生成图像。
contributions: 发现低相关信号是区分AI生成图像与真实照片的有效标记。
提出基于分形理论的低相关信号量化方法，实现鲁棒检测。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对高度优化的生成模型（如扩散模型）效果有限。
分形特征的计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于分形理论量化低相关信号，实现鲁棒的AI生成图像检测。

papers.title: WeatherSeg: Weather-Robust Image Segmentation using Teacher-Student Dual Learning and Classifier-Updating Attention
papers.abstract: WeatherSeg, an advanced semi-supervised segmentation framework, addresses autonomous driving's environmental perception challenges in adverse weather while reducing annotation costs. This framework integrates a Dual Teacher-Student Weight-Sharing Model (DTSWSM) that enables knowledge distillation from weather-affected images, and a Classifier Weight Updating Attention Mechanism (CWUAM) that dynamically adjusts classifier weights based on environmental attributes. Comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that WeatherSeg significantly outperforms baseline models in both accuracy and robustness across various weather conditions, including clear, rainy, cloudy, and foggy scenarios, establishing it as an effective solution for all-weather semantic segmentation in autonomous driving and related applications.

analysis.tldr: WeatherSeg通过教师-学生双学习与分类器更新注意力机制，提升自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的语义分割鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶在恶劣天气下环境感知困难，且标注成本高，现有方法在多种天气条件下的鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加标注成本的前提下，提升语义分割模型在雨天、雾天等恶劣天气下的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WeatherSeg框架，包含双教师-学生权重共享模型（DTSWSM）实现知识蒸馏，以及分类器权重更新注意力机制（CWUAM）动态调整分类器权重。
contributions: 提出WeatherSeg半监督分割框架，结合双教师-学生权重共享模型和分类器权重更新注意力机制。
在多种天气条件下（晴天、雨天、多云、雾天）显著优于基线模型，验证了全天气语义分割的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在极端天气（如暴雪、冰雹）下验证。
半监督方法对未标注数据的质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WeatherSeg通过教师-学生双学习与分类器更新注意力机制，提升自动驾驶在恶劣天气下的语义分割鲁棒性。

papers.title: Rectification Difficulty and Optimal Sample Allocation in LLM-Augmented Surveys
papers.abstract: Large Language Models can generate synthetic survey responses at low cost, but their accuracy varies unpredictably across questions. We study the design problem of allocating a fixed budget of human respondents across estimation tasks when cheap LLM predictions are available for every task. Our framework combines three components. First, building on Prediction-Powered Inference, we characterize a question-specific rectification difficulty that governs how quickly the estimator's variance decreases with human sample size. Second, we derive a closed-form optimal allocation rule that directs more human labels to tasks where the LLM is least reliable. Third, since rectification difficulty depends on unobserved human responses for new surveys, we propose a meta-learning approach, trained on historical data, that predicts it for entirely new tasks without pilot data. The framework extends to general M-estimation, covering regression coefficients and multinomial logit partworths for conjoint analysis. We validate the framework on two datasets spanning different domains, question types, and LLMs, showing that our approach captures 61-79% of the theoretically attainable efficiency gains, achieving 11.4% and 10.5% MSE reductions without requiring any pilot human data for the target survey.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合预测驱动推断、最优分配和元学习的框架，用于在LLM辅助调查中高效分配人类样本，显著降低估计误差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成合成调查响应成本低但准确性因问题而异，如何将有限的人类样本预算分配到不同估计任务中以最大化效率是一个关键设计问题。
analysis.problem: 在LLM辅助调查中，给定固定的人类样本预算，如何最优分配样本到不同任务，以最小化估计量的方差或均方误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM预测的准确性在不同问题间变化不可预测，导致需要针对每个问题调整人类样本分配。
analysis.method: 结合预测驱动推断（PPI）定义问题特定的修正难度，推导出闭式最优分配规则，并采用元学习方法从历史数据预测新任务的修正难度。
contributions: 提出修正难度概念，量化估计量方差随人类样本量下降的速度。
推导出闭式最优样本分配规则，将更多人类标签分配给LLM最不可靠的任务。
设计元学习方法，无需试点数据即可预测全新任务的修正难度。
将框架推广到一般M估计，包括回归系数和多项Logit部分价值。
analysis.experiments: 在两个不同领域、问题类型和LLM的数据集上验证，方法捕获了理论效率增益的61-79%，在无需目标调查试点数据的情况下实现11.4%和10.5%的MSE降低。
limitations: 依赖历史数据训练元学习模型，可能受历史数据分布偏移影响。
框架假设LLM预测对所有任务可用，实际中可能部分任务无预测。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合预测驱动推断、最优分配和元学习的框架，用于在LLM辅助调查中高效分配人类样本，显著降低估计误差。

papers.title: HORIZON: A Benchmark for In-the-wild User Behaviour Modeling
papers.abstract: User behavior in the real world is diverse, cross-domain, and spans long time horizons. Existing user modeling benchmarks however remain narrow, focusing mainly on short sessions and next-item prediction within a single domain. Such limitations hinder progress toward robust and generalizable user models. We present HORIZON, a new benchmark that reformulates user modeling along three axes i.e. dataset, task, and evaluation. Built from a large-scale, cross-domain reformulation of Amazon Reviews, HORIZON covers 54M users and 35M items, enabling both pretraining and realistic evaluation of models in heterogeneous environments. Unlike prior benchmarks, it challenges models to generalize across domains, users, and time, moving beyond standard missing-positive prediction in the same domain. We propose new tasks and evaluation setups that better reflect real-world deployment scenarios. These include temporal generalization, sequence-length variation, and modeling unseen users, with metrics designed to assess general user behavior understanding rather than isolated next-item prediction. We benchmark popular sequential recommendation architectures alongside LLM-based baselines that leverage long-term interaction histories. Our results highlight the gap between current methods and the demands of real-world user modeling, while establishing HORIZON as a foundation for research on temporally robust, cross-domain, and general-purpose user models.

analysis.tldr: HORIZON是一个大规模、跨域、长时段的用户行为建模基准，挑战现有模型在时间泛化、跨域迁移和未见用户建模上的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有用户建模基准局限于短会话和单域下一项预测，无法反映真实世界中用户行为的多样性、跨域性和长时程特性，阻碍了鲁棒且可泛化的用户模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估模型在跨域、时间泛化和未见用户场景下用户行为理解能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Amazon Reviews数据构建大规模跨域基准，包含54M用户和35M项，设计时间泛化、序列长度变化和未见用户建模等新任务与评估指标。
contributions: 提出HORIZON基准，覆盖54M用户和35M项，支持跨域、长时程用户建模的预训练与评估。
设计时间泛化、序列长度变化和未见用户建模等新任务及评估指标，超越传统下一项预测。
基准测试了多种序列推荐架构和基于LLM的基线，揭示了当前方法与真实世界需求之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 在HORIZON上对流行序列推荐架构和基于LLM的基线进行了基准测试，结果显示当前方法在真实世界用户建模任务上存在差距。
limitations: 仅基于Amazon Reviews数据，可能无法完全覆盖其他领域（如社交、金融）的用户行为模式。
未提供具体模型性能数值或对比表格，摘要中缺乏定量结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HORIZON是一个大规模、跨域、长时段的用户行为建模基准，挑战现有模型在时间泛化、跨域迁移和未见用户建模上的能力。

papers.title: REZE: Representation Regularization for Domain-adaptive Text Embedding Pre-finetuning
papers.abstract: Recent text embedding models are often adapted to specialized domains via contrastive pre-finetuning (PFT) on a naive collection of scattered, heterogeneous tasks. However, this approach often introduces task-induced bias alongside domain knowledge, leading to uncontrolled representation shifts that distort the pretrained embedding geometry and cause substantial performance degradation. To address this issue, we propose REZE, a representation regularization framework that explicitly controls representation shift during embedding pre-finetuning. REZE operates on the relations of anchor-positive pairs and decomposes them in an eigenspace. It then measures task-wise dispersion along each eigencomponent to identify task-variant directions and applies adaptive soft-shrinkage to suppress task-induced noise while preserving task-invariant semantic structure, without inference-time overhead. Experiments across multiple embedding backbones and specialized benchmarks show that REZE outperforms standard pre-finetuning and isotropy-oriented post-hoc regularization in most settings, remaining stable where existing PFT variants collapse. Embedding space analyses further confirm that REZE induces controlled shifts aligned with the original embedding manifold, underscoring representation shift control as a key principle for robust embedding pre-finetuning under heterogeneous supervision.

analysis.tldr: 提出REZE框架，通过表示正则化控制领域自适应文本嵌入预微调中的表示偏移，提升下游性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本嵌入模型通过对比预微调适应特定领域时，任务诱导的偏差会导致表示偏移，破坏预训练嵌入几何结构，造成性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何控制预微调过程中的表示偏移，抑制任务诱导噪声同时保留领域知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出标准预微调引入任务诱导偏差，导致表示偏移和性能退化；现有各向同性后处理正则化方法效果有限。
analysis.method: REZE在特征空间中对锚点-正例对关系进行特征分解，沿每个特征分量测量任务分散度，识别任务变化方向，并应用自适应软收缩抑制任务噪声，保留任务不变语义结构。
contributions: 提出REZE框架，通过表示正则化显式控制嵌入预微调中的表示偏移。
在多个嵌入骨干和专用基准上，REZE优于标准预微调和各向同性后处理正则化，且保持稳定。
嵌入空间分析证实REZE诱导的偏移与原始嵌入流形对齐，验证了表示偏移控制作为鲁棒预微调的关键原则。
analysis.experiments: 在多个嵌入骨干和专用基准上评估，REZE在大多数设置中优于标准预微调和各向同性后处理正则化，并在现有PFT变体失效时保持稳定。
limitations: 可能对特征分解的计算开销敏感。
未在极大规模任务集合上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: transfer learning, meta learning, and lifelong learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出REZE框架，通过表示正则化控制领域自适应文本嵌入预微调中的表示偏移，提升下游性能。

papers.title: Seeing Isn't Believing: Mitigating Belief Inertia via Active Intervention in Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have enabled agents to tackle complex embodied tasks through environmental interaction. However, these agents still make suboptimal decisions and perform ineffective actions, as they often overlook critical environmental feedback that differs from their internal beliefs. Through a formal probing analysis, we characterize this as belief inertia, a phenomenon where agents stubbornly adhere to prior beliefs despite explicit observations. To address this, we advocate active belief intervention, moving from passive understanding to active management. We introduce the Estimate-Verify-Update (EVU) mechanism, which empowers agents to predict expected outcomes, verify them against observations through explicit reasoning, and actively update prior beliefs based on the verification evidence. EVU is designed as a unified intervention mechanism that generates textual belief states explicitly, and can be integrated into both prompting-based and training-based agent reasoning methods. Extensive experiments across three embodied benchmarks demonstrate that EVU consistently yields substantial gains in task success rates. Further analyses validate that our approach effectively mitigates belief inertia, advancing the development of more robust embodied agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/WangHanLinHenry/EVU.

analysis.tldr: 提出EVU机制，通过主动干预缓解具身智能体的信念惯性，显著提升任务成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的具身智能体常忽略与环境反馈不一致的内部信念，导致次优决策和无效动作，亟需方法让智能体主动管理信念而非被动理解。
analysis.problem: 具身智能体在交互中存在的信念惯性问题，即固执于先验信念而忽视关键环境反馈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过形式化探针分析，发现智能体存在信念惯性现象：即使观察到明确证据，仍顽固坚持原有信念。
analysis.method: 提出估计-验证-更新（EVU）机制，包含三个步骤：预测预期结果、通过显式推理与观察验证、基于验证证据主动更新先验信念。EVU生成显式文本信念状态，可集成到基于提示或基于训练的推理方法中。
contributions: 首次形式化定义并分析具身智能体中的信念惯性现象。
提出EVU主动干预机制，有效缓解信念惯性，提升任务成功率。
在三个具身基准上验证有效性，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在三个具身基准上进行实验，EVU一致性地带来任务成功率的显著提升，进一步分析证实该方法有效缓解信念惯性。
limitations: 可能依赖显式文本推理，在实时性要求高的场景中效率受限。
未讨论在更复杂或动态环境中的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EVU机制，通过主动干预缓解具身智能体的信念惯性，显著提升任务成功率。

papers.title: DORA Explorer: Improving the Exploration Ability of LLMs Without Training
papers.abstract: Despite the rapid progress, LLMs for sequential decision-making (i.e., LLM agents) still struggle to produce diverse outputs. This leads to insufficient exploration, convergence to sub-optimal solutions, and becoming stuck in loops. Such limitations can be problematic in environments that require active exploration to gather information and make decisions. Sampling methods such as temperature scaling introduce token-level randomness but fail to produce enough diversity at the sequence level. We analyze LLM exploration in the classic Multi-Armed Bandit (MAB) setting and the Text Adventure Learning Environment Suite (TALES). We find that current decoding strategies and prompting methods like Chain-of-Thought and Tree-of-Thought are insufficient for robust exploration. To address this, we introduce DORA Explorer (Diversity-Oriented Ranking of Actions), a training-free framework for improving exploration in LLM agents. DORA generates diverse action candidates, scores them using token log-probabilities, and selects actions using a tunable exploration parameter. DORA achieves UCB-competitive performance on MAB and consistent gains across TALES, e.g., improving Qwen2.5-7B's performance from 29.2% to 45.5% in TextWorld. Our project is available at: https://dora-explore.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的DORA Explorer框架，通过多样化动作候选和概率评分提升LLM智能体的探索能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在序列决策中探索不足，易陷入次优解或循环，现有采样和提示方法无法保证序列级多样性。
analysis.problem: LLM智能体在需要主动探索的环境中输出多样性不足，导致探索不充分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出温度缩放等采样方法仅在token级引入随机性，序列级多样性不足；Chain-of-Thought和Tree-of-Thought等提示方法在鲁棒探索上也不够。
analysis.method: DORA Explorer：无需训练，首先生成多样化动作候选，然后利用token对数概率评分，最后通过可调探索参数选择动作。
contributions: 提出训练无关的DORA框架，通过多样化候选和概率评分提升LLM探索能力。
在MAB和TALES环境中验证有效性，Qwen2.5-7B在TextWorld上从29.2%提升至45.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在Multi-Armed Bandit和Text Adventure Learning Environment Suite (TALES)上评估，MAB上达到UCB竞争力，TALES上一致提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于离散动作空间，连续动作空间未验证。
依赖token对数概率，对模型内部表示敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的DORA Explorer框架，通过多样化动作候选和概率评分提升LLM智能体的探索能力。

papers.title: RemoteShield: Enable Robust Multimodal Large Language Models for Earth Observation
papers.abstract: A robust Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) for Earth Observation should maintain consistent interpretation and reasoning under realistic input variations. However, current Remote Sensing MLLMs fail to meet this requirement. Trained on carefully curated clean datasets, they learn brittle mappings that do not generalize to noisy conditions in operational Earth Observation. Consequently, their performance degrades when confronted with imperfect inputs in deployment. To quantify this vulnerability, we construct a realistic set of multimodal perturbations, including visual degradations such as cloud and fog cover, together with diverse human-centric textual variations ranging from colloquialisms to vague or omitted instructions. Empirical evaluations show that these perturbations significantly impair the visual-semantic reasoning capabilities of leading RS foundation models. To address this limitation, we introduce RemoteShield, a robust Remote Sensing MLLM trained to maintain consistent outputs across realistic input variations. During training, each clean sample is paired with its image-text perturbed variants to form a semantic equivalence cluster. Rather than directly fitting noisy samples, RemoteShield is optimized through preference learning over clean and perturbed conditions within the same cluster. By comparing model responses to clean and corrupted inputs, the model is encouraged to favor stable responses over perturbation-induced failures. This cross-condition alignment helps the model focus on underlying task semantics despite visual degradations and textual noise. Experiments on three Earth Observation tasks show that RemoteShield consistently delivers stronger robustness and cross-condition consistency than representative baselines under realistic multimodal perturbations.

analysis.tldr: 提出RemoteShield，通过偏好学习对齐干净与扰动输入，提升遥感多模态大模型在真实噪声条件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前遥感多模态大模型在精心清洗的数据上训练，无法泛化到实际部署中常见的视觉退化（如云、雾）和文本变化（如口语化、模糊指令），导致性能严重下降。
analysis.problem: 现有遥感MLLM在真实多模态扰动下缺乏鲁棒性，无法保持一致的语义推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，视觉退化（云、雾）和文本变化（口语化、模糊指令）会显著损害领先遥感基础模型的视觉-语义推理能力。
analysis.method: RemoteShield：训练时将每个干净样本与其图像-文本扰动变体配对形成语义等价簇，通过偏好学习优化模型，使其在干净和扰动条件下偏好稳定响应，实现跨条件对齐。
contributions: 构建了包含视觉退化和文本变化的真实多模态扰动集，用于评估遥感MLLM的脆弱性。
提出RemoteShield，利用偏好学习在语义等价簇中对齐干净与扰动输入，显著提升鲁棒性和跨条件一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个地球观测任务上，RemoteShield在真实多模态扰动下比代表性基线具有更强的鲁棒性和跨条件一致性。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定扰动类型（云、雾、口语化等），对其他未覆盖的扰动泛化性未知。
偏好学习需要构造扰动变体，可能增加训练成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RemoteShield，通过偏好学习对齐干净与扰动输入，提升遥感多模态大模型在真实噪声条件下的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Safe and Policy-Compliant Multi-Agent Orchestration for Enterprise AI
papers.abstract: Enterprise AI systems increasingly deploy multiple intelligent agents across mission-critical workflows that must satisfy hard policy constraints, bounded risk exposure, and comprehensive auditability (SOX, HIPAA, GDPR). Existing coordination methods - cooperative MARL, consensus protocols, and centralized planners - optimize expected reward while treating constraints implicitly. This paper introduces CAMCO (Constraint-Aware Multi-Agent Cognitive Orchestration), a runtime coordination layer that models multi-agent decision-making as a constrained optimization problem. CAMCO integrates three mechanisms: (i) a constraint projection engine enforcing policy-feasible actions via convex projection, (ii) adaptive risk-weighted Lagrangian utility shaping, and (iii) an iterative negotiation protocol with provably bounded convergence. Unlike training-time constrained RL, CAMCO operates as deployment-time middleware compatible with any agent architecture, with policy predicates designed for direct integration with production engines such as OPA. Evaluation across three enterprise scenarios - including comparison against a constrained Lagrangian MARL baseline - demonstrates zero policy violations, risk exposure below threshold (mean ratio 0.71), 92-97% utility retention, and mean convergence in 2.4 iterations.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAMCO，一种部署时约束感知的多智能体协调层，在零违规前提下保留92-97%效用。
analysis.research_motivation: 企业AI系统在多智能体工作流中需满足硬性策略约束、风险暴露限制和可审计性，现有方法隐式处理约束，难以保证合规。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲效用的情况下，确保多智能体协调满足硬性策略约束和风险阈值。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CAMCO：约束投影引擎（凸投影强制策略可行动作）、自适应风险加权拉格朗日效用整形、迭代协商协议（有界收敛）。
contributions: 提出CAMCO，一种部署时约束感知协调层，兼容任意智能体架构。
集成约束投影、风险加权效用整形和可证明有界收敛的协商协议。
analysis.experiments: 在三个企业场景中评估，与约束拉格朗日MARL基线对比，零违规、风险暴露低于阈值（平均比率0.71）、效用保留92-97%、平均2.4轮收敛。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可凸投影的线性/凸约束。
协商协议收敛性可能受智能体数量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAMCO，一种部署时约束感知的多智能体协调层，在零违规前提下保留92-97%效用。

papers.title: HeadRank: Decoding-Free Passage Reranking via Preference-Aligned Attention Heads
papers.abstract: Decoding-free reranking methods that read relevance signals directly from LLM attention weights offer significant latency advantages over autoregressive approaches, yet suffer from attention score homogenization: middle-context documents receive near-identical scores, destroying the fine-grained distinctions required for ranking. We propose HeadRank, a framework that lifts preference optimization from discrete token space into the continuous attention domain through entropy-regularized head selection, hard adjacent-level preference pairs, and a distribution regularizer that jointly sharpen discriminability in the homogenized middle zone. Depth truncation at the deepest selected layer further reduces inference to $\mathcal{O}(1)$ forward passes. Across 14 benchmarks on three Qwen3 scales (0.6B--4B) using only 211 training queries, HeadRank consistently outperforms generative and decoding-free baselines with 100\% formatting success. At 4B, 57.4\% of relevant middle-zone documents reach the top quartile versus 14.2\% for irrelevant ones -- a 43-percentage-point selectivity gap that demonstrates the effectiveness of attention-space preference alignment for listwise reranking.

analysis.tldr: HeadRank通过偏好对齐的注意力头选择和分布正则化，在无需解码的重排序中显著提升中间文档区分度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于注意力权重的免解码重排序方法存在注意力分数同质化问题，导致中间上下文文档得分接近，无法进行细粒度排序，而传统自回归方法延迟较高。
analysis.problem: 解决免解码重排序中注意力分数同质化导致的中间文档区分度不足问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到注意力分数同质化现象：中间上下文文档得分几乎相同，破坏了排序所需的细粒度区分。
analysis.method: 提出HeadRank框架，通过熵正则化的注意力头选择、硬相邻级偏好对和分布正则化器，在连续注意力空间中进行偏好优化，并在最深选定层进行深度截断以降低推理成本。
contributions: 首次将偏好优化从离散token空间提升到连续注意力域，通过头选择实现免解码重排序。
提出熵正则化头选择、硬相邻级偏好对和分布正则化器，有效缓解注意力同质化问题。
在14个基准上使用仅211个训练查询，在三个Qwen3规模上一致优于生成式和免解码基线，且格式成功率达100%。
analysis.experiments: 在14个基准上使用Qwen3（0.6B-4B）评估，仅用211个训练查询，HeadRank在4B规模下使57.4%的相关中间文档进入前四分位，而无关文档仅14.2%，选择性差距达43个百分点。
limitations: 仅验证了Qwen3系列模型，其他架构的泛化性未知。
训练查询数量较少（211个），大规模数据下的表现待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HeadRank通过偏好对齐的注意力头选择和分布正则化，在无需解码的重排序中显著提升中间文档区分度。

papers.title: Enhancing Zero-shot Personalized Image Aesthetics Assessment with Profile-aware Multimodal LLM
papers.abstract: Personalized image aesthetics assessment (PIAA) aims to predict an individual user's subjective rating of an image, which requires modeling user-specific aesthetic preferences. Existing methods rely on historical user ratings for this modeling and therefore struggle when such data are unavailable. We address this zero-shot setting by using user profiles as contextual signals for personalization and adopting a profile-based personalization paradigm. We introduce P-MLLM, a profile-aware multimodal LLM that augments a frozen LLM with selective fusion modules for controlled visual integration. These modules selectively integrate visual information into the model's evolving hidden states during profile-conditioned reasoning, allowing visual information to be incorporated in a profile-aware manner. Experiments on recent PIAA benchmarks show that P-MLLM achieves competitive zero-shot performance and remains effective even with coarse profile information, highlighting the potential of profile-based personalization for zero-shot PIAA.

analysis.tldr: 提出P-MLLM，利用用户画像实现零样本个性化图像美学评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有个性化图像美学评估依赖用户历史评分，在无历史数据时无法工作，而零样本场景下需要新的个性化方法。
analysis.problem: 在零样本设置下，如何利用用户画像信息预测个体用户对图像的主观美学评分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出P-MLLM，一种画像感知的多模态大语言模型，通过选择性融合模块将视觉信息注入冻结LLM的隐藏状态，实现画像条件推理。
contributions: 提出基于用户画像的零样本个性化图像美学评估范式。
设计P-MLLM架构，通过选择性融合模块实现画像感知的视觉信息整合。
analysis.experiments: 在多个PIAA基准上，P-MLLM实现了有竞争力的零样本性能，且即使使用粗略画像信息也有效。
limitations: 可能依赖用户画像的完整性和准确性。
零样本性能可能仍低于有历史数据的监督方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出P-MLLM，利用用户画像实现零样本个性化图像美学评估。

papers.title: Fringe Projection Based Vision Pipeline for Autonomous Hard Drive Disassembly
papers.abstract: Unrecovered e-waste represents a significant economic loss. Hard disk drives (HDDs) comprise a valuable e-waste stream necessitating robotic disassembly. Automating the disassembly of HDDs requires holistic 3D sensing, scene understanding, and fastener localization, however current methods are fragmented, lack robust 3D sensing, and lack fastener localization. We propose an autonomous vision pipeline which performs 3D sensing using a Fringe Projection Profilometry (FPP) module, with selective triggering of a depth completion module where FPP fails, and integrates this module with a lightweight, real-time instance segmentation network for scene understanding and critical component localization. By utilizing the same FPP camera-projector system for both our depth sensing and component localization modules, our depth maps and derived 3D geometry are inherently pixel-wise aligned with the segmentation masks without registration, providing an advantage over RGB-D perception systems common in industrial sensing. We optimize both our trained depth completion and instance segmentation networks for deployment-oriented inference. The proposed system achieves a box mAP@50 of 0.960 and mask mAP@50 of 0.957 for instance segmentation, while the selected depth completion configuration with the Depth Anything V2 Base backbone achieves an RMSE of 2.317 mm and MAE of 1.836 mm; the Platter Facing learned inference stack achieved a combined latency of 12.86 ms and a throughput of 77.7 Frames Per Second (FPS) on the evaluation workstation. Finally, we adopt a sim-to-real transfer learning approach to augment our physical dataset. The proposed perception pipeline provides both high-fidelity semantic and spatial data which can be valuable for downstream robotic disassembly. The synthetic dataset developed for HDD instance segmentation will be made publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于条纹投影的视觉流水线，用于自主硬盘驱动器拆解，实现高精度3D感知与实例分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 未回收电子废弃物造成巨大经济损失，硬盘驱动器作为有价值的电子废弃物需要机器人拆解，但现有方法缺乏鲁棒3D感知和紧固件定位能力。
analysis.problem: 实现硬盘驱动器自主拆解所需的整体3D感知、场景理解和紧固件定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用条纹投影轮廓测量模块进行3D感知，在FPP失败时选择性触发深度补全模块，并与轻量级实时实例分割网络集成，利用同一相机-投影仪系统实现深度图与分割掩膜的像素级对齐。
contributions: 提出一种集成的视觉流水线，结合FPP深度感知和实例分割，实现像素级对齐。
优化深度补全和实例分割网络以实现部署推理，并采用sim-to-real迁移学习增强物理数据集。
analysis.experiments: 实例分割box mAP@50为0.960，mask mAP@50为0.957；深度补全RMSE为2.317 mm，MAE为1.836 mm；推理延迟12.86 ms，吞吐量77.7 FPS。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件（FPP相机-投影仪系统），泛化性未知。
仅针对硬盘驱动器拆解场景，未验证其他电子废弃物。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于条纹投影的视觉流水线，用于自主硬盘驱动器拆解，实现高精度3D感知与实例分割。

papers.title: Yanasse: Finding New Proofs from Deep Vision's Analogies, Part 1
papers.abstract: Project Yanasse presents a method for discovering new proofs of theorems in one area of mathematics by transferring proof strategy patterns (e.g., Lean 4 tactic invocation patterns) from a structurally distant area. The system extracts tactic usage distributions across 27 top-level areas of Mathlib (217,133 proof states), computes z-scores to identify tactics that are heavily used in a source area but rare or absent in a target area, matches source and target proof states via GPU-accelerated NP-hard analogy (running on a MacBook Air via Apple's MPS backend), and then asks an AI reasoning agent to semantically adapt--not symbol-substitute--the source tactics invocation pattern to the target theorem. In this first part of the study, the method is applied to the pair Probability -> Representation Theory, producing 4 Lean-verified new proofs out of 10 attempts (40%). The proofs compile with zero sorry declarations. The key finding is that tactic schemas decompose into a head (domain-gated, rarely transfers) and a modifier (domain-general, often transfers): filter upwards's head fails in representation theory (no Filter structure), but its [LIST] with ω modifier transfers cleanly as ext1 + simp [LIST] + rfl. Crucially, the underlying matching engine--deep vision lib.py--is entirely domain independent: the same optimization code for an NP-hard matching that matches chess positions by analogy matches Lean proof states by analogy, without knowing which domain it is processing. Only a relation extractor is domain-specific.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过迁移证明策略模式发现新定理证明的方法，在概率论→表示论迁移中40%成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 数学定理证明自动化中，跨领域证明策略迁移困难，现有方法依赖符号替换或领域特定知识，缺乏通用性。
analysis.problem: 如何从结构上远距离的数学领域迁移证明策略模式，以发现新定理的证明。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现策略模式可分解为领域门控的头部（难迁移）和领域通用的修饰符（易迁移），如filter upwards的头部在表示论中失败，但[LIST] with ω修饰符可迁移为ext1 + simp [LIST] + rfl。
analysis.method: 提取Mathlib中27个顶级领域的策略使用分布，计算z-score识别源领域密集使用而目标领域稀有的策略，通过GPU加速NP难类比匹配证明状态，再由AI推理代理语义适配策略调用模式。
contributions: 提出跨领域证明策略迁移方法Yanasse，在概率论→表示论对中40%成功率生成4个Lean验证的新证明。
揭示策略模式分解为头部和修饰符的迁移规律，并展示匹配引擎的领域无关性。
analysis.experiments: 在概率论→表示论对中测试10次，成功4次（40%），所有证明编译通过且无sorry声明。
limitations: 仅测试一个领域对，泛化性未知。
成功率40%，仍有改进空间。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过迁移证明策略模式发现新定理证明的方法，在概率论→表示论迁移中40%成功率。

papers.title: AirFM-DDA: Air-Interface Foundation Model in the Delay-Doppler-Angle Domain for AI-Native 6G
papers.abstract: The success of large foundation models is catalyzing a new paradigm for AI-native 6G network design: wireless foundation models for physical layer design. However, existing models often operate on channel state information (CSI) in the space-time-frequency (STF) domain, where distinct multipath components are inherently superimposed and structurally entangled. This hinders the learning of universal channel representation. Meanwhile, their reliance on global attention mechanisms incurs prohibitive computational overhead. In this paper, we propose AirFM-DDA, an Air-interface Foundation Model operating in the Delay-Doppler-Angle (DDA) domain for physicallayer tasks. Specifically, AirFM-DDA reparameterizes CSI from the STF domain into the DDA domain to explicitly resolve multipath components along physically meaningful axes. It employs a window-based attention module augmented with framestructure-aware positional encoding (FS-PE). This window-based attention aligns with locally clustered multipath dependencies while avoiding quadratic-complexity global attention, and FS-PE injects frame-structure priors into network. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AirFM-DDA achieves superior zero-shot generalization across unseen scenarios and datasets, consistently outperforming the baselines on channel prediction and estimation tasks. Compared to the global attention, its window-based attention reduces training and inference costs by nearly an order of magnitude. Moreover, AirFM-DDA maintains robustness under high mobility, large delay spreads, severe noise, and extreme aliasing conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出在延迟-多普勒-角度域工作的无线基础模型AirFM-DDA，通过窗口注意力与帧结构位置编码实现高效信道预测与估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无线基础模型在空时频域处理信道状态信息，多径分量叠加纠缠，难以学习通用表征；且全局注意力机制计算开销巨大。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效、可泛化的无线基础模型，在物理层任务中实现零样本泛化并降低计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将CSI从空时频域重参数化到延迟-多普勒-角度域，显式分离多径分量；采用窗口注意力模块（避免全局注意力的二次复杂度）并引入帧结构感知位置编码。
contributions: 提出在DDA域工作的无线基础模型AirFM-DDA，实现多径分量的显式解耦。
设计窗口注意力与帧结构感知位置编码，大幅降低计算开销并保持性能。
analysis.experiments: 在信道预测和估计任务上，AirFM-DDA在未见场景和数据集上实现优越的零样本泛化，训练和推理成本降低近一个数量级，并在高移动性、大延迟扩展、严重噪声和极端混叠条件下保持鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定物理层任务（信道预测/估计），未验证其他任务。
窗口注意力可能限制远距离依赖的捕获。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在延迟-多普勒-角度域工作的无线基础模型AirFM-DDA，通过窗口注意力与帧结构位置编码实现高效信道预测与估计。

papers.title: Region-Affinity Attention for Whole-Slide Breast Cancer Classification in Deep Ultraviolet Imaging
papers.abstract: Breast cancer diagnosis demands rapid and precise tools, yet traditional histopathological methods often fall short in intra-operative settings. Deep Ultraviolet (DUV) fluorescence imaging emerges as a transformative approach, offering high-contrast, label-free visualization of whole-slide images (WSIs) with unprecedented detail, surpassing conventional hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) staining in speed and resolution. However, existing deep learning methods for breast cancer classification, predominantly patch-based, fragment spatial context and incur significant preprocessing overhead, limiting their clinical utility. Moreover, standard attention mechanisms, such as Spatial, Squeeze-and-Excitation, Global Context and Guided Context Gating, fail to fully exploit the rich, multi-scale regional relationships inherent in DUV-WSI data, often prioritizing generic feature recalibration over diagnostic specificity. This study introduces a novel Region-Affinity Attention mechanism tailored for DUV-WSI breast cancer classification, processing entire slides without patching to preserve spatial integrity. By modeling local neighbor distances and constructing a full affinity matrix, our method dynamically highlights diagnostically relevant regions, augmented by a contrastive loss to enhance feature discriminability. Evaluated on a dataset of 136 DUV-WSI samples, our approach achieves an accuracy of 92.67 +/- 0.73% and an AUC of 95.97%, outperforming existing attention methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域亲和力注意力机制，无需分块即可处理全切片DUV图像，在乳腺癌分类中优于现有注意力方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统组织病理学方法在术中诊断中速度慢、分辨率低；现有深度学习方法多基于分块处理，破坏空间上下文且预处理开销大，限制了临床实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不分块的情况下，利用DUV全切片图像中的多尺度区域关系进行乳腺癌分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准注意力机制（如Spatial、SE、GC、GCG）未能充分利用DUV-WSI数据中丰富的多尺度区域关系，往往优先进行通用特征重标定而非诊断特异性。
analysis.method: 提出区域亲和力注意力机制，通过建模局部邻域距离并构建完整亲和矩阵，动态突出诊断相关区域，并结合对比损失增强特征判别性。
contributions: 提出区域亲和力注意力机制，无需分块即可处理全切片DUV图像，保留空间完整性。
在136个DUV-WSI样本上达到92.67%准确率和95.97% AUC，优于现有注意力方法。
analysis.experiments: 在136个DUV-WSI样本上评估，报告了准确率（92.67±0.73%）和AUC（95.97%），并与现有注意力方法对比。
limitations: 数据集规模较小（136个样本），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对乳腺癌分类，未验证在其他组织类型或成像模态上的有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域亲和力注意力机制，无需分块即可处理全切片DUV图像，在乳腺癌分类中优于现有注意力方法。

papers.title: Dynamics of Cognitive Heterogeneity: Investigating Behavioral Biases in Multi-Stage Supply Chains with LLM-Based Simulation
papers.abstract: Modeling coordination among generative agents in complex multi-round decision-making presents a core challenge for AI and operations management. Although behavioral experiments have revealed cognitive biases behind supply chain inefficiencies, traditional methods face scalability and control limitations. We introduce a scalable experimental paradigm using Large Language Models (LLMs) to simulate multi-stage supply chain dynamics. Grounded in a Hierarchical Reasoning Framework, this study specifically analyzes the impact of cognitive heterogeneity on agent interactions. Unlike prior homogeneous settings, we employ DeepSeek and GPT agents to systematically vary reasoning sophistication across supply chain tiers. Through rigorously replicated and statistically validated simulations, we investigate how this cognitive diversity influences collective outcomes. Results indicate that agents exhibit myopic and self-interested behaviors that exacerbate systemic inefficiencies. However, we demonstrate that information sharing effectively mitigates these adverse effects. Our findings extend traditional behavioral methods and offer new insights into the dynamics of AI-enabled organizations. This work underscores both the potential and limitations of LLM-based agents as proxies for human decision-making in complex operational environments.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM模拟多阶段供应链，发现认知异质性加剧系统低效，而信息共享可缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统行为实验在可扩展性和控制性上存在局限，难以模拟复杂多轮决策中的认知偏差，而LLM提供了一种新的仿真范式。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM模拟多阶段供应链中认知异质性对集体决策结果的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：认知异质性导致智能体表现出短视和自利行为，加剧系统低效；信息共享能有效缓解这些负面效应。
analysis.method: 基于层次推理框架，使用DeepSeek和GPT智能体在不同供应链层级上系统变化推理复杂度，进行严格复现和统计验证的仿真实验。
contributions: 提出一种基于LLM的可扩展实验范式，用于模拟多阶段供应链动态。
揭示认知异质性对供应链集体效率的影响，并验证信息共享的缓解作用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及进行了严格复现和统计验证的仿真。
limitations: 可能未考虑真实人类决策中的情感和社会因素。
LLM行为与人类行为之间的差距可能影响结论的普适性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用LLM模拟多阶段供应链，发现认知异质性加剧系统低效，而信息共享可缓解。

papers.title: Cross-Modal Attention Analysis and Optimization in Vision-Language Models: A Study on Visual Reliability
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) achieve strong cross-modal performance, yet recent evidence suggests they over-rely on textual descriptions while under-utilizing visual evidence -- a phenomenon termed ``text shortcut learning.'' We propose an adversarial evaluation framework that quantifies this cross-modal dependency by measuring accuracy degradation (Drop) when semantically conflicting text is paired with unchanged images. Four adversarial strategies -- shape\_swap, color\_swap, position\_swap, and random\_text -- are applied to a controlled geometric-shapes dataset ($n{=}1{,}000$). We compare three configurations: Baseline CLIP (ViT-B/32), LoRA fine-tuning, and LoRA Optimized (integrating Hard Negative Mining, Label Smoothing, layer-wise learning rates, Cosine Restarts, curriculum learning, and data augmentation). The optimized model reduces average Drop from 27.5\% to 9.8\% (64.4\% relative improvement, $p{<}0.001$) while maintaining 97\% normal accuracy. Attention visualization and embedding-space analysis confirm that the optimized model attends more to visual features and achieves tighter cross-modal alignment.

analysis.tldr: 通过对抗性评估框架量化VLM的文本捷径现象，并利用LoRA优化策略显著提升视觉可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在跨模态任务中表现出色，但存在过度依赖文本描述而忽视视觉证据的“文本捷径学习”问题，导致视觉可靠性不足，影响模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何量化和缓解VLM中的文本捷径现象，提升模型对视觉特征的依赖和跨模态对齐的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到VLM存在文本捷径学习现象，即模型过度依赖文本线索而忽视视觉证据，导致在语义冲突文本下性能显著下降。
analysis.method: 提出对抗性评估框架，通过四种对抗策略（形状、颜色、位置交换和随机文本）量化跨模态依赖；并采用LoRA优化方法，结合难负样本挖掘、标签平滑、分层学习率、余弦重启、课程学习和数据增强来缓解文本捷径。
contributions: 提出一种量化VLM文本捷径现象的对抗性评估框架，定义准确率下降指标Drop。
设计并验证了LoRA优化策略，在保持正常精度的同时显著降低Drop，提升视觉可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在包含1000个样本的几何形状数据集上，对比Baseline CLIP、LoRA微调和LoRA优化三种配置，优化模型将平均Drop从27.5%降至9.8%（相对改进64.4%，p<0.001），同时保持97%的正常准确率。
limitations: 实验仅在合成几何形状数据集上进行，未在真实复杂场景中验证。
对抗策略仅针对简单属性（形状、颜色、位置），未涵盖更复杂的语义冲突。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对抗性评估框架量化VLM的文本捷径现象，并利用LoRA优化策略显著提升视觉可靠性。

papers.title: Beyond the Basics: Leveraging Large Language Model for Fine-Grained Medical Entity Recognition
papers.abstract: Extracting clinically relevant information from unstructured medical narratives such as admission notes, discharge summaries, and emergency case histories remains a challenge in clinical natural language processing (NLP). Medical Entity Recognition (MER) identifies meaningful concepts embedded in these records. Recent advancements in large language models (LLMs) have shown competitive MER performance; however, evaluations often focus on general entity types, offering limited utility for real-world clinical needs requiring finer-grained extraction. To address this gap, we rigorously evaluated the open-source LLaMA3 model for fine-grained medical entity recognition across 18 clinically detailed categories. To optimize performance, we employed three learning paradigms: zero-shot, few-shot, and fine-tuning with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). To further enhance few-shot learning, we introduced two example selection methods based on token- and sentence-level embedding similarity, utilizing a pre-trained BioBERT model. Unlike prior work assessing zero-shot and few-shot performance on proprietary models (e.g., GPT-4) or fine-tuning different architectures, we ensured methodological consistency by applying all strategies to a unified LLaMA3 backbone, enabling fair comparison across learning settings. Our results showed that fine-tuned LLaMA3 surpasses zero-shot and few-shot approaches by 63.11% and 35.63%, respectivel respectively, achieving an F1 score of 81.24% in granular medical entity extraction.

analysis.tldr: 使用LLaMA3结合LoRA微调，在细粒度医学实体识别上超越零样本和少样本方法，F1达81.24%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医学实体识别研究多关注通用实体类型，无法满足临床对细粒度提取的需求，且缺乏对开源LLM在统一骨干下的系统比较。
analysis.problem: 如何利用开源大语言模型（LLaMA3）实现细粒度医学实体识别，并公平比较不同学习范式（零样本、少样本、微调）的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微调后的LLaMA3在细粒度医学实体识别上显著优于零样本和少样本方法，F1分别提升63.11%和35.63%。
analysis.method: 采用LLaMA3作为统一骨干，使用零样本、少样本和LoRA微调三种范式；在少样本中引入基于BioBERT的token级和句子级嵌入相似度的示例选择方法。
contributions: 在18个细粒度临床类别上系统评估了LLaMA3的医学实体识别性能。
提出了两种基于嵌入相似度的少样本示例选择方法，提升了少样本学习效果。
通过统一骨干实现了不同学习范式的公平比较，证明了微调的巨大优势。
analysis.experiments: 在18个细粒度医学实体类别上评估，微调LLaMA3达到F1 81.24%，相比零样本和少样本分别提升63.11%和35.63%。
limitations: 仅使用LLaMA3一个模型，未与其他开源LLM对比。
示例选择方法可能依赖预训练嵌入质量，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用LLaMA3结合LoRA微调，在细粒度医学实体识别上超越零样本和少样本方法，F1达81.24%。

papers.title: EmbodiedHead: Real-Time Listening and Speaking Avatar for Conversational Agents
papers.abstract: We present EmbodiedHead, a speech-driven talking-head framework that equips LLMs with real-time visual avatars for conversation. A practical embodied avatar must achieve real-time generation, unified listening-speaking behavior, and high rendered visual quality simultaneously. Our framework couples the first Rectified-Flow Diffusion Transformer (DiT) for this task with a differentiable renderer, enabling diverse, high-fidelity generation in as few as four sampling steps. Prior listening-speaking methods rely on dual-stream audio, introducing an interlocutor look-ahead dependency incompatible with causal user--LLM interaction. We instead adopt a single-stream interface with explicit per-frame listening-speaking state conditioning and a Streaming Audio Scheduler, suppressing spurious mouth motion during listening while enabling seamless turn-taking. A two-stage training scheme of coefficient-space pretraining and joint image-domain refinement further closes the gap between motion-level supervision and rendered quality. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art visual quality and motion fidelity in both speaking and listening scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出EmbodiedHead，一种基于Rectified-Flow扩散Transformer的实时说话头框架，实现高保真听-说统一行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有具身化头像难以同时满足实时生成、统一听-说行为和高渲染质量的需求，且双流音频方法存在因果依赖问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能实时生成高保真视觉头像、支持听-说统一行为且兼容因果交互的对话代理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Rectified-Flow扩散Transformer与可微分渲染器耦合，单流音频接口配合逐帧听-说状态条件和流式音频调度器，两阶段训练（系数空间预训练+图像域联合精调）。
contributions: 首个将Rectified-Flow扩散Transformer用于说话头生成，实现少步采样高保真生成。
提出单流音频接口和流式音频调度器，消除双流依赖，抑制听时虚假嘴动。
两阶段训练策略弥合运动监督与渲染质量之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 在说话和听场景下，视觉质量和运动保真度达到最先进水平。
limitations: 可能依赖特定音频输入质量。
实时性能可能受限于计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EmbodiedHead，一种基于Rectified-Flow扩散Transformer的实时说话头框架，实现高保真听-说统一行为。

papers.title: DREAM: Dynamic Retinal Enhancement with Adaptive Multi-modal Fusion for Expert Precision Medical Report Generation
papers.abstract: Automating medical reports for retinal images requires a sophisticated blend of visual pattern recognition and deep clinical knowledge. Current Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) often struggle in specialized medical fields where data is scarce, leading to models that overfit and miss subtle but critical pathologies. To address this, we introduce DREAM (Dynamic Retinal Enhancement with Adaptive Multi-modal Fusion), a novel framework for high-fidelity medical report generation that excels even with limited data. DREAM employs a unique two-stage fusion mechanism that intelligently integrates visual data with clinical keywords curated by ophthalmologists. First, the Abstractor module maps image and keyword features into a shared space, enhancing visual data with pathology-relevant insights. Next, the Adaptor performs adaptive multi-modal fusion, dynamically weighting the importance of each modality using learnable parameters to create a unified representation. To ensure the model's outputs are semantically grounded in clinical reality, a Contrastive Alignment module aligns these fused representations with ground-truth medical reports during training. By combining medical expertise with an efficient fusion strategy, DREAM sets a new state-of-the-art on the DeepEyeNet benchmark, achieving a BLEU-4 score of 0.241, and further demonstrates strong generalization to the ROCO dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出DREAM框架，通过自适应多模态融合和对比对齐，在少量数据下提升视网膜图像报告生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大型视觉语言模型在专业医疗领域因数据稀缺而过拟合，难以捕捉细微病理特征，亟需高效融合视觉与临床知识的生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在视网膜图像数据有限的条件下，生成高保真、临床准确的医学报告。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DREAM框架包含两阶段融合：Abstractor将图像与临床关键词映射到共享空间，Adaptor通过可学习参数动态加权融合多模态特征，并利用对比对齐模块使融合表示与真实报告语义对齐。
contributions: 提出自适应多模态融合机制，动态权衡视觉与临床关键词的重要性。
引入对比对齐模块，确保生成报告语义符合临床事实。
在DeepEyeNet和ROCO数据集上达到新SOTA，验证了数据稀缺场景下的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepEyeNet基准上BLEU-4达0.241，并在ROCO数据集上展示强泛化性。
limitations: 仅针对视网膜图像，可能需调整以适用于其他医学影像。
依赖眼科专家提供的关键词，扩展性受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DREAM框架，通过自适应多模态融合和对比对齐，在少量数据下提升视网膜图像报告生成质量。

papers.title: CDSA-Net:Collaborative Decoupling of Vascular Structure and Background for High-Fidelity Coronary Digital Subtraction Angiography
papers.abstract: Digital subtraction angiography (DSA) in coronary imaging is fundamentally challenged by physiological motion, forcing reliance on raw angiograms cluttered with anatomical noise. Existing deep learning methods often produced images with two critical clinically unacceptable flaws: persistent boundary artifacts and a loss of native tissue grayscale fidelity that undermined diagnostic confidence. We propose a novel framework termed as CDSA-Net that for the first time explicitly decouples and jointly optimizes vascular structure preservation and realistic background restoration. CDSA-Net introduces two core innovations: (i) A hierarchical geometric prior guidance (HGPG) mechanism, embedded in our coronary structure extraction network (CSENet). It synergistically combines integrated geometric prior (IGP) with gated spatial modulation (GSM) and centerline-aware topology (CAT) loss supervision, ensuring structural continuity. (ii) An adaptive noise module (ANM) within our coronary background restoration network (CBResNet). Unlike standard restoration, ANM uniquely models the stochastic nature of clinical X-ray noise, bridging the domain gap to enable seamless background intensity estimation and the complete elimination of boundary artifacts. The final subtraction is obtained by removing the restored background from the raw angiogram. Quantitatively, it significantly outperformed state-of-the-art methods in vascular intensity correlation and perceptual quality. A 25.6% improvement in morphology assessment efficiency and a 42.9% gain in hemodynamic evaluation speed set a new benchmark for utility in interventional cardiology, while maintaining diagnostic results consistent with raw angiograms. The project code is available at https://github.com/DrThink-ai/CDSA-Net.

analysis.tldr: 提出CDSA-Net，通过解耦血管结构与背景并联合优化，实现高保真冠脉数字减影血管造影。
analysis.research_motivation: 冠脉DSA因生理运动导致图像质量差，现有深度学习方法存在边界伪影和灰度保真度损失，影响诊断信心。
analysis.problem: 如何同时保留血管结构完整性和恢复真实背景，消除边界伪影并保持灰度保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法产生边界伪影和灰度失真，临床不可接受。
analysis.method: CDSA-Net包含两个核心模块：CSENet（层次化几何先验引导，结合IGP、GSM和CAT损失）和CBResNet（自适应噪声模块ANM，建模X射线噪声随机性），通过从原始血管造影中减去恢复的背景得到最终减影图像。
contributions: 首次显式解耦并联合优化血管结构保持和真实背景恢复。
提出层次化几何先验引导机制和自适应噪声模块，有效消除边界伪影并保持灰度保真度。
analysis.experiments: 在冠脉DSA数据集上定量评估，血管强度相关性和感知质量显著优于SOTA，形态评估效率提升25.6%，血流动力学评估速度提升42.9%，诊断结果与原始血管造影一致。
limitations: 可能依赖特定噪声模型，泛化到其他成像模态需验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，实时性需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CDSA-Net，通过解耦血管结构与背景并联合优化，实现高保真冠脉数字减影血管造影。

papers.title: Demystifying the unreasonable effectiveness of online alignment methods
papers.abstract: Iterative alignment methods based on purely greedy updates are remarkably effective in practice, yet existing theoretical guarantees of \(O(\log T)\) KL-regularized regret can seem pessimistic relative to their empirical performance. In this paper, we argue that this mismatch arises from the regret criterion itself: KL-regularized regret conflates the statistical cost of learning with the exploratory randomization induced by the softened training policy. To separate these effects, we study the traditional temperature-zero regret criterion, which evaluates only the top-ranked response at inference time. Under this decision-centric notion of performance, we prove that standard greedy online alignment methods, including online RLHF and online DPO, achieve constant \((O(1))\) cumulative regret. By isolating the cost of identifying the best response from the stochasticity induced by regularization, our results provide a sharper theoretical explanation for the practical superb efficiency of greedy alignment.

analysis.tldr: 在线对齐方法在零温度遗憾下实现常数遗憾，解释了其实际高效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线对齐方法在实践中效果显著，但现有理论保证（O(log T) KL正则化遗憾）相对悲观，存在理论与实践的差距。
analysis.problem: 解释在线对齐方法（如在线RLHF和在线DPO）实际高效性的理论原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，KL正则化遗憾混淆了学习统计成本与软策略引入的探索随机性，导致理论界悲观。
analysis.method: 通过研究零温度遗憾准则（仅评估推理时排名最高的响应），证明标准贪心在线对齐方法实现常数（O(1)）累积遗憾。
contributions: 提出零温度遗憾准则作为更合适的性能度量，分离学习成本与正则化随机性。
证明在线RLHF和在线DPO等贪心方法在零温度遗憾下达到常数遗憾，提供更尖锐的理论解释。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖于特定假设（如线性可分性），实际场景中可能不成立。
仅考虑零温度遗憾，未覆盖其他常见评估指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在线对齐方法在零温度遗憾下实现常数遗憾，解释了其实际高效性。

papers.title: SciDraw-6K: A Multilingual Scientific Illustration Dataset Generated by Google Gemini
papers.abstract: We present SciDraw-6K, a curated dataset of 6,291 scientific illustrations synthesized by Google Gemini image-generation models, each paired with prompts in eleven languages (English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, Korean, German, French, Spanish, Brazilian Portuguese, Italian, and Russian). Images span eight broad scientific categories -- biomedical, chemistry, materials, electronics, environment, AI systems, physics, and a long "other" tail -- and are produced primarily by the gemini-2.5-flash-image and gemini-3-pro-image-preview model families. In contrast to general-purpose text-to-image corpora that dominate the literature, SciDraw-6K is purpose-built for the scientific illustration genre: schematic diagrams, mechanism figures, table-of-contents graphics, and conceptual posters. We describe the construction pipeline, report dataset statistics, and document its use as the substrate of sci-draw.com, a public scientific drawing service. The dataset is released to support multilingual text-to-image research, domain-adapted diffusion fine-tuning, and prompt-engineering studies for scientific visualization. Dataset: https://huggingface.co/datasets/SciDrawAI/SciDraw-6K Code: https://github.com/SciDrawAI/scidraw-6k

analysis.tldr: 构建了一个多语言科学插图数据集，用于支持科学可视化领域的文本到图像研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像数据集主要面向通用场景，缺乏专门针对科学插图（如示意图、机理图等）的高质量多语言数据集，限制了科学可视化领域的研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个多语言、高质量、专门用于科学插图的数据集，以支持领域适应的扩散模型微调、提示工程和多语言文本到图像研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Google Gemini图像生成模型合成6,291张科学插图，覆盖8个科学类别，并配以11种语言的提示词，构建了SciDraw-6K数据集。
contributions: 发布了SciDraw-6K数据集，包含6,291张多语言科学插图及提示词。
提供了数据集构建流程、统计信息，并基于该数据集部署了公共科学绘图服务sci-draw.com。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集完全由合成图像构成，可能缺乏真实科学插图的细节和多样性。
仅覆盖11种语言，对于更多语言的支持有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建了一个多语言科学插图数据集，用于支持科学可视化领域的文本到图像研究。

papers.title: DreamShot: Personalized Storyboard Synthesis with Video Diffusion Prior
papers.abstract: Storyboard synthesis plays a crucial role in visual storytelling, aiming to generate coherent shot sequences that visually narrate cinematic events with consistent characters, scenes, and transitions. However, existing approaches are mostly adapted from text-to-image diffusion models, which struggle to maintain long-range temporal coherence, consistent character identities, and narrative flow across multiple shots. In this paper, we introduce DreamShot, a video generative model based storyboard framework that fully exploits powerful video diffusion priors for controllable multi-shot synthesis. DreamShot supports both Text-to-Shot and Reference-to-Shot generation, as well as story continuation conditioned on previous frames, enabling flexible and context-aware storyboard generation. By leveraging the spatial-temporal consistency inherent in video generative models, DreamShot produces visually and semantically coherent sequences with improved narrative fidelity and character continuity. Furthermore, DreamShot incorporates a multi-reference role conditioning module that accepts multiple character reference images and enforces identity alignment via a Role-Attention Consistency Loss, explicitly constraining attention between reference and generated roles. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DreamShot achieves superior scene coherence, role consistency, and generation efficiency compared to state-of-the-art text-to-image storyboard models, establishing a new direction toward controllable video model-driven visual storytelling.

analysis.tldr: DreamShot利用视频扩散先验实现多镜头故事板合成，在角色一致性和叙事连贯性上超越基于图像的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有故事板合成方法多基于文本到图像扩散模型，难以保持长程时间连贯性、一致的角色身份和叙事流，限制了视觉叙事的质量。
analysis.problem: 如何利用视频生成模型的时空一致性先验，实现可控的多镜头故事板合成，并保证角色身份和叙事连贯性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出DreamShot框架，基于视频扩散模型，支持文本到镜头和参考到镜头生成，并通过多参考角色条件模块和角色注意力一致性损失强制角色身份对齐。
contributions: 首次将视频扩散先验用于故事板合成，实现时空连贯的多镜头生成。
提出多参考角色条件模块和角色注意力一致性损失，提升角色一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量视频扩散模型，计算成本较高。
角色一致性在复杂场景或大量角色时可能仍有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DreamShot利用视频扩散先验实现多镜头故事板合成，在角色一致性和叙事连贯性上超越基于图像的方法。

papers.title: NeuroAI and Beyond: Bridging Between Advances in Neuroscience and ArtificialIntelligence
papers.abstract: Neuroscience and Artificial Intelligence (AI) have made impressive progress in recent years but remain only loosely interconnected. Based on a workshop convened by the National Science Foundation in August 2025, we identify three fundamental capability gaps in current AI: the inability to interact with the physical world, inadequate learning that produces brittle systems, and unsustainable energy and data inefficiency. We describe the neuroscience principles that address each: co-design of body and controller, prediction through interaction, multi-scale learning with neuromodulatory control, hierarchical distributed architectures, and sparse event-driven computation. We present a research roadmap organized around these principles at near, mid, and long-term horizons. We argue that realizing this program requires a new generation of researchers trained across the boundary between neuroscience and engineering, and describe the institutional conditions: interdisciplinary training, hardware access, community standards, and ethics, needed to support them. We conclude that NeuroAI, neuroscience-informed artificial intelligence, has the potential to overcome limitations of current AI while deepening our understanding of biological neural computation.

analysis.tldr: 本文基于NSF研讨会，提出神经科学启发的AI（NeuroAI）研究路线图，以弥合当前AI在物理交互、学习鲁棒性和能效方面的三大能力差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI在物理世界交互、鲁棒学习和能效方面存在根本性局限，而神经科学原理有望提供突破性解决方案，但两个领域仍缺乏深度融合。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地将神经科学原理融入AI设计，以克服现有AI在物理交互、学习鲁棒性和能效方面的三大能力差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个基于神经科学原理（如身体与控制器协同设计、通过交互预测、多尺度学习与神经调控、分层分布式架构、稀疏事件驱动计算）的研究路线图，并规划近、中、长期研究目标。
contributions: 识别出当前AI的三大能力差距：物理交互缺失、学习脆弱、能效与数据效率低下。
提出神经科学启发的五大原则，并构建了分阶段的研究路线图。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 路线图缺乏具体的算法实现细节和实验验证。
跨学科人才培养和机构支持的具体措施未深入展开。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文基于NSF研讨会，提出神经科学启发的AI（NeuroAI）研究路线图，以弥合当前AI在物理交互、学习鲁棒性和能效方面的三大能力差距。

papers.title: LookasideVLN: Direction-Aware Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Aerial Vision-and-Language Navigation (Aerial VLN) enables unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) to follow natural language instructions and navigate complex urban environments. While recent advances have achieved progress through large-scale memory graphs and lookahead path planning, they remain limited by shallow instruction understanding and high computational cost. In particular, existing methods rely primarily on landmark descriptions, overlooking directional cues "a key source of spatial context in human navigation". In this work, we propose LookasideVLN, a new paradigm that exploits directional cues in natural language to achieve both more accurate spatial reasoning and greater computational efficiency. LookasideVLN comprises three core components: (1) an Egocentric Lookaside Graph (ELG) that dynamically encodes instruction-relevant landmarks and their directional relationships, (2) a Spatial Landmark Knowledge Base (SLKB) that provides lightweight memory retrieval from prior navigation experiences, and (3) a Lookaside MLLM Navigation Agent that aligns multimodal information from user instructions, visual observations, and landmark-direction information from ELG for path planning. Extensive experiments show that LookasideVLN significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art CityNavAgent, even with a single-level lookahead, demonstrating that leveraging directional cues is a powerful yet efficient strategy for Aerial VLN.

analysis.tldr: 提出LookasideVLN，利用方向线索提升空中视觉-语言导航的准确性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有空中VLN方法依赖大规模记忆图和前瞻路径规划，但指令理解浅层且计算成本高，尤其忽略了方向线索这一关键空间上下文。
analysis.problem: 如何利用自然语言中的方向线索实现更准确的空间推理和更高的计算效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法主要依赖地标描述而忽略方向线索，导致空间推理不足。
analysis.method: 提出LookasideVLN，包含三个核心组件：自我中心侧视图（ELG）动态编码指令相关地标及其方向关系，空间地标知识库（SLKB）提供轻量级记忆检索，以及Lookaside MLLM导航代理对齐多模态信息进行路径规划。
contributions: 提出利用方向线索的新范式LookasideVLN，提升空中VLN的空间推理和效率。
设计ELG和SLKB实现轻量级方向感知导航，显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，LookasideVLN显著优于最先进的CityNavAgent，即使仅使用单级前瞻。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的方向标注数据。
在极端复杂或动态环境中方向线索可能不稳定。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LookasideVLN，利用方向线索提升空中视觉-语言导航的准确性和效率。

papers.title: Beyond Overlap Metrics: Rewarding Reasoning and Preferences for Faithful Multi-Role Dialogue Summarization
papers.abstract: Multi-role dialogue summarization requires modeling complex interactions among multiple speakers while preserving role-specific information and factual consistency. However, most existing methods optimize for automatic metrics such as ROUGE and BERTScore, which favor surface-level imitation of references rather than genuine gains in faithfulness or alignment with human preferences. We propose a novel framework that couples explicit cognitive-style reasoning with reward-based optimization for multi-role dialogue summarization. Our method first distills structured reasoning traces (e.g., step-by-step inferences and intermediate reflections) from a large teacher model and uses them as auxiliary supervision to initialize a reasoning-aware summarizer via staged supervised fine-tuning. It then applies GRPO with a dual-principle reward that blends metric-based signals with human-aligned criteria targeting key information coverage, implicit inference, factual faithfulness, and conciseness. Experiments on multilingual multi-role dialogue benchmarks show that our method matches strong baselines on ROUGE and BERTScore. Specifically, results on CSDS confirm the framework's stability in semantic consistency, while in-depth analysis on SAMSum demonstrates clear gains in factual faithfulness and model-based preference alignment. These findings underscore the value of reasoning-aware and preference-aware training for reliable dialogue summarization. Checkpoints and datasets are available at https://huggingface.co/collections/NebulaPixel/summorchestra-multirole-summary.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合结构化推理与偏好优化的多角色对话摘要框架，提升事实一致性与人类偏好对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话摘要方法过度依赖ROUGE/BERTScore等表面匹配指标，忽视事实一致性和人类偏好，导致摘要质量受限。
analysis.problem: 多角色对话摘要中事实一致性差、角色信息丢失，且缺乏与人类偏好对齐的优化目标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先通过教师模型蒸馏结构化推理轨迹，经分阶段监督微调初始化摘要器；再使用GRPO结合双原则奖励（指标信号+人类对齐标准）优化。
contributions: 提出推理感知与偏好感知的联合训练框架，提升多角色摘要的事实一致性。
设计双原则奖励函数，融合指标信号与人类对齐标准。
在CSDS和SAMSum基准上验证了方法在语义一致性和事实忠实性上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在CSDS和SAMSum多语言多角色对话摘要基准上评估，与强基线在ROUGE/BERTScore上持平，在事实忠实性和偏好对齐上显著提升。
limitations: 依赖大型教师模型生成推理轨迹，可能增加训练成本。
双原则奖励的权重调节可能需针对不同场景调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合结构化推理与偏好优化的多角色对话摘要框架，提升事实一致性与人类偏好对齐。

papers.title: Persona-Based Requirements Engineering for Explainable Multi-Agent Educational Systems: A Scenario Simulator for Clinical Reasoning Training
papers.abstract: As Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Agentic AI become increasingly integrated across sectors such as education and healthcare, it is critical to ensure that Multi-Agent Education System (MAES) is explainable from the early stages of requirements engineering (RE) within the AI software development lifecycle. Explainability is essential to build trust, promote transparency, and enable effective human-AI collaboration. Although personas are well-established in human-computer interaction to represent users and capture their needs and behaviors, their role in RE for explainable MAES remains underexplored. This paper proposes a human-first, persona-driven, explainable MAES RE framework and demonstrates the framework through a MAES for clinical reasoning training. The framework integrates personas and user stories throughout the RE process to capture the needs, goals, and interactions of various stakeholders, including medical educators, medical students, AI patient agent, and clinical agents (physical exam agent, diagnostic agent, clinical intervention agent, supervisor agent, evaluation agent). The goals, underlying models, and knowledge base shape agent interactions and inform explainability requirements that guided the clinical reasoning training of medical students. A post-usage survey found that more than 78\% of medical students reported that MAES improved their clinical reasoning skills. These findings demonstrate that RE based on persona effectively connects technical requirements with non-technical medical students from a human-centered approach, ensuring that explainable MAES are trustworthy, interpretable, and aligned with authentic clinical scenarios from the early stages of the AI system engineering. The partial MAES for the clinical scenario simulator is~\href{https://github.com/2sigmaEdTech/MAS/}{open sourced here}.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于角色的需求工程框架，用于构建可解释的多智能体教育系统，并在临床推理训练中验证有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体教育系统（MAES）在教育和医疗等领域的应用日益广泛，但可解释性不足，影响信任和透明度；现有需求工程（RE）方法未充分利用角色（persona）来捕捉利益相关者需求，导致系统难以满足非技术用户（如医学生）的期望。
analysis.problem: 如何从需求工程早期阶段，通过角色驱动的方法确保多智能体教育系统（MAES）的可解释性，使其符合真实临床场景并提升医学生的临床推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种以人为本、角色驱动的可解释MAES需求工程框架，将角色和用户故事整合到RE过程中，捕获医疗教育者、医学生、AI患者代理、临床代理（体检、诊断、干预、监督、评估代理）等利益相关者的需求、目标和交互，并基于此定义可解释性需求，指导临床推理训练场景模拟器的设计。
contributions: 提出首个角色驱动的可解释MAES需求工程框架，将角色和用户故事系统性地融入RE过程。
通过临床推理训练场景模拟器实例化框架，并开源部分代码。
用户调查显示78%以上医学生认为系统提升了临床推理技能，验证了框架的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在临床推理训练场景模拟器上进行用户调查，超过78%的医学生报告系统提升了临床推理技能。
limitations: 仅针对临床推理训练场景，泛化性需在其他教育领域验证。
用户调查样本量和具体指标未详细说明，可能影响结论的统计显著性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于角色的需求工程框架，用于构建可解释的多智能体教育系统，并在临床推理训练中验证有效性。

papers.title: Layer-wise MoE Routing Locality under Shared-Prefix Code Generation: Token-Identity Decomposition and Compile-Equivalent Fork Redundancy
papers.abstract: In LLM-based code generation, multiple code candidates are often generated in parallel from the same prompt -- for example, in best-of-N sampling or multi-candidate code completion. These requests can share KV caches through a common prefix, yet the extent to which their Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) expert routing overlaps, and how this overlap varies across layers, remains insufficiently understood. We study Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8 (256 routed experts, top-8) by performing tree-search-based branching generation from a shared prefix (851 completed codes, temperature 0.7) and analyzing the results with a compiler-output-based alignment (gcc -S -O0 assembly) that controls for token-identity confounds. Our findings are threefold: (1) At positions where both sequences generated the same token, Jaccard similarity reaches 0.649 (40x random), while even at positions with different tokens it remains 0.175 (11x random). (2) A layer-wise decomposition reveals a crossing pattern: same-token routing similarity exceeds different-token similarity across all layers, but dips in the middle layers (L14-20), while different-token similarity peaks in the middle layers at 14x random. (3) In tree-search code generation, 67% of successfully compiled codes concentrate in the top three assembly-equivalent groups, and 99.6% of within-group differences consist of comments and blank lines. We show that diversity in top-P search, including beam search, poses a significant challenge. These results refine the "context-independent routing" claim of prior work through layer-wise decomposition and suggest opportunities for improving search efficiency in LLM code generation.

analysis.tldr: 共享前缀代码生成中，MoE路由在相同token位置高度重叠，中间层呈现交叉模式，且编译等价代码冗余严重。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM代码生成中常并行生成多个候选代码，共享前缀可复用KV缓存，但MoE专家路由在不同候选间的重叠程度及层间变化尚不明确，理解这一现象有助于提升搜索效率。
analysis.problem: 量化共享前缀代码生成中MoE路由的层间局部性，并分析编译等价代码的冗余模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 相同token位置路由Jaccard相似度0.649（40倍随机），不同token位置仍有0.175（11倍随机）；层间呈现交叉模式：相同token相似度在中间层（L14-20）下降，不同token相似度在中间层达到峰值（14倍随机）；67%的编译成功代码集中在三个汇编等价组中，99.6%的组内差异仅为注释和空行。
analysis.method: 基于Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8模型，使用树搜索从共享前缀生成851个完成代码，通过编译器输出（gcc -S -O0汇编）对齐控制token身份混淆，分析层间路由相似性。
contributions: 首次在共享前缀代码生成场景下系统量化MoE路由的层间局部性，揭示相同/不同token位置的相似度差异及层间交叉模式。
发现编译等价代码高度集中，指出多样性搜索（如top-P、beam search）面临显著冗余挑战。
analysis.experiments: 基于Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8模型，从共享前缀生成851个完成代码，使用gcc -S -O0汇编对齐，分析路由Jaccard相似度及编译等价分组。摘要未提供具体数值对比基线。
limitations: 仅针对单一模型（Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-FP8）和特定编译器（gcc -O0），结论泛化性需验证。
未探讨不同温度、采样策略或任务类型对路由局部性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 共享前缀代码生成中，MoE路由在相同token位置高度重叠，中间层呈现交叉模式，且编译等价代码冗余严重。

papers.title: Decentralised Trust and Security Mechanisms for IoT Networks at the Edge: A Comprehensive Review
papers.abstract: INTRODUCTION: The proliferation of the amalgamation of IoT and edge computing has increased the demand for decentralised trust and security mechanisms capable of operating across heterogeneous and resource-limited devices. Approaches such as federated learning, Zero Trust architectures, lightweight blockchain and distributed neural models offer alternatives to centralised control. OBJECTIVES: This review examines various state-of-the-art decentralised mechanisms and evaluates their effectiveness in terms of securing IoT networks at the edge. METHODS: Thirty recent studies were analysed to compare how decentralised architectures establish trust, support secure communication and enable intrusion and anomaly detection. Frameworks, such as DFGL-LZTA, SecFedDNN and COSIER were assessed. RESULTS: Decentralised designs enhance privacy, reduce single points of failure and improve adaptive threat response, though challenges remain in scalability, efficiency and interoperability. CONCLUSION: The study identifies key considerations and future research needs for building secure and resilient trust-aware IoT edge ecosystems.

analysis.tldr: 综述了面向物联网边缘网络的去中心化信任与安全机制，分析了联邦学习、零信任架构、轻量级区块链和分布式神经模型等方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 物联网与边缘计算的融合带来了异构、资源受限设备上的信任与安全挑战，传统集中式方案存在单点故障和隐私风险，亟需去中心化机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计并评估适用于物联网边缘网络的去中心化信任与安全机制，以解决隐私、单点故障和自适应威胁响应等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 去中心化设计能增强隐私、减少单点故障并改善自适应威胁响应，但在可扩展性、效率和互操作性方面仍存在挑战。
analysis.method: 对30项近期研究进行系统综述，比较了DFGL-LZTA、SecFedDNN和COSIER等框架在建立信任、支持安全通信以及入侵和异常检测方面的效果。
contributions: 系统梳理了物联网边缘网络中去中心化信任与安全机制的最新进展，涵盖联邦学习、零信任架构、轻量级区块链和分布式神经模型。
识别了可扩展性、效率和互操作性等关键挑战，并指出了未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述范围限于30项研究，可能未覆盖所有重要工作。
未提供定量比较或基准测试结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述了面向物联网边缘网络的去中心化信任与安全机制，分析了联邦学习、零信任架构、轻量级区块链和分布式神经模型等方法。

papers.title: Intent-aligned Autonomous Spacecraft Guidance via Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Future spacecraft operations require autonomy that can interpret high-level mission intent while preserving safety.
