However, existing trajectory optimization still relies heavily on expert-crafted formulations and does not support intent-conditioned decision-making. This paper proposes an intent-aligned spacecraft guidance framework that links high-level reasoning and safe trajectory optimization through explicit intermediate abstractions, based on behavior sequences and waypoint constraints. A foundation model first predicts an intent-aligned behavior plan, a waypoint generation model then converts it into waypoint constraints, and the safe trajectory is computed via optimization. This decomposition enables scalable supervision without sacrificing safety. Numerical experiments in close-proximity operation scenarios demonstrate that the proposed pipeline achieves over 90\% SCP convergence and yields a $1.5\times$ higher rate of generating trajectories that satisfy the top intent-prioritized performance criteria than heuristic decision-making. These results support the use of intermediate behavior abstraction as a practical interface between foundation-model reasoning and safety-critical onboard spacecraft autonomy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种意图对齐的航天器自主制导框架，通过行为序列和航点约束将高层推理与安全轨迹优化连接起来。
analysis.research_motivation: 未来航天器操作需要能够解释高层任务意图的自主性，同时保证安全性。然而，现有的轨迹优化方法严重依赖专家设计的公式，不支持基于意图的决策制定。
analysis.problem: 如何将高层推理（意图理解）与安全轨迹优化有效结合，实现意图对齐的自主航天器制导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个三阶段框架：1) 基础模型预测意图对齐的行为计划；2) 航点生成模型将行为计划转换为航点约束；3) 通过优化计算安全轨迹。这种分解实现了可扩展的监督而不牺牲安全性。
contributions: 提出了一种意图对齐的航天器制导框架，通过中间行为抽象连接高层推理与安全轨迹优化。
在近距离操作场景中验证了框架的有效性，实现了超过90%的SCP收敛率，并比启发式决策生成满足最高意图优先级性能指标的轨迹率高1.5倍。
analysis.experiments: 在近距离操作场景中进行数值实验，展示了超过90%的SCP收敛率，以及比启发式决策高1.5倍的满足最高意图优先级性能指标的轨迹生成率。
limitations: 可能依赖于特定场景的仿真验证，真实环境适用性待验证。
基础模型和航点生成模型的泛化能力可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种意图对齐的航天器自主制导框架，通过行为序列和航点约束将高层推理与安全轨迹优化连接起来。

papers.title: RosettaSearch: Multi-Objective Inference-Time Search for Protein Sequence Design
papers.abstract: We introduce RosettaSearch, an inference-time multi-objective optimization approach for backbone conditioned protein sequence design. We use large language models (LLMs) as a generative optimizer within a search algorithm capable of controlled exploration and exploitation, using rewards computed from RosettaFold3, a structure prediction model, under a strict computational budget. In a large-scale evaluation, we apply RosettaSearch to 400 suboptimal sequences generated by LigandMPNN (a state-of-the-art model trained for protein sequence design), recovering high-fidelity designs that LigandMPNN's single-pass decoding fails to produce. RosettaSearch's designs show improvements in structural fidelity metrics ranging between 18% to 68%, translating to a 2.5x improvement in design success rate. We observe that these gains in success rate are robust when RosettaSearch-designed sequences are evaluated with an independent structure prediction oracle (Chai-1) and generalize across two distinct LLM families (o4-mini and Gemini-3), with performance scaling consistently with reasoning capability. We further demonstrate that RosettaSearch improves the sequence fidelity of ProteinMPNN designs for de novo backbones from the Dayhoff atlas, showing that the approach generalizes beyond native protein structures to computationally generated backbones. We also demonstrate a multi-modal extension of RosettaSearch with vision-language models, where images of predicted protein structures are used as feedback to incorporate structural context to guide protein sequence generation. To our knowledge, this is the first large-scale demonstration that LLMs can serve as effective generative optimizers for backbone-conditioned protein sequence design, yielding systematic gains without any model retraining.

analysis.tldr: 提出RosettaSearch，利用LLM作为生成优化器进行推理时多目标搜索，显著提升蛋白质序列设计的结构保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有蛋白质序列设计方法（如LigandMPNN）的单次解码常产生次优序列，缺乏有效的推理时优化手段。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，通过推理时搜索提升基于主链条件的蛋白质序列设计的结构保真度和成功率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LigandMPNN的单次解码无法生成高保真设计，而RosettaSearch通过多目标搜索能恢复这些失败案例，且改进在不同LLM家族和结构预测器上鲁棒。
analysis.method: 将LLM作为生成优化器嵌入搜索算法，利用RosettaFold3计算奖励，在严格计算预算下进行受控的探索与利用。
contributions: 首次大规模证明LLM可作为蛋白质序列设计的有效生成优化器，无需模型重训练。
提出多模态扩展，利用视觉语言模型以预测结构图像作为反馈指导序列生成。
analysis.experiments: 在400个LigandMPNN生成的次优序列上评估，结构保真度提升18%-68%，设计成功率提升2.5倍；在Dayhoff atlas的从头骨架上验证泛化性；使用独立结构预测器Chai-1和不同LLM家族（o4-mini, Gemini-3）验证鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖RosettaFold3作为奖励模型，可能引入其自身偏差。
计算预算限制可能影响搜索深度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RosettaSearch，利用LLM作为生成优化器进行推理时多目标搜索，显著提升蛋白质序列设计的结构保真度。

papers.title: UCCL-Zip: Lossless Compression Supercharged GPU Communication
papers.abstract: The rapid growth of large language models (LLMs) has made GPU communication a critical bottleneck. While prior work reduces communication volume via quantization or lossy compression, these approaches introduce numerical errors that can degrade convergence, accuracy, and stability. We present UCCL-Zip, a unified design that integrates lossless compression directly into GPU communication primitives. UCCL-Zip supports both point-to-point (P2P) and collective communication without modifying user-facing APIs or compromising numerical correctness. For P2P communication, Uzip-P2P employs a split-send pipeline that exposes transmissible data early and overlaps compression with communication, while preserving high GPU efficiency by operating on large data blocks. For collective communication, Uzip-NCCL integrates compression into NCCL's persistent kernel model via fused execution, eliminating redundant memory traffic and kernel launches. In real workloads, UCCL-Zip accelerates RL weight synchronization by up to 47.5% and reduces vLLM end-to-end inference latency by up to 10%, all without application changes.

analysis.tldr: UCCL-Zip 将无损压缩直接集成到 GPU 通信原语中，在不影响数值正确性的前提下加速 LLM 训练和推理。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 规模快速增长使 GPU 通信成为瓶颈，现有量化或有损压缩方法引入数值误差，影响收敛和精度。
analysis.problem: 如何在 GPU 通信中实现无损压缩，同时保持高效率和易用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 UCCL-Zip，包含 Uzip-P2P（点对点通信的拆分发送流水线）和 Uzip-NCCL（集体通信的融合执行内核），将无损压缩直接嵌入通信原语。
contributions: 设计并实现了 UCCL-Zip，支持点对点和集体通信的无损压缩，无需修改用户 API。
在真实负载中验证了加速效果：RL 权重同步加速高达 47.5%，vLLM 推理延迟降低 10%。
analysis.experiments: 在真实负载中测试，RL 权重同步加速高达 47.5%，vLLM 端到端推理延迟降低 10%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定通信模式或硬件。
无损压缩的压缩比可能有限，对带宽极度受限的场景效果可能不如有损方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: UCCL-Zip 将无损压缩直接集成到 GPU 通信原语中，在不影响数值正确性的前提下加速 LLM 训练和推理。
